- It wasn't going to go berserk in the first place, capeesh? ｜ 它从一开始就不可能失控好吗？
- Zhihua firmly believes that he will soon meet his soulmate, and he's looking for someone to help him find her... ｜ 志华相信自己的恋爱运势即将来到，正在寻找一个人帮自己四处找找…
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param9:P}/{param10:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param9:P}/{param10:P}
- Tepeacac Rise ｜ 隆崛坡
- The workers piled up the fireworks and said they would go confirm the locations to set them off. That's when they left the village. ｜ 他们把烟花都堆在一处，说是要去确认燃放地点，先离开了村子。
- I've heard Basil say that caring for children is like caring for a flower. You need good soil, sufficient sunlight, frequent watering, and you can't let them grow however they want. ｜ 我听贝瑟说，照顾小孩子就像照顾花朵一样，要有很好的土壤，要有充足的阳光。要经常灌溉呵护，但也不能放任他们肆意乱长。
- Observe ｜ 观察
- Always flexible no matter how weird the situation is, huh? ｜ 这是那种不管有多奇怪，反正照着做就对了的场合吗？你适应得好快。
- After being out of sight for quite some time, Klee shows up with a mysterious letter in her hand. According to the letter, there seem to be some uncharted islands that lie well-hidden amidst the sea... Determined to help Klee, everyone embarks on a journey together to these unknown islands to seek out whoever's behind the unusual letter. ｜ 许久不见的可莉拿出了一封神秘来信。据信中所说，世上似乎存在着一座极为隐蔽的岛屿。为了可莉，众人决心一同前往神秘海岛，找出寄送这封信的人…
- Find another way to enter the central area ｜ 寻找进入中央地带的办法
- Trouble is, we don't know where she is... ｜ 但是，不知道她到底在哪…
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 点按冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- I used Forbidden Hand at the opportune moment and drew... ｜ 我在关键时刻使出「禁忌的一手」，抽到了…
- So what you're saying is that we should help this Mr. Nacker, and thank him for the privilege while we're at it? ｜ 也就是说，我们帮了那个什么纳克先生，后面还得谢谢他？
- I doubt even Captain Beidou will manage to come out of all of this unscathed. ｜ 就算是那个北斗，这次也免不了责罚了吧。
- My mind is growing even bigger. It feels like you could fit the entire sky and ocean inside it. ｜ 思路变得更开阔了，天空和大海都能装进去。
- I'm gonna grow up as quick as I can, and then I'll become an adventurer, just like you! ｜ #我要快点长大，然后变成像{NICKNAME}{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SISTERA]}一样的冒险家！
- It was all motivated by revenge... ｜ 原来是复仇…

- I always welcome customers who are sensible and wish them a happy and sweet day. ｜ 我非常欢迎理智的顾客，并祝福他们能度过快乐而甜蜜的一天。
- Gah. Why isn't the Boss back yet? Did something happen to him? ｜ 老大怎么还没回来，难道出什么意外了…？
- There are a lot of houses and gardens like this on the outskirts of Fontaine. ｜ 枫丹郊外有很多类似的民居与花圃。
- Cannot chat in this channel while in this event ｜ 该频道在活动进行时无法聊天
- Difficulty Test Fishing Point 17 ｜ 难度测试鱼点17
- Hmm? Do you need anything? ｜ 嗯？你有什么事吗？
- Oh, good heavens... this is my first time entering this sort of place without any protective measures... ｜ 老天爷…我还是第一次不用任何防护手段就进这种地方…
- Only here I can truly be free. ｜ 只有在这里，我才能真正得到解脱。
- ... ｜ ……

- And Boethius... was once an excellent Harmost. ｜ 波爱修斯…的确也曾是一名出色的调律师。
- Should you say that it was... fortunate that Royce ate that first? ｜ 该说…好在是先让罗伊斯吃掉了吗？
- Convert Wood ｜ 木材转化
- I must say, your friend clearly knows a thing or two. In terms of collection value, nothing the Yae Publishing House is currently putting out can rival the books you're after. ｜ 不得不说，你的这位朋友真的很专业，谈到收藏价值，目前八重堂发行的书籍都比不上这两本。
- (Wipe Hora's entire body down with a towel.) ｜ （拿毛巾擦洗霍莱的全身）
- Obsolete - Matzatli ｜ 废弃-马察特利
- Really? Is the "Lunar Leviathan" really here? ｜ 真的吗？真的是「海中月」来了吗？
- I am equipped with the most advanced optics from the Fontaine Institute of Natural Philosophy. I simply need to record this information in my storage units and compare it with previous data... ｜ 我搭载了枫丹自然哲学学院最先进的光学设备，只要将此处的信息录入储存单元，与过往信息进行比对…
- Confident ｜ 自信
- No, there's still my sister... ｜ 不，我妹妹的事还没有…
- I'm in a zero-tolerance mood right now. Stop being so flippant. ｜ 现在我对你的容忍度很低，不要用你那看热闹的态度评价这件事。
- As Elodie begins to believe that she may have finally made it, she is knocked out by a hard blow from behind... ｜ 艾洛迪自以为得逞之际，被来自背后的一记攻击狠狠敲晕…
- I am pleased to confirm that these are indeed the individuals who stole from Komore Teahouse. ｜ 勘验无误，确实是这些人偷了木漏茶室的东西。
- Many of our troops were injured, so I decided to tend to them before issuing the order to pursue. Forgive me! ｜ 不少同伴受了伤，我擅自判断应当优先安置伤员，就没能继续追击它们。实在是非常抱歉！
- Okay. ｜ 我知道了。
- Isn't that amazing news? ｜ 这不是天大的好消息吗？
- The scent... getting stronger... almost at the... ｜ 花香…浓烈…终点应该…
- A removable part that belongs to the central drive valve in the abandoned production zone. ｜ 属于废弃生产区中央传动机阀的可拆卸部件。
- As you can see, Sango's less than thrilled to be involved in this case. ｜ 但是你也看见了，社长…她不太乐意插手这件事。

- We've been in a dream. ｜ 我们一直都在梦中。

- Hey... Isn't this the valley we first went to? What are you bringing us here for? Is there anything worth seeing here? ｜ 欸…这不是我们最初来过的那座峡谷吗？你带我们来这里干什么呀？这里有什么值得一看的东西吗？
- Engulfing Lightning ｜ 薙草之稻光
- Wang'ya from Liyue Harbor seems to be troubled by something... ｜ 璃月港的望雅似乎正在因为某事而烦恼着…
- Wh—Why are you suddenly asking that... ｜ 怎、怎么突然问起这个…

- *sigh* I'm not sure how I can help her. I've given it some thought, though — if all else fails, I can play the role of the fish myself... ｜ 唉…我也不清楚要怎么样才能帮到她。我都想过，实在不行的话，我就自己去扮演鱼…
- But at nighttime there's never anyone around to ask for directions. I once saw a guy sleeping by the side of the road and tried to wake him up... ｜ 可晚上几乎遇不到能帮我指路的人了，有一次看到有人在路边睡着了，我想把他叫醒问路…
- An abnormal Electro elemental life form. Although it might appear similar to an Oceanid, it does not possess her intelligence or memories.\nThat which drives the Thunder Manifestation is a much more primal fury.\nIt is said that these life forms will only descend like lightning upon places that play host to great lingering resentment, such as the fragmented Amakumo Peak, where the storm clouds ever roil. As long as the grudges of the land do not fade, so will the roaring thunder persist. ｜ 异常的雷元素生命。虽然外貌上与纯水精灵有相似之处，却不具备她的智慧与记忆。\n驱动雷音权现的是更为原始纯粹的愤怒。\n据说这种生物只会随着雷霆降生在遗留着强大忿恨的地方，譬如说支离破碎、雷云黝黝的天云峠。只要土地中的怨恨不消，那雷鸣也不会断绝吧。
- Hello, outlander. Please don't stay out on the street for too long. ｜ 你好，外国人。请不要在街上停留太久。
- Apologies my liege, where are my manners? My name is Xingqiu, a humble literature enthusiast who happened to be passing by. ｜ 失礼了，在下行秋，只是一个偶然路过的爱书人。
- Filming Theme Directed by Furina ｜ 芙宁娜导演的摄影题
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- But... Ayato must be one of the smartest guys we know. What the heck was he thinking!? ｜ 绫人那家伙，平时脑袋不是很聪明吗？到底在想什么呀！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Even though I was born with a human form, there's a fundamental difference between dragons and humans. ｜ 我虽然以人形诞生，却与人类有着本质的区别。
- Leave it to me. ｜ 没问题。
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Spring Spirit Summoning</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>仰灵威召将役咒</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。
- That said, she won't be able to meet you today. I'm sorry you came all this way for nothing. ｜ 可是…她今天应该没办法和二位见面了，实在抱歉，让你们白跑了一趟。
- It seems to have been a famous quote from a naval commander of theirs from long ago — a most outstanding figure indeed. I am in full agreement with this view, and it applies to us Knights too, in a sense. ｜ 似乎是很久以前的海军司令留下的名言。真是杰出的人物。我认为这是无比正确的观点，从某种意义上来说，也适用于骑士团。
- You wouldn't be unable to rescue your comrade by any chance, would you? ｜ 斯露莎该不会没本事救助同伴吧？
- Try and convince the lovebirds to be quiet ｜ 去劝说约会者保持安静
- I'll move my food stall over there — not that my skills are the most impressive, but I'm sure I'll add to the atmosphere at least, eh? ｜ 我还要把小吃摊搬过去，虽然我的手艺上不了什么台面，但是多少也能增添一点人气吧？
- Aimed Shot|{param5:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param5:F1P}
- A strange and mysterious life form.\nIt has no known similarities with any other creatures on Teyvat. ｜ 神秘的异形生命体。\n与提瓦特的任何生物都没有共性。
- Du Wei zido dala? Mi mito nye. ｜ Du Wei zido dala? Mi mito nye.
- But I think that you did a good job, considering the circumstances. Please take this. ｜ 但是对于您来说，已经很不错了，这些礼物请您收下。
- I know. Maybe I should go home. ｜ 我知道了，也许我是该回去了…
- Actually, I was thinking... Do you want to come fishing with me? ｜ 我想想…要不要一起去钓鱼。
- (Pan over all three characters.) ｜ （拍摄三人的全景）
- Uh... But you didn't know what you were doing... You didn't do it intentionally and you've already been punished for it... So, Paimon shouldn't criticize you any more... ｜ 呃…但你不知道后果，也不是有意搞破坏，又受过惩罚了…我好像也不太好指责你了…

- I can sense your joy. It is indeed a delightful moment. ｜ 我能感受到你的喜悦。这确实是一件值得高兴的事情。

- Anyway, that was all just to get you warmed up... ｜ 而且跟这种开胃小菜比起来…
- Uh, but why's a finch's older brother a duck? ｜ 不过，为什么团雀的哥哥是鸭子？
- Uhhh... *sigh* ｜ 哎…

- That sounds like a lot of work. ｜ 还真是辛苦的工作呢。
- Like... Ooh, we could share some stories with each other before we set off again. ｜ 再次出发之前，我们交换几个故事吧。
- La Gouttiere ｜ 下水沟报
- But if you were to endanger innocents now for your own gain, the public anger towards the Lefeveres would only rise to a boiling point! ｜ 但如果你现在殃及到无辜，对「勒菲弗尔」的仇恨就只会更加高涨！
- Since they tipped their mitts and showed their mugs here, our Boss is probably gonna get double-crossed too. Whaddaya say, bo? In for a Mora, in for the lot, you wouldn't back out now, would ya? ｜ 现在这边水漫了，瓢把子指不定也要吃暗青子。好朋友，话说帮人帮到底，还请再帮俺们一把？
- Iwakura Art Okuden ｜ 岩藏流·奥传
- The Windblume festivities are in full swing! If you get time, do make sure to roam around. You'll find a very different Mondstadt. ｜ 现在正好是风花节庆典，如果有时间的话请到四处逛逛吧，一定能看到一个不一样的蒙德城。
- She sacrificed herself to defend the land of Sumeru from calamity. ｜ 她牺牲自己在巨大的灾难之中守住了须弥的土地。
- Damaged Stone Slate ｜ 破损的石板
- If nothing else, do it for Ganyu. ｜ 您不如卖甘雨一个面子。

- In other words, the only way Raptor could have gotten out would be this way — past us. ｜ 换句话说，如果怪鸟想要逃出去，就必须从我们这边经过才行。
- Seems we had a productive day. Hope we can make even more progress tomorrow! ｜ 今天也还算有所收获吧，希望明天可以取得新的进展。
- Vinayak starts tinkering with the machinery... ｜ 维纳亚克开始埋头鼓捣机械…

- The Steambird ｜ 蒸汽鸟报
- *cough* Maybe lonely souls are easily drawn together — back then, it and I got along quite well. ｜ 咳咳…可能是孤僻的家伙总是会聚在一起，所以那个时候我和它关系也，咳咳…还算可以。
- Layla said that she thinks you'll get caught up in internal conflict. ｜ 莱依拉跟我们说，她认为你有时会陷入「自我矛盾」。

- ... ｜ ……
- Do not stray too far from me. I can restore your fighting energy. Lessen your burden in combat. ｜ 不要离我太远。我可以恢复你们的力量。希望能减轻一些战斗的负担。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- As the leader of all matra, General Mahamatra Cyno is well known to everyone in the Akademiya.\nHis duties are to arrest those who violate the Akademiya's rules and regulations, terminate illegal studies, and uphold discipline of the Akademiya. Nevertheless, researchers feel that this General Mahamatra does nothing but undermine academic progress and prohibit scientific research. Some even claim that he is "cutting off the path to knowledge" and can be seen as a dire threat to any researcher eager to seek knowledge...\nOver time, researchers have come to shrink away from Cyno in silence whenever they so much as see him, wanting to have nothing to do with him.\nBut the General Mahamatra is hardly bothered by such things.\nIf this exaggerated public image can really deter some researchers, that will in no way be an inconvenience for his work.\nPlus, in the words of that Forest Watcher friend of his,\n"The research conducted by most researchers is nowhere significant enough to result in a talk with a matra." ｜ 身为教令院风纪官们的首领，大风纪官赛诺在教令院内的「威名」可谓无人不知，无人不晓。\n虽然他的职责是抓捕违反教令之人，中止违禁研究，维护院内风纪…但在学者们的口中，这位大风纪官是在毁坏学术，禁绝研究，甚至是「剪除求知之路」，院内的每一个渴望求知的学者都可能受到他的「威胁」…\n久而久之，只要看见了赛诺的身影，学者们都会不约而同地噤声退避，生怕和他沾上一点关系。\n但大风纪官对这种情况并不介意。\n如果这种夸张的「威名」真能震慑住学者们的话，那也有助于他进行维护院内风纪的工作。\n况且，套用他那位巡林官朋友的话来说——\n「大部分学者所进行的研究，都没有重要到需要和风纪官谈话的程度。」
- Defeat the thing that suddenly appeared ｜ 打倒突然出现的东西

- A tired, hungry person would obviously be drawn to the smell of a restaurant! It makes sense such circumstances would inspire written words, even a few lines of poetry. ｜ 又累又饿的人，当然会被餐厅的香气吸引啦！这种时候有感而发，写下一些抒情的话，甚至诗兴大发，都是合情合理的嘛。

- When characters trigger Burning, Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Bloom, Hyperbloom, or Burgeon on an opponent, all party members will gain <color=#F39000FF>10% Dendro DMG Bonus</color> for 10s. This bonus can be triggered once every 5s. Max 4 stacks. Once 4 stacks have been gained, when characters deal Dendro DMG to an opponent, a <color=#F39000FF>shockwave will be unleashed</color> at that opponent's position, dealing True DMG. A shockwave can be unleashed in this way once every 5s. ｜ 角色对敌人触发燃烧、原激化、超激化、蔓激化、绽放、超绽放或烈绽放后，队伍中所有角色获得<color=#F39000FF>10%草元素伤害加成</color>，持续10秒，该效果每5秒至多触发一次，至多叠加4次。叠加4次后，角色对敌人造成草元素伤害时，将在敌人所在的位置<color=#F39000FF>释放冲击波</color>，造成真实伤害。每5秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。
- If I can't get results, I'm afraid that I'll have a problem getting research funding... And that would be far more devastating than the sky falling. ｜ 要是再拿不出结果，我的研究经费怕是都要出问题…这可比天什么时候会塌要命得多。
- Alright, but remember, you all should hide while I'm delivering the parcel. ｜ 行，但交货时你们还是先藏在远处。
- Us technicians don't get too concerned with whether a problem is serious or not! We only think about whether or not it can be fixed. As for this particular issue... Let's just say if it wasn't fixable, I'd have left a long time ago! ｜ 对我们技术工人来说，哪有什么严重不严重的问题！只有「能修好的」，和「修不好的」。至于手头上这个…若是修不好，我早就走人啦！

- In that case, I call upon the prosecution — Lady Furina. Do you wish to refute his statement in any way? ｜ 那么，请问芙宁娜女士，作为指控方，有无对此的反驳意见呢？
- A group of hilichurls is wandering in the wilderness. Some of them are Geo-enhanced. Defeat all of them and put an end to this threat. ｜ 一群丘丘人正在野外游荡，威胁着过往行人，其中一部分以「岩」强化了自身。消灭所有魔物，清除这股威胁。
- You're welcome. I look forward to hearing more about your exploits! ｜ 不用谢，也别忘了跟我分享你的见识与成果哦。
- But... if you get caught, won't you get disciplined? ｜ 这…要是被发现的话，不会被关禁闭吗？
- Hung Fan leaves, looking even more exhausted and resigned than the cat from earlier... ｜ 洪分无奈地离去了，看起来比刚才的小猫更疲惫一些…
- We get clean spring water all year around h—here, so it's just right for raising crocodiles. Th—that's why we fenced this place up. ｜ 因为这、这里有四季不竭的干净泉水，正适合养殖鳄鱼。所、所以我们围起了这里。
- Ah, speaking of which, the books from "that place" in Ritou will probably arrive soon. I can use them as reference... ｜ 啊，说起来，最近离岛「那边」的书也快到了，可以参考…
- In specific, however, you need to take care to grasp the current state of the plants and trim the less presentable parts of them away... ｜ 但在具体制作上…裁剪花卉和植物时，需要细细地把握植物的状态，细心地为植物修剪掉不体面的地方…

- Low HP: III ｜ 生命值低·其三
- As such, humans began imitating the way dragons controlled the substance, creating a language by which humanity could exert that same control. This is the basis of modern Natlan's phlogiston usage. ｜ 于是人类开始模仿龙的族群支配燃素的方式，仿造出了人类控制和使用「燃素」的语言，也是纳塔现代燃素使用方式的起点…

- No one was starving. No one was poor... We'd share the food we couldn't finish with each other. Everyone would help to clean the rooms, houses... everything. ｜ 没有人会吃不饱，没有人会受穷…大家有吃不完的东西，也会送给彼此。房间也好，场地也好，大家都会互相帮忙打扫。
- Well, if you say so. Speaking of which, we're here to find... ｜ 好吧…既然你这样坚持。话说回来我们是来找…
- After all, the Tenryou Commission feels that having the ability to forge powerful weapons is something they should flaunt. ｜ 毕竟，在天领奉行看来，能够锻造强力的武器也是一种值得夸耀的实力。
- He was an outstanding warrior. ｜ 他是一位了不起的战士。
- What do you mean, Mona? Who could it be? ｜ 难道是…什么？
- ...You buried new mechanisms? ｜ …你埋了新的机关？
- I get it now! You're the poachers who've been hunting here! And you're poaching my Dusk Birds again! ｜ 好啊，果然！你们就是最近流窜作案的盗猎者！你们又狩猎我的暝彩鸟！
- *sigh* I miss the days when we had no such cares. When times got busy, we would be busy together. When we were free, we would watch the flowers together... ｜ 唉，真怀念我们以前无忧无虑，忙时一起奔波，闲时观景赏花的日子啊…
- So each time a sin rears its ugly head, it needs to be nipped in the bud. Now, quickly, go check up on Nimrod for me. ｜ 所以，要将每一份刚冒头的「罪孽」掐断，好了，你快点去看看宁禄的情况吧。
- "Especially those Fatui loansharks! Now they'll get what's coming to them, hah!" ｜ 「尤其是『愚人众』的那群高利贷商，也该让他们吃吃教训了！」
- I get homesick once in a while, too, so I completely relate to all the international merchants on Ritou. I try to look out for them as much as I can. The difference between us is that they see themselves as just passing by, and have no intention of trying to integrate here. And because that's how they think, it becomes their reality. The majority of Inazumans will never see them as anything more than outsiders. ｜ 其实我也会有想老家的时候，所以，我特别能理解离岛上那些外国商人，也想尽量多关照关照。不同的是，他们只把自己当作一个过客，并不想融入稻妻，因此也就只是过客了。大多数稻妻人不会把他们当自己人。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the battle begins:</color> Your leftmost character gains +3 ATK, and your rightmost character gains +12 HP. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>战斗开始时：</color>我方最左侧角色+3攻击，最右侧角色+12生命值。
- Record of Lamb-Devourer Rock ｜ 吞羊岩的记录
- Impeccable, you say? ｜ 来得正好？
- I've found a nice spot for the setting. Let's get going then. ｜ 取景地我已经选好了，我们赶紧出发吧。
- Um, could you also say something nice to Klee? ｜ 再夸夸可莉好吗？
- Defeat enemies or obtain Electro particles to extend the challenge time remaining. ｜ 获取雷微粒或击败敌人以延长时间
- For as long as Sayu can remember, she has been studying ninjutsu with her sensei in the Shuumatsuban.\nAlthough the Shuumatsuban is a clandestine organization, the elders are very kind and have taken good care of young Sayu.\n"Being overly reliant on others is never a good thing for a ninja."\nAfter Sayu had reached a bottleneck in learning ninjutsu, her sensei observed her situation and thought thusly.\nAs the years passed, Sayu grew steadily. Once she was capable enough to defend herself, her sensei chose to leave quietly.\nA young animal that leaves the protection of its parents will grow up rapidly. The same is true of the sensei's expectations for Sayu.\nThe young ninja did not disappoint her sensei. Soon after, Sayu obtained a Vision.\nAnd then, she started working diligently in the Shuumatsuban... diligently shirking her duties.\nSayu is always busy sleeping and hiding from people, so in that sense, she also has a lot to do.\nOccasionally, when Sayu is free and alone to enjoy the moonlight, she feels lost deep inside.\nThe people who have always been with you will one day leave...is this how life is meant to be?\nBut perhaps someday in the future, I will also meet the person who will always be with me.\nPondering the matter, the little ninja fell asleep again... ｜ 自记事起，早柚就已经在「终末番」里跟着老师学习忍术了。\n「终末番」虽是个活跃于暗处的组织，长辈们却都十分和蔼，很是照顾年幼的早柚。\n「过度依赖他人，对忍者来说可不是什么好事。」\n早柚学习忍术陷入瓶颈后，老师观察着她的情况暗暗想道。\n岁月如梭，早柚稳步成长着。等到她的能力足够自保时，老师选择了悄然离开。\n离开父母庇护的幼兽会飞速成长。老师对早柚的期待亦是如此。\n年轻忍者没有辜负老师的心愿。不久之后，早柚便拥有了「神之眼」。\n跟着，她就在「终末番」里兢兢业业地…偷懒。\n早柚忙着睡觉，忙着躲人，从这个角度来说，她也有许多事要做。\n偶尔空闲下来，独自一人享受月光时，内心深处会有一些迷茫。\n一直陪伴着自己的人，终有一日会离开…人生难道注定如此吗？\n不过，或许在未来某一天，我也会遇到一直与我相伴的人吧。\n想着想着，小小的忍者便又睡去了…

- This breeze... so refreshing! ｜ 真舒服呀…

- For the Love of Godwin ｜ 过量的思念

- The price is also the same as always! One for three hundred Mora, or three for a thousand. ｜ 价格也跟平常一样，一条三百摩拉，三条一千摩拉。
- The idea was that the air bubbles you see during fermentation carry away the angel's share when they float off into the wind. ｜ 也就是酿酒时，被空气带走的一部分。
- Hmm... Well, that's good news, but somehow doesn't paint Paimon in the best light... ｜ 怎么感觉像我一样不是什么好话呢。
- Hmm... While I can't help you with the invitation letter, I might just have a way of helping you to stay on board legitimately. ｜ 唔，虽然我不能给您找到邀请函，但我有个能让您合理待在船上的办法。
- Ready to spar with me? ｜ 准备好和我比试了吗？

- We're here to ask you to turn back. ｜ 我们是来劝你回去的。
- Super Deluxe or bust. ｜ 没有豪华版就算了。

- Enemy Reinforcements Incoming! ｜ 敌人增援到来！
- Thanks, but Paimon and I are fine as we are. ｜ 派蒙跟我都这样就好。
- He also mentioned that if I wanted to do some experiments, the most suitable place would be the low-temperature environment on Dragonspine. ｜ 他还说，如果想要实验的话，旁边雪山上的低温环境就很合适。
- "Love Is a Rebellious Bird That None Can Tame" ｜ 「爱是难驯鸟，哀乞亦无用。」
- Worry not. One has prepared a variety of meat and vegetable dishes. One is more than familiar with everyone's culinary proclivities. ｜ 放心，正经菜肴，荤素都有，本仙还能不知道你们爱吃什么？
- Tiny Miracle ｜ 奇迹
- Um... My Lady? ｜ 呃…芙宁娜大人？
- Which brings us to our current predicament... Hehe, my tomato was sure to win until a certain someone decided they couldn't bear to lose. ｜ 结果，呵呵，本来我稳操胜券，没想到有人输不起。
- Besides, for us Pari, to exhaust our strength in the final stand against evil is already the best ending one can dream of. I see no necessity to change anything. ｜ 况且对于吾辈花灵而言，耗尽心力而与邪恶的力量战斗到最后，本来就是最好的归宿了，何必要画蛇添足。

- A tooth that fell from a Natlan Saurian.\nIt looks like it belonged to a juvenile creature. If there was a way to determine the age of its previous owner, perhaps it would show that they had not yet roamed the world for long. ｜ 纳塔龙众脱落的牙。\n尚显稚嫩的牙齿，如果有从牙齿判断主人年龄的方式的话，或许就能看出这枚牙齿的主人并未在世上经历太久的岁月。
- Oh, Koolau's back!? Wait for me! ｜ 是那个科奥劳？等等我！
- "The author is from Mondstadt."\n"He's an outstanding novelist as well as an ingenious poet."\n"We've made a deal with him that he'll come to us first if he wishes to publish his poetry collection." ｜ 「这是一位来自蒙德的老师喔。」\n「不仅小说写得很好，而且诗写得更不错。」\n「我们和这位老师约好了，如果他之后想要出版诗集的话，会优先找我们合作呢。」
- In that case, I'm in favor of more space. Spacious rooms are more conducive to relaxation, anyway. ｜ 确实是这样。那样我还是喜欢大房间的，看起来宽敞，让人心情愉悦。
- I believe that this "freedom to choose" is what Lord Barbatos would have wished for us to have... ｜ 我认为，这种「选择的自由」正是巴巴托斯大人所期望的…
- Oh, it's nothing out of the ordinary. Simply put, it's where those princesses of past kingdoms searched for the "answer." ｜ 没什么特别啦。简单来说，就是之前那些王国的公主们寻求「答案」的地方。
- Windfall ｜ 顺风而行
- Caravan Ribat is crawling with people, so be careful what you say. We don't want anyone to find out what we're here for. ｜ 喀万驿附近人员流动量很大，谨慎发言，别让人发现我们的目的。
- Oh my! I hope it doesn't sound like I'm kicking him while he's down. Well, for the sake of my reputation, let's keep that between us for now. ｜ 哎呀，我这么说是不是显得有些落井下石的意思？唔，为了我自己的风评，现在还是保留意见好了。
- ...an epic fight. Legendary. The skies went black, there were howling winds and waves as high as houses. So the vile demon struck again, this time with all his might... but the adeptus just managed to dodge it! It was a powerful hit indeed; landed square on Mt. Tianheng! Boom! ｜ …只打得是昏天黑地，风鸣海啸。那魔神又是一拳，仙人将将躲过，可劲道却不偏不倚地轰在了「天衡山」上…
- Sweet cake... ｜ 甜甜的蛋糕…
- "This is amazing... Playing these games reminds me of learning new dance steps. I think I've found my rhythm!"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Nilou" starts with the Talent Card "The Starry Skies Their Flowers Rain" equipped.</color> ｜ 「好厉害…打牌这种游戏，有点像练习第一次接触的舞步，我好像找到自己的节奏了！」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「妮露」初始装备有天赋牌「星天的花雨」。</color>
- Don't worry about it! There've been no issues getting up and down the mountain recently. ｜ 没关系没关系，最近上下山都很顺利哦。

- Defeat opponents within 3s of triggering a Melt reaction on them ｜ 对敌人触发融化反应后的3秒内将其击败

- Sacrifice myself? Of course not. My focus was on keeping the Mountain King alive, not on what it would cost. ｜ 准备牺牲？当然没有。我只是认为山王不能死，代价另说。
- Now, we'll have to account for everyone's tastes when picking the snacks and drinks, so we'll probably need to get a good amount of everything... Hmm, let's definitely load up on Saurus Crackers. They're our local specialty, after all... ｜ 考虑到大家的口味不同，点心和饮料得多准备几个种类…龙龙饼干还是多备一些吧，纳塔特色嘛…
- I can see a whole load of treasure chests with no monsters guarding them! ｜ 还有好多宝箱，而且没有魔物看守！
- If I were Raimondo, I wouldn't let Edwin Eastinghouse himself be idle and outside the Institute. ｜ 如果我是雷蒙多，一定不会让艾德温·伊斯丁豪斯在科学院外游手好闲。

- So don't worry, Nanako. Sensei is going to be just fine. ｜ 所以放心吧师妹，师父他一定不会有事的。
- And those Skeptics are all too happy to go along with her, huh? ｜ 真亏矫论团那些人还陪她一块儿演呢！

- Every moment of the summer festival is a moving tale. Those who meet under the light of fireworks grow up, mature, and grow old. When they set off the same fireworks as they did in the beginning, the skies reflect that same image from years ago... Fireworks are not eternal, but I believe that the wonderful emotions behind them should walk alongside Inazuma into eternity. ｜ 夏日祭上每时每刻都在诞生动人的故事，在烟花下相识相知的人们慢慢成长，成熟，最终老去。当他们放起如初的烟花，天空中倒映出的依然是他们如初的模样…烟花不是永恒的，但藏在烟花背后的美妙情感，我觉得应该和稻妻一起走向永恒。
- Sea of Clouds ｜ 云来海

- Obtained from "Springtime Charms" ｜ 「春曦画桃符」活动获得
- In the past, a certain Mr. Mo once created the world-renowned Forest Scroll using animals such as crows, kitsune, frogs and tanuki. Lately, I have been thinking of creating a similar work of art, using Ruin machines as a theme. While my brother was {0}, he once saw Ruin machines that looked like... insects. I believe an ecosystem may exist among those machines. What do you think? ｜ 过去，磨先生曾经以鸦、狐、蛙、狸等动物，创作了名震朝野的《林野戏画》。最近我在想，或许也能以遗迹机械为主体，画出同样的作品吧。家兄{0}时，曾经见到过长得像…昆虫的遗迹机械。我觉得它们当中，或许也存在生态吧。不知各位觉得如何？

- I've lived around Eremites my whole life. As a little girl, I had a wooden sword for a toy. Everyone I knew growing up was either a merc or on their way to becoming one, and even the bowls we ate our meals from were carved by mercenary blades... After an upbringing like that, it'd be more surprising if I didn't become a merc when I grew up, right? ｜ 我自小就在佣兵团里生活，玩具是木刀木剑，认识的人要么是佣兵，要么准备做佣兵，就连吃饭的木碗都是团里的人拿刀削出来的木碗。在这种环境下长大，要是我不做佣兵反而有点奇怪，对吧？

- The redhead whistles, and two men leap out from a hidden spot in the woods. ｜ 红发青年吹了一声口哨，从树林的隐蔽处跃出两个青年…

- Let's go and question them. ｜ 我们再过去问问吧。
- Having decided to stop by Sumeru, the Wanderer took some time off to visit Treasures Street and learn how to make toys from some of the merchants there.\nIn a corner of the bustling street, a kind-hearted old fellow with hair as white as snow invited him to sit by his side, teaching him how to use cloth and thread to sew that which he wanted to make step by step.\nThe Wanderer spent much time practicing, doing this thing that did not agree with his personality. Strange, perhaps, but he did not hate it.\nHe had done such things with great patience in times past, after all, learning things such as holding cutlery, wearing clothes, combing his hair...\nYes, he had learned to be a "human" from the little things up.\nA few days later, his great work was complete — a little man with white clothes and black hair, a waistband tied using a butterfly knot, and a clear, round tear at the corner of his eye.\nIndeed, back then, there was a young fellow who had made this doll in imitation of the Wanderer's past appearance. Shame, then, that he had burned both the doll and his old home to ashes when he left Inazuma.\nMany years later, he would make one as well, and oh, how familiar that felt!\nSmall and soft as it was, it was akin to a defenseless babe. It took up little space in his sleeves, and if he kept it in his hat, it felt like having a travel companion.\n"From today, you shall wander together with me."\nHe said softly, placing it in his pocket. ｜ 决定停留在须弥之后，流浪者抽空去了趟宝商街，向那里的商贩打听如何制作玩偶。\n繁华街市一角，一个头发花白的好心老人招手邀请他坐到身旁，从头开始一点一点教会他怎么用布和线缝制他想要的东西。\n流浪者花了不少时间练习，做着这与他个性全然不符的事。虽然有些奇怪，但他不讨厌这种感觉。\n许久之前，他经常像这样耐心地学习各种事，比如拿餐具、穿衣服、梳理头发…\n从小细节开始，一点一点地成为「人」。\n几天后，他完成了那件作品——白色衣服黑色头发的小人，腰上系着带小小蝴蝶结的腰带，眼角还挂着一颗滑稽的圆圆泪珠。\n从前，一位年幼的朋友依照流浪者过去的模样做出这个小玩偶。可惜他离开稻妻前亲手将玩偶和旧屋一同烧得精光。\n多年以后，他自己也缝了一只，握在手里倍感亲切。\n小小的，很柔软，简直就是一个不设防的儿童。藏进袖子也不占多少地方，放在帽子里则像是多了一位旅伴。\n「以后你就跟着我流浪了。」\n他小声说着，一边把它好好地放进衣兜。

- Specialized refinement material for "Dodoco Tales."\nPages scattered on the wind. Each one is filled to the brim with childlike wonder, and their dimensions are an exact match for "Dodoco Tales." The abundant innocence and pure love therein will never fade, and just like the never-ending adventure in the book — this passionate fairy tale shall forever soar in the wake of the author's footsteps. ｜ 「嘟嘟可故事集」专用的精炼道具。\n随风散落的断篇，每一页上都写满童趣之事，而尺寸恰好与《嘟嘟可故事集》完美相合。其间满溢的童心与纯真的爱永不褪色，就像书中永无完结的大冒险一样，热忱的童话永远随着其作者的脚步飞扬。

- There was this one fellow who invited me to perform at his place, back when there weren't many who would give my music the time of day. I was touched, let me tell you what. Like, hey, someone gets it! I agreed right away... But when I got there, I found out that he was the consultant at the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. What a weird guy. I mean, how was that appropriate? ｜ 以前没什么人听我的摇滚，有一天他突然来邀请我，说可以去他那里试试，合适的话可以去当驻唱歌手，我心里激动啊，终于有人理解我的音乐了！就直接答应了下来。结果去了场地才知道，他居然是那个「往生堂」的客卿…这明显不合适啊，真是个怪人。

- She was once our Name Engraver, and did a lot for the tribe. It's only fair that I offer her a discount. ｜ 她之前可是咱们部族的铸名师，为部族出了不少力。我给她打点折，理所应当。
- My name is Lyney. I've been wandering since I was little, and picked up a few less than legal tricks along the way. I was adopted by a Marechaussee Hunter and, later, chose to follow in his footsteps. ｜ 我叫林尼，自小在外流浪，懂一些不上台面的小把戏。后来被一位逐影猎人收作养子，这才继承他的衣钵，成为了一名逐影猎人。

- The Withering is not a fixed location. Instead, it refers to areas that have been corroded by some sort of mysterious and ominous power. In these areas, characters will accumulate Decay. The speed of this accumulation will differ depending on the Withering Zone you're in. ｜ 「死域」并不是具体的固定场所，而是一些地方被这种神秘的不祥力量侵蚀后变成的区域。在死域中，角色将会持续积累「凋零」。依据死域的不同，积累的速度也有所区别。

- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！

- At the start of the first round, you gain an additional 4 Omni Element Dice.\nAfter an opponent's character is defeated or one of your characters uses an Elemental Burst: Gain 3 Omni Element Dice, and draw 1 card, and you will be able to act again after the current action is completed.\nSpecial defeat condition: If you have not defeated all of your opponents' characters by the end of the first round, you lose the duel. ｜ 第一回合开始时，我方获得4个额外的万能元素。\n敌方角色被击倒或我方角色使用「元素爆发」后：生成3个万能元素，抓1张牌，并且本次行动结束后我方可以再连续行动一次。\n特殊失败条件：第一回合结束时如果你未能击倒所有敌人，则你输掉对局。
- Something to Share ｜ 有什么想要分享…

- Safe travels! ｜ 祝你一路平安！
- All animals need to eat. ｜ 动物是需要进食的。
- Amidst everyone's laughter and applause, Paimon clumsily lights the incense... ｜ 在众人热烈的赞叹与掌声中，派蒙晕晕乎乎地点上了熏香…
- Nope... It's nothing, ma'am. ｜ 没、没有。
- Ugh, Kaeya's back to his usual ways. ｜ 唉，凯亚这家伙，又在不正经了。
- (What was all that just now? Strange... It feels like I was just dreaming for a moment there, but I can't remember what I saw...) ｜ （奇怪，刚才是怎么回事？好像一瞬间做了个梦，但内容却记不清了…）
- Sure, but you should wait until tomorrow. My subordinates will shut down the center today, and summon the students to gather information on the total amount of Mora they've lost in the scam. ｜ 可以，不过要等到明天。今天我会派人去查封培训机构，并且召集学生们询问受骗金额。
- *coughing* Just don't break it, okay? I'll even buy it back from ya when you're done with it! ｜ 咳咳…别给我弄坏了，等你不用了，我原价收回！
- You can't be serious... ｜ 难道你…
- It's not every day we come to Natlan on business, so some mementos are a must. ｜ 好不容易来纳塔出一趟公差，肯定要带一点纪念品回去。
- In that case, how about we reply like this: ｜ 既然这样，不如这么回复吧…
- (Is this something that I didn't prepare for at all!? You've gotta be joking!) ｜ （难道是我完全没有准备到的内容？不会吧？！）
- (Maybe I don't need to sacrifice myself, but surely everyone is born for a purpose... So what's mine?) ｜ （我不觉得我必须得牺牲，可人诞生总是有意义的吧。我在这里，能为别人带去什么呢？）
- Elemental or not, it's still dust — you should be able to blow it away easily enough with your Anemo abilities. ｜ 不过，既然是「灰尘」，用「风」应该就能轻松吹散吧。

- Please... begin. I am ready. ｜ 请…请说，我已经准备好了。
- Nothing. I suppose it really is dangerous inside. ｜ 没什么。这里面确实很危险。

- The Nagarjunites were a branch of the Akademiya from long ago. ｜ 那伽朱那团是很久以前教令院的一个旁支学派。
- I could tell they were not footsteps of a regular passenger, but by the time I turned around, the person had already disappeared. I only heard a splash come from below the pier. ｜ 那种脚步绝不是一般乘客，可我回过头时，那人已经不见了，只有栈桥下传来了「噗通」一声响。
- Not particularly, but this is still better than Fontaine Fashion Week. ｜ 还行，比枫丹时装周好。
- Let's head over there. Stay quiet as you move. ｜ 我们到那边去。手脚轻一点。
- Ask around in the area ｜ 在附近打听消息

- Did the Church send you to supervise my work? Don't tell me— let me guess... Was it Victoria? Barbara? Or Dahlia... ｜ 你是教会派来监督我工作的么？让我猜猜是谁的委托…维多利亚，芭芭拉，还是塔利雅…

- While some are here to redeem themselves, there will inevitably be those who harbor resentment towards me. ｜ 这里有诚心赎罪的人，但也肯定有对我心怀怨恨的人。
- What? You know what, I'm done letting you get off easy. Once our buyer gets here, you'll be the one begging for mercy from Lord Hideaki over here! ｜ 什么？可恶，我可是好心给你们提供生路，等买主到了，你们都得哭着来求我秀秋大爷的原谅！
- No, I don't think so. I doubt that's the case. Even if someone had a bottle that was never opened, the fragrance of the perfume would have changed over time. Very few perfumes can go decades without a change in scent... ｜ 不会的，即使不开封，香水的原香也会随时间改变。除了特制的陈化香水，很少能历经十数年而不变…
- Raimondo, nothing could go wrong here, right? ｜ 雷蒙多，这不会出什么问题的，对吧？
- It's not like it was alcohol... ｜ 喝的也不是酒…
- I might be still dreaming. ｜ 简直像在做梦。
- This design overturns centuries of Sumeru architectural tradition! The Dendro Archon would be devastated if she saw it. ｜ 这种设计，简直是要颠覆须弥几百年以来的传统呀！草神大人看到了都会伤心的！
- *sob*... *sob*... ｜ …呜…呜…
- Ambushing, huh? That's sticky business. ｜ 伏击，嗯，很厉害呢。
- *sigh* They're all just so evil... ｜ 唉，都是大坏蛋…
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像
- Hahaha, even a fool would learn a thing or two about food if they got to eat such delicacies every day. Let me teach you the correct way to taste this stewed fish... ｜ 哈哈哈，常吃如此美味，就算是我再笨也能吃出心得来，我再教你如何品这道炖鱼…
- A Lone Lantern ｜ 点萤孤灯汇明霄
- The bedazzling colors of flowers and the glow of crystal-clear pure Amrita are commonplace scenery, but profound meaning may yet be contained within them... ｜ 万千繁花的斑斓色彩，纯净甘露的凝明辉光，这寻常可见的景致，或许蕴藏着往常尚待探讨的深刻含义…
- Yes, in fact, we were just getting ready to leave. ｜ 对，其实我们现在正准备离开。
- A special pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Mm! ｜ 呶！

- Phonia ｜ 方妮雅
- Doesn't look much like a key to Paimon. Try looking somewhere else. ｜ 唔，好像不是钥匙呢，再去别的地方找找吧。
- Thank goodness! I'm counting on you then, Traveler! ｜ 那就拜托你了，旅行者。
- Kinich, you are one lucky devil. I don't know how the heck you're still alive. Pff. ｜ 小小基尼奇，你还真是命大福大，居然被你给撑过来了，呵。
- We plan on bringing that to an end. ｜ 这是接下来就会处理的事。
- You drink some Dango Milk with Gorou... ｜ 和五郎一起品尝了团子牛奶…
- Let's play Spino Blaster! ｜ 立即游玩「飞迸湍流大作战」！
- I thought that they, like those two other people, were here to explore and gather my blood. I was originally just happy to have people here, but they chose to fight each other in the end instead. ｜ 我本来以为，他们和那两个人一样，是来探险、来收集我的血液的。本来，我很高兴有人来了，最后他们却要互相战斗。
- Lunar Cycles Unending ｜ 晦朔千引
- ♪ Enter the chest just as you should ♪ ｜ ♪进宝箱来♪
- The Yashiro Commission has always been very supportive of Inazuma's floral arts. Indeed, the person who sponsored this event is the Shirasagi Himegimi. ｜ 社奉行一直支持着稻妻的花艺事业。准确来说，为这次活动出资的贵人，是那位白鹭公主。
- One of Liyue's traditional snacks. Take a bite while it's hot, and have your tastebuds savor the tender minced meat and delicious juice, an experience which is then topped off with a finishing touch of sweet prawn. Before your eyes, you can almost see a full moon over rippling waters, a fishing boat by the shore, and the fishermen's songs echoing down the years. ｜ 璃月的传统点心之一。趁热轻咬，弹嫩肉馅伴随着鲜美汁水正中味蕾的软肋，虾肉的回甘更似画龙点睛的一笔。眼前仿佛一轮明月，一汪秋水，渔船泊靠岸边，渔歌唱遍丰年。
- Nobuo ｜ 伸夫
- Death from falling into a bottomless pit ｜ 因坠入无底处死亡

- My question is: What's the name of that thing? ｜ 我的问题是，这种事物的名字是什么？

- What is it? Ningguang's back? ｜ 甘雨，是凝光回来了？

- Haha, the kids of my tribe would have a heart attack if they heard you say that... "Granny Itztli is a powerful figure. Be careful around her!" — that's what they'd say. ｜ 啊哈，烟谜主的小家伙们听见你说这话会吓死的。「黑曜石奶奶可是不得了的人物，请注意态度！」他们会这样说。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 击败所有魔物
- Good morning. A little sword practice while the day is young is good for the body and mind. I tend to avoid having anything scheduled during these hours... What do you say? Fancy crossing blades with me? ｜ 早上好。清晨适宜练剑，放松身心。我一般不会让人安排公务。如何？要过上几招么？
- A breathtaking sight... ｜ 风景真好…
- I will continue investigating no matter what. We will bring the truth to light. That's... my father's true last wish. ｜ 不论如何，我都会继续调查下去的。让真相大白…才是我父亲真正的「遗愿」。
- Hinterman ｜ 安特曼
- There's a train coming the other way, too! Heeeeeey! ｜ 对面也有列车开过来了！你们好呀！
- A model of a smart and capable hamster, vividly recreating their appearance as they scurry about carrying Bulle Fruit. Can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nHamsters have relatively short arms, and cannot lift objects the usual way. As such, they have developed special techniques to carry these objects on their heads. However, these techniques have raised the model's center of gravity, making stability somewhat of an issue. As such, a light touch is required when setting it up to prevent it from tipping over and being damaged. ｜ 伶俐能干的胖胖鼠模型，生动地还原了胖胖鼠们在搬运泡泡桔时的风貌，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n胖胖鼠们因双手较短小，无法用常规方式举起物品，故而采取了独特的头顶搬运技巧。但这种技巧使得模型的重心过高，平衡难度较大。因此，在摆放这个模型时，需要确保轻拿轻放，以避免倾倒与损伤。

- Investigate the footprints on the shore ｜ 调查岸边的脚印

- Did you deliver my letter? ｜ 信送到了吗？
- Yes. I hope that part of history is one that never repeats itself. ｜ 是的，希望那段历史永远不再重演。
- He must have been trying to make the other animals stronger. ｜ 是想要带着其他小动物变强吧。
- Ajaw ｜ 阿乔
- Xiangling's outfit. The red coat glows like a stove amidst cold winds, topped with a hat that, at Hu Tao's suggestion, took inspiration from Guoba's appearance — a design that's right up Xiangling's alley. ｜ 香菱的装扮款式。冷风中的一抹红色灶火，帽子在胡桃提议下根据锅巴的形象特别设计而成，很受香菱喜爱。
- One-Way Traffic ｜ 绝对单行线
- Here's the problem: Yae Publishing House's annual novel-writing competition is about to begin, and as is our rule, we plan to invite a few of our writers to serve on the judging panel. ｜ 是这样，「八重堂」一年一度的小说比赛就快要开始了，按照惯例，我们打算邀请几位作家老师来当评委。
- Sometimes I wonder, if the Aranara have their own day, why do we Pari possess nothing of equivalence? When I asked my elder, she seemed hollow of interest regarding the matter. ｜ 有时我想，既然兰那罗都有自己的节日，为什么花灵不能有自己的节日呢？同前辈提起这件事，她却不怎么感兴趣的样子…
- It appears to want... some sort of meat? But I'm not sure what, exactly, so could you please check the handbook? ｜ 似乎是…某种肉类吧？不过我不太确定，查查我的手册看看吧？
- Wayta ｜ 瓦伊妲
- The artwork in the manor? It's not mine. It's a collection that belonged to my late father. ｜ 庄园里的那些艺术品？那不是我的。是先父有收集的爱好。
- Go to Devantaka Mountain ｜ 前往降诸魔山
- No need for formalities. I, too, feel humbled to be in the company of such talented young people. There are many things I could learn from you. ｜ 哪里。各位都是青年才俊，各有所长，我也有自愧不如的地方，理应与大家互相学习。
- My older brother's sword. If I find it, I can finally give him a proper burial... ｜ 是我大哥的那把剑，找到的话，就能好好把他下葬了…
- Okay! Here's your Grilled Tiger Fish. What do you think? ｜ 好了，这是你们点的「烤吃虎鱼」，吃吃看味道怎么样？
- Back then, life was much harder than it is now. Poverty, disease, ignorance... They tormented us constantly. ｜ 那时候，生活比现在要艰苦多了。贫穷、疾病、愚昧…时刻困扰着我们。
- Mika? Who's that? ｜ 米卡？那是谁？
- One mustn't be a bad owner. When you get tired, it would be best if the cat is tired enough for a cat nap as well. ｜ 不能当个坏主人，自己累了，还要让猫猫一起累。

- I've been hoping to film a perfect swashbuckler film, and now I finally realized this dream. ｜ 一直以来，我都想拍一部完整的「剑阵映影」，现在我终于完成了这个梦想。

- You can keep treating that cat just as you did before, of course. ｜ 你之前怎么和那只猫相处，以后也怎么和那只猫相处。
- Would you mind coming with me to buy a copy of today's newspaper? ｜ 若你方便，可以陪我去买一份今天的报纸吗？

- And they reinforce the wood like it's for building a storm shelter or something... Way overestimating their own strength. ｜ 而且还用各种手段加固木桩，就像生怕自己能轻松击碎一样…
- Are there any strong opponents...? ｜ 有没有硬骨头的对手…
- But she doesn't look sick at all. Why, I'd wager that she's got more energy than I do. What happened, I wonder? ｜ 但是她这幅样子，哪里像是生病的，简直比我还有活力。到底发生了什么…
- During the repairs, I added what Agent Curve said to Sir Arthur's voice library as a memento. ｜ 维修它的时候，我将曲线探员的话，设置进了亚瑟先生的语音库，也想以此为纪念。
- Of course! However... Hehe, new inspiration means... that I'll need your help once more. ｜ 当然，不过…呃，嘿嘿，新的灵感就意味着…我又要找你们求助了。
- But for a festival gathering with friends, a nighttime stroll, or an important banquet... your outfit is more than appropriate, Shenhe. ｜ 如果申鹤是像今天这样，和朋友们一起享受海灯节，或是观赏夜景、参加重要宴会…就非常合适哦。

- Is for us to support one another. ｜ 是互相搀扶啊。

### Part 002

- Why was the "Research Log from the Office of Forensic Science" blank, and where did the white powder come from? ｜ 「法医室的研究日志」为什么一片空白，以及毒药「白霜」究竟是哪里来的。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- I... Uh, never mind that first. ｜ 我是在…呃…先不说这个…
- The insipid, the absurd, the shocking and the sorrowful... So long as you visit enough times, you will be able to experience all this at the Opera Epiclese. ｜ 平淡、荒谬、惊喜与悲伤…只要您造访的次数足够多，这些都是您能在欧庇克莱歌剧院体验到的经历。
- Charged Attack DMG Bonus|{param5:F1P} Max HP ｜ 重击伤害提升|{param5:F1P}生命值上限
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- You tell Sayu that she needs enough nutrition to grow tall. She follows you enthusiastically to Inazuma City... ｜ 你告诉早柚想要长高的话需要补充足够的能量，于是她兴冲冲地和你前往稻妻城…
- It seems like the monsters nearby have become way more active, and they don't look the same either... ｜ 这附近的魔物好像活跃了许多，和平常的样子也有些不一样…
- A friend of ours met you a while back, and when she mentioned it, we thought of coming to see you. Her name's Mona! ｜ 我们有个朋友刚和你见过面，听她提起，就想来看看你工作的样子。她叫莫娜。
- You know me? ｜ 你认识我？
- Considering their recent penchant for going off on... private escapades, however, I find myself caring little for how they shall receive this news, hmph. ｜ 不过他们经常背着我出去玩，看不看想必是无所谓的，哼。
- Monsters again? Sheesh, is it just me, or does it feel like every cart in the world is being attacked by monsters... ｜ 又是魔物？我怎么感觉全世界的货车都很容易被魔物袭击…
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- Then I'd find a helper favored by the Seelie. ｜ 这个时候，我一般就会找个能让仙灵看顺眼的帮手合作。
- A "sanctum"? ｜ 「圣地」？
- Defeat Booming Bathysmal Vishap Herd: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败「深海龙蜥之群·轰旋」：#1#/%1%
- Every journey has its final day. Don't rush. ｜ 旅程总有一天会迎来终点，不必匆忙。

- A shard of concentrated violet lightning, fizzing with strange Electro energy. Can be exchanged for precious treasures during the "Thunder Sojourn" event. ｜ 凝结着苍紫雷光的碎片，充满奇异的雷元素力量。在「谒索雷痕」期间，可以换取珍贵的宝物。
- Unlock all Teleport Waypoints in The Chasm and its Underground Mines. ｜ 解锁层岩巨渊和巨渊矿坑的所有传送锚点。
- Starstep ｜ 星步疾行
- Aha, over there! I bet we'll find some people there. Let's go take a look! ｜ 哦哦，那边似乎有些人烟了，我们快去看看吧！
- If only we had some <i><color=#00E2FFFF>meat</color></i> on hand... ｜ 要是有<i><color=#00E2FFFF>肉</color></i>的话…
- She told me that she was going to find her brother. I thought she lost her mind having stayed in the environment down here... There's no way that her brother could live. ｜ 她和我说一定要找到弟弟才行，我以为是下面的环境搞坏了她的脑子才让她那样子出丑…她的弟弟不可能活下来了。
- This person... might be closer than you think. ｜ 这个嘛…远在天边，近在眼前。
- Hold on, is it still warm? Oh, that does smell good... Mmm... ｜ 等等，已经熟了？香倒是挺香的…嗯…
- No, it's nothing. This is the first time we've ever met, but your name seemed familiar to me. I must have heard it when I was discussing things with your husband previously. ｜ 没什么，虽然我们是第一次见，您的名字有点耳熟，哈哈哈，大概是上回和您先生谈事情的时候听说过您。
- What's with the sneakiness... ｜ 怎么搞得这么神神秘秘的…
- I understand. ｜ 可以理解。
- Same as usual. My schedule normally isn't too packed, so I have plenty of time for myself. ｜ 还好，我的工作没有那么密集，有许多私人时间。
- You may leave the rest to me. I've prepared something that can aid you in suppressing the fear in your heart and restoring your lost memories. It currently resides at Mt. Aocang. ｜ 有我在，不会有什么问题。我已经提前在奥藏山准备了一件宝物，可以压制你内心的恐惧，帮你找回过去的记忆。

- Scenic Tour: Dawn Winery ｜ 遍观巡景·晨曦酒庄
- Pretty scary indeed. ｜ 好凶恶…

- It barely needs stating anymore. Your ambition is a flight of fancy. ｜ 已经不必多说了吧——你的愿望只是一厢情愿。
- See you later. ｜ 再见。
- Another image has appeared! This one is... a map! ｜ 新的织物出现了！这是…一张地图！
- That seems mighty irresponsible of you. Aren't you just giving your heroes blind confidence like that? ｜ 你这样有些不负责任啊。你这样只是让他们盲目自信而已。
- Eroded Sunfire ｜ 蚀灭的阳焰
- Why would it be him? How strange... ｜ 为什么会是他呢？好奇怪啊…
- We Eremites don't lie, kiddo. ｜ 镀金旅团成员说的话，绝对不作假。
- Owner's Reply ｜ 店主回复
- Hehe, ah, what a shame... ｜ 哼哼，真可惜呢…
- Well, Parvaneh is out tracking down more ingredients for the "ultimate seasoning" that she wanted to make. ｜ 她们啊，芭尔瓦涅说还想要继续寻找其他的食材，去做她想要的那种「万能调料」。
- That makes sense... ｜ 原来是这样…
- Adults always have things to do. ｜ 大人总是有很多事要忙的。
- "And thank you. I do know that Dragonspine is very dangerous... and I know my limits as well. But I must go." ｜ 「谢谢，我知道雪山危险，也有自知之明…但我还是想去雪山。」
- Hah, it's been a long time since I spoke so much. How exhausting... ｜ 这么长时间以来，这还是我头一次说这么多话。真是累人…
- Myweiss ｜ 梅薇丝
- A Single Harmony for an Irreplaceable Soul ｜ 一曲瑶琴与谁听
- Talk to Arapandu ｜ 与兰般度对话
- Lots of guests from Mondstadt have made their way over recently, and they always come here to buy wine, so our sales of Mondstadt wines have also been on the up and up. ｜ 因为最近来了许多蒙德的客人，他们每天都会到这里买酒，所以蒙德酒的销量也提升了。
- The Aranara plant the dried flowers. With the ballad echoing in the wind, the flowers come back to life magically... ｜ 兰那罗们种下干瘪的花朵，随着歌谣在风中回荡，花朵奇迹般地重返了新生…
- That's All, Folks ｜ 谢幕

- Character Talent Material ｜ 角色天赋素材
- Probably. Although Fungi are simple creatures, they're very sensitive to elemental power. ｜ 应该是吧，蕈兽虽然思维比较简单，但对元素力更加敏感。
- Or could it be... that you've worked together before? ｜ 瑞希和希诺宁站在同一阵线了？
- Uh... I'm... not very good at making conversation. ｜ 唔，我可能…不太擅长和人聊天。
- *sigh* I was halfway through working on my props when I realized that the stage needs maintenance again, and that we need to finish those safety checks before the next performance lest we put our actors at risk. ｜ 唉，道具做到一半，想起来又该做场地维护了，得在演出开始前检查完成才行，不然演员可能会有危险。
- (The Auguste flower... a mysterious species.) ｜ （奥古斯都花…神秘的植物。）
- Release ｜ 放生
- Erm... the Pyro Archon? ｜ 呃…火神？
- Report back to Neko ｜ 向寝子回报
- During the Surfpiercer Challenge, your Waverider will <color=#FFE14BFF>gather a certain amount of Piercer's Drive</color>. Once this charging process is complete, you can activate a more powerful Surfpiercer's Surge. This ability <color=#FFE14BFF>can have a maximum of 3 stacks</color>. ｜ 在「逸速穿浪」挑战中，驾驶浪船<color=#FFE14BFF>收集一定的「破浪能量」</color>，完成充能后，可以进行更为迅猛的「破浪冲刺」。「破浪冲刺」<color=#FFE14BFF>最多可以积攒三次</color>。
- Cryo RES Decrease|{param5:P} ｜ 冰元素抗性降低|{param5:P}
- "My husband seems to be friends with the man with long ears. I couldn't really join their conversation, so I've resigned myself to sitting in a corner and drawing in my notebook." ｜ 「我的丈夫似乎和那个长耳朵的男人是朋友。我没办法加入他们的聊天。只能坐在一旁画画。」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Some baby vishaps were rescued before we got there. But the old and weak vishaps went back in the water to hide after we defeated the elites. ｜ 有一些年幼的龙蜥已经被救走了。但是老弱的龙蜥在我们打败精英之后，躲回了水里。
- Don't mind if I do! ｜ 那我就不客气了！
- Furnishing Set Blueprint ｜ 摆设套装图纸
- Well, still alive in spite of everything. How are you doing? ｜ 不怎么样，至少还活着。你呢？
- #Paimon... you said Sanctuary of Surasthana, correct? Does this mean that this "Nahida" you're talking about, the consciousness who was occupying {NICKNAME}'s body... is... the Dendro Archon? ｜ #派蒙刚刚提到了「净善宫」？你们口中的纳西妲，也就是之前{NICKNAME}体内的意识…莫非是草神大人？
- Let's just hope the bags didn't fly too far out... ｜ 希望那些袋子别飞太远…
- If he's still alive... ｜ 如果他还活着的话…
- I haven't played with Narana for a long time. Many suns have risen and set, and many moons have appeared in the sky. Many fruits grew, then returned to the land. ｜ 已经好久好久没有和那菈拉娜一起玩过了。好多太阳升起又落下，然后月亮出现在天上。好多果实长出来，又回到地里。
- Don't Get Crabby ｜ 有蟹有还
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Not only is the taste magnificent, but you've also made sure it was healthy. You have my gratitude. ｜ 不仅味道好，还兼顾了健康。让你费心了。
- Don't be too long. ｜ 那要快点喔。
- The markings on this seal... If my archaeological knowledge is not mistaken, this appears to be a <color=#00E1FFFF>light actuator</color>. ｜ 这封印的样式…按我所知的考古学知识，应该是<color=#00E1FFFF>「导光机关」</color>吧。

- This will fall through one day, I know. ｜ 总有一天会被拆穿的吧。
- The same beauty is found in all forms of art. Whether it's a dance or a gemstone, you use the same pair of eyes to admire it, right? ｜ 艺术的美都是相通的，不管是对于舞蹈还是珠宝，你都有一双发现美的眼睛。没错吧？
- I'm lucky adventuring helps keep me in shape. ｜ 还好我一直在冒险中健身。
- ...Huh... ｜ 唔…
- This is only part of her list. There are some items that are not on sale here. I've already asked the store owner to purchase them. ｜ 这只是一部分，还有一些尚未摆在这里贩卖的，我已经托店主去购置了。
- Uh... Um, that was... blunt of you. ｜ 还、还真是不留情面…
- So where's the ward, then...? ｜ 不过，对应的镇物在哪儿呢…
- Discarded ｜ 废弃
- You can only find such husks deep in the desert where the Quicksand Eels breed. The hardened shell is meant to protect the Quicksand Eels' larval bodies until they finally acclimate to the conditions of the dry desert. ｜ 在沙漠深处流沙鳗鳗的繁殖地才能找到的枯壳。其坚硬的表壳是为了保护流沙鳗鳗的幼体，直到它们得以适应炎热干燥的沙漠环境而存在的。
- Guhua Style ｜ 古华剑法
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Please forgive a six-year-old child for concocting some lies to protect himself after watching his mother die right in front of him. ｜ 母亲在眼前死去，足以让一位六岁的孩子学会用谎言保护自己。
- *sigh* Hungry. ｜ 啊…饿了。
- Follow {param0} Seelie in Liffey Region and Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering Region to their Seelie Courts. ｜ 在黎翡区、枫丹动能工程科学研究院区追随{param0}个仙灵，并点亮仙灵之庭。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "In a Harmonious Atmosphere." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「清潭镜澄」。
- But Dadda, he really is a good guy, and he tells great stowies! ｜ 把拔，那个蜀黍会给窝讲故事，真的是好嫩！
- The reason we argued about who was right was that we didn't know enough about the truth of the past. But now we have the truth, so we just have to accept it. ｜ 我们争吵的原因是对于过往的真实知之甚少。现在我们拥有了真实，就应该接受这个事实。
- I see... ｜ 这样吗…
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param10:P}/{param11:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param10:P}/{param11:P}
- Seems like being a funeral home director really suits you. ｜ 感觉你很适合当堂主。
- He poured everything into his street performances and his stupid tours like it was just a hobby to him, never bothering to think about Mora. What sort of fool devotes their life to the art of deception and never has a Mora to show for it? ｜ 他沉浸在街头魔术里，搞什么「巡回演出」，从来没想过挣钱的事情。魔术就是骗术，骗不到钱有什么意义？
- In the past... whenever I heard the sound of those tunes, I always felt that they were worlds apart from me. ｜ 过去每每听到这些旋律，总觉得它们离我很远。
- Wha—!? To think you'd do such a thing... So there's no treasure at all, it was just you guys all along! ｜ 啊——！竟然做出这种事…根本没有什么宝藏，就是你们这些家伙干的啊！
- Tengu Juurai: Ambush ｜ 天狗咒雷·伏
- Whoa... ｜ 哇…
- "...We've been entrusted with looking after the lad named Chouji. Uncle Onitaka told us to take care of him before setting sail..." ｜ 「…那个叫长次的男娃娃，多少算是一个托付吧，鬼隆大叔起航前交待我们照顾好他…」
- You just need to mix these <color=#00E1FFFF>two portions of coffee</color> together — and if Officer Menthe comes along, pair it with a cake. ｜ 制作这种咖啡，只要将<color=#00E1FFFF>两份咖啡液</color>混合起来就好了，如果梅莘警官来了，记得搭配一份蛋糕。
- You're different from my son. I have confidence that you will find great success. Good luck, youngster. ｜ 你跟犬子不同，我相信你一定会做出一番事业的…加油吧，年轻人。

- Stadium of the Sacred Flame Notice ｜ 「圣火竞技场」公告
- That feels like it was so long ago now. But at the same time, it wasn't, right? ｜ 感觉是好久以前发生的事情了呢…但好像，也没有过多久？
- Dunyarzad! It's been so long since we've seen you! ｜ 迪娜泽黛！真的好久不见了呀！
- Spirit of Omen: Wind Glede ｜ 厄灵·风之魔鸢
- Code name: Beth. A high-purity Anemo entity.\nElemental hypostases are life forms which have completely abandoned their former appearance and biological structure, making them able to reach the highest level of elemental purity.\nResearch into hypostases is mainly led by scholars of Sumeru Akademiya, but due to the level of danger that they pose, little of substance is known about hypostases beyond their scientific name and code name. ｜ 代号为「贝特」的高级风元素生命。\n「无相」指的是抛弃了其他元素生物的形态与生态，达到的纯粹境地。\n针对无相元素的研究，主要由须弥教令院的学者主导进行。但由于其危险性，除了代号与命名以外，基本没有取得什么值得参考的研究成果…
- When Action Phase begins: All your characters gain 1 Energy.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 1</color> ｜ 行动阶段开始时：我方所有角色获得1点充能。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：1</color>

- Of course. ｜ 这是当然。
- I'm sure he's still sailing across the sea, charting a course towards his dreams. ｜ 他一定还在海上，追逐着他的梦想吧。
- Fortune Stick: Surge ｜ 灵签·奔流
- Normally, a good answer would be along the lines that "it is very dangerous to concentrate a large number of wooden boxes together, and they should be stacked separately with proper ventilation in mind." ｜ 标准答案强调，「将大量木箱集中在一起是很危险的做法，应当分散堆放，注意通风」。

- Lead the way. ｜ 那我们一起吧。
- Well then. I should have some myself. All that work's made me hungry... ｜ 咳…好了，闲话就先不说了，忙活这么久，我也要去吃一点了。
- But it also has much to do with the Yashiro Commission. It would be improper to speak of it here without the consent of Miss Kamisato. ｜ 这件事与社奉行也有不小的关系，不知道你是否同意，我把它告诉大家？
- Rejected! ｜ 拒绝
- Oh... ｜ 唔…
- No matter where Bulle Fruit goes, she will catch him in the end, and will either cut him in half or skin him alive. She never fails! ｜ 泡泡桔不论跑去哪里，最后都会被她逮住，然后被一刀两断，或被活扒了皮。嘟嘟莲从不失手！

- Help Cloud Retainer complete the dish ｜ 协助留云借风真君完成烹饪
- Defeat {0} enemies while "Turbo Twirly" is on-field ｜ 在「冲天转转」在场时，击败{0}名敌人
- But... If we do that... ｜ 可是，可是这样的话…
- "Summer-special grape juice. Two bottles for one Mora." ｜ 「夏日特供葡萄汁 两瓶一摩拉」
- Friendly Aid ｜ 好友协助
- Karkata is the mechanical crab, right? ｜ 卡卡塔，应该就是那只机械螃蟹吧？
- Ororon's words still echo in your mind. Meanwhile, Citlali continues to keep her eyes on you and even performs another checkup. ｜ 欧洛伦的声音始终回荡在你脑中。同时，茜特菈莉一直仔细观察你，又为你做了一次检查。
- A potion of mysterious origins that has a simple formula. Some might even call it a healthy drink. As the name suggests, it can make people stronger. ｜ 来源神秘但配方单纯，甚至可以说是健康的药剂。正如其名所示，能够让人变强。

- Joining Party: I ｜ 加入队伍·其一
- So, after all that running around, we end up right back here again... ｜ 没想到，这一路上兜兜转转，最后又走回来了呀。
- Flamestrider Normal Attack 3-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 驰轮车普通攻击三段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Wait, but wasn't Dain saying that hilichurls get scared of the light when they reach the very end of their lives...? ｜ 可是戴因明明说，丘丘人在生命的最后阶段会变得畏光…
- Everything's piled up to the ceiling. You probably won't know where to step once you're inside. ｜ 这些东西都堆在一起，已经顶到天花板了。要是你们进去，肯定连在哪里下脚都不知道。
- "I still took damage...?" ｜ 「还是被击伤了吗…」
- Wangsheng? ｜ 往生堂？
- Action: Switch Character\nDuring your Action Phase, you can spend 1 Elemental Die of any type to <color=#FFE14BFF>switch your Active Character</color>. ｜ 行动：切换角色\n在行动阶段中，可以花费一个任意「元素骰」来<color=#FFE14BFF>切换「出战角色」</color>。
- A mature Geovishap.\nIt is said that after many years have passed, Geovishap Hatchlings will shed the armor that originally protected them and become Geovishaps. However, these two and the older, greater Primo Geovishaps have spent many years hibernating under the mountains, and have only emerged and become active in recent times. As such, none can personally attest to having witnessed or recorded such a thing in person. ｜ 成熟的岩之龙蜥。\n据称，幼岩龙蜥历经漫长岁月的积累后，会蜕去原本保护自己的装甲，成为「岩龙蜥」。但这两者，以及更古老、更伟大的「古岩龙蜥」，在过去的许多年中都蛰伏在山下，直到近期才开始活动。因此这种说法没有第一手观测记录证明。
- The true name of the noble being known as Stormterror. It is the "Dragon of the East" of the Four Winds. Once defended Mondstadt from a great catastrophe. ｜ 被称为「风魔龙」的高贵生物的真名，是「四风守护」中的「东风之龙」。曾经从灾厄中守护过蒙德。
- Traveler, I have heard from the Adventurers' Guild that you have been traveling the world. Is that true? ｜ 旅行者，我从冒险家协会那边听说过，您是在到处旅行，对吧？
- *sigh* Look, I get it — you like to go out exploring. That's fine. But do you really have to go off thrill-seeking this close to the show? ｜ 唉…你说你呀，平时跑跑出去也就算了，怎么赶在这节骨眼上冒险？
- So, don't underestimate your opponents just because you feel that time is moving slowly. ｜ 所以，不要因为主观上觉得时间过得慢就轻敌了，这点请注意…
- Ascend the summit of Mt. Laixin ｜ 前往来歆山顶
- Hold on, I'm really sorry... ｜ 请稍等，实在抱歉…
- Wait! Waaait! ｜ 喂，等等啊！
- The first thing to reenact is the order of their arrival. ｜ 首先要还原的就是：他们抵达的顺序。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When playing a {SPRITE_PRESET#3101}Food Event Card:</color> Spend 2 less Elemental Dice. (Once per Round) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>打出「{SPRITE_PRESET#3101}料理」事件牌时：</color>少花费2个元素骰。（每回合1次）
- (Try to sense the memories within the inscription...) ｜ （感受铭文中的记忆…）
- (Oh...) ｜ （是喔…）
- Aye! Come have a pint with us some time! ｜ 哦！有空和水手们一起喝一杯吧！
- "...This is very similar to the large bell that the Captain discovered in the ruins to the northwest. Perhaps..." ｜ 「…和大尉之前在西北方的遗迹里看到的大钟相近，或许…」
- Well, I shan't bother you, then. ｜ 不打扰了！
- Moo! ｜ 哞！
- I... threw it away... ｜ 被我丢了…
- Overlooking Serpent Head ｜ 高眺之蛇首
- ... ｜ .......
- Good. Now, there are two key points that aristocrats attach great importance to — your manner of speech, and your bearing. ｜ 那就行，说回到礼仪课的话题上，贵族最看重两个方面的礼仪——谈吐，和仪态。
- Why does Pers look the way it does? ｜ 它为什么是这个外形呢？
- I finally won... This was my first time trying to use real-time calculations during a card game. I was pretty sure I'd mess it up, but... looks like I managed to pull it off. ｜ 总算是赢了。我还是第一次在卡牌游戏里做即时计算，还以为会弄砸…但还好成功算完了。
- You're right. Let's do this. ｜ 我们出发吧。
- Let Paimon have a look... Oh wow, that really is one strange tree! The way it's shaped like a circle looks almost like a door, right? ｜ 让我看看…哦哦，那边有棵好奇怪的树呢，团成一圈感觉就像是个门一样。
- Yeah, of course you are! Didn't the Forest Boar get frightened off and all... ｜ 对啊对啊，野林猪不是被吓跑了吗…
- And you, child lingering by the shore, pray, what more have you lost? Come, now, board quickly now, be not nostalgia-crossed. ｜ 逡巡岸边的孩子呀…你又遗失了什么呢…快快上船来吧，莫要留恋哟…

- The last wearer of that scarf grew up to become a very, very special guy! ｜ 嗯，上一只戴着丝巾的小龙，最后成长成了很了不起，很了不起的家伙！
- Miss Lourvine... I'll have to trouble you to help me look after this new patient while I'm gone. ｜ 露尔薇小姐，我不在期间就麻烦你照看一下这位新病人啦。
- Heh, don't say that, or the Wayob might smite me. The process just uses a few of the same techniques and materials. ｜ 噗…可不能这么说，大灵也许会怪罪我的。我只是采用了打造古名的技艺，以矿石为原料，制作出这样的结晶体。
- A small lizard with horns on its head that can often be found in shadowy bushes.\nThese lizards have lovely red, patterned tails that blend in with their surroundings. They discard these tails in moments of peril to confuse their foes.\nLizard tails have special medicinal properties when dried and ground down into a powder. Some crazy alchemists have even found a way to process them into catalysts for explosions.\nOnce they are separated from the body, these tails will lose their vitality and curl up.\nUnlike those Green Horned Lizards that are terrified of birds, Red Tailed Lizards never avoid the two teapot spirits. Sometimes, Chubby even allows them to climb into his feathers because "the horns on their heads do wonders for my itchy skin." ｜ 头上生有尖角的小蜥蜴，时常出没在阴影遮盖的草丛中。\n有着适应环境的条纹和红色尾巴的蜥蜴，遇到危险的时候会舍弃尾巴以迷惑敌人。\n蜥蜴尾巴在风干磨成粉后有特殊的药用功效，一些疯狂的炼金术士甚至开发出了将之加工成爆炸物催化剂的技术。\n脱离了身体后的尾巴会在一段时间后失去生命力，蜷曲起来。\n与害怕鸟雀的绿角蜥不同，赤尾蜥并不会刻意回避两位壶灵，有时阿嘟甚至允许它们钻进自己的羽毛，还说「这种蜥蜴头上的尖角有着挠痒的奇效」。
- Some manifests of goods that has only had their numbers checked out. This may seem like a very simple job, but one must still focus in order to ensure that no mistakes are made. ｜ 仅仅是确认过了货物数量的货物单。虽然是看上去很简单的工作，但也需要全身心投入，才能保证不会出错。
- A medium-sized bird that can be found in Natlan. It wears a luxurious coat of brilliant green feathers, seemingly with a delicate, silky ruff, while its tail feathers are as gorgeous as budding flowers.\nPerhaps on account of its all-too-luxuriant feathers, akin to a field of flammable flowers, this bird is still afraid of fire, despite living in Natlan's heat. In addition, while other birds may appear fluffy but are actually quite sturdy, what the Thick-Feathered Ruffed Pheasant has beneath its thick feathers is... a very thick, round layer of fat. Thus, it strains itself even by flying normally, and has been called a "Potted plant with wings that can't fly" by the Scions of the Canopy... ｜ 可见于纳塔的中型禽类，身披华贵大衣般的青翠羽毛和质感细腻的围脖，尾羽则如花蕾般华丽。\n或许是因为羽毛过于繁茂，如易燃的花草，这种鸟类生活在炽热的纳塔大地，却有些畏惧火焰。此外，不同于其他看似蓬松，实则精悍的鸟类，厚羽围脖雉厚重的羽毛下…也是浑圆的肥肉，连正常飞行都有些吃力，被「悬木人」们戏称为「有翅却不擅飞行的盆栽」…
- I... What did you do, Sorush? I can't seem to recall. ｜ 斯露莎做了什么来着…想不起来了。
- I have an underwater locomotion module. Once, Mary-Ann and I... dove down to the ruins of the orphanage, whose coordinates were the same as those of Annapausis. ｜ 我拥有水下运动模组，曾和小姐一起潜回…与安眠处空间坐标无异的孤儿院废墟。
- "Become a storyteller," they said... "It'll be fun," they said... ｜ 说书啊，真是件好玩的事…
- This time, I have to be very careful. I can't make a single mistake... ｜ 这次必须要细心，一点问题都不能出…
- *sigh* Paimon hopes he's telling the truth... ｜ 唉，希望这次他说的是真的…
- Claim ｜ 领取
- Amber once believed that if she took on her grandpa's post, she would understand why he left Mondstadt.\nHowever, even when she officially became an Outrider, she was no closer to unraveling the mystery behind his wordless departure.\nHer grandpa had left nothing for her to find either, indicating that she would have to forge her own path.\nAmber floundered for a while, until she flipped through an old book of fables that she would eventually come to treasure.\n"What you lacked was not wind, but courage. It is courage that has allowed you to become the first flying birds of this world."\nAmber realized that she shouldn't wait for directions from someone else, but that she should be like those courageous birds that spread their wings and flew into the blue skies.\n"There must be something that only I can do. There must be."\nThe moment she realized this, a Vision began to shine brightly at her hip. ｜ 安柏原以为，只要继承祖父的职责，就能查清祖父为何离开蒙德。\n可直到正式成为侦察骑士，她也没能解开祖父不辞而别之谜。\n祖父什么也没给她留下，意味着未来的路全靠安柏亲手开拓。\n安柏也曾迷茫动摇，直至她翻开一本后来被她视为珍宝的旧寓言书。\n「重要的不是强风而是勇气，是它让你们成为世上最初的飞鸟。」\n安柏察觉到，她不该等待谁人的指引，而应成为充满勇气的飞鸟，振翅飞向苍穹。\n一定存在「只有我才会做的事」，一定存在「只有我才能做到的事」。\n理解这一点的瞬间，一颗「神之眼」在安柏腰间绽放出璀璨光辉。
- Enter Vanarana in reality. ｜ 来到现实中的桓那兰那。
- Exactly! If they weren't the real deal, why'd you make her pay so much, hmm? ｜ 对呀，既然不是正品，那你还要芷巧小姐赔那么多钱做什么？
- Defeat the monsters and clear the Abyssal Pylons ｜ 清除魔物与「深渊界门」
- Somewhat. They do look similar, to be sure. We shouldn't drop our guard. ｜ 略有耳闻罢了。确实有点像，但是不能掉以轻心。
- Uh-uh, you shouldn't be out here, boy. There are killing machines in the area, it's extremely dangerous. ｜ 这可不行，小朋友。这一带有杀人机器在游荡着，很危险的。
- Could this all just be a misunderstanding? ｜ 有没有可能只是场误会？

- Let's get back. Phew, this has all been quite exhausting for poor little Paimon! He definitely owes Paimon some snacks... ｜ 回去告诉他吧。唉，害我这么辛苦，他应该请我吃点心！
- The second round will be held in the desert. We'll be moving our commentator's stand over to Aaru Village. ｜ 第二轮比赛会在沙漠中举行，到时候我们评论席也会转移到阿如村。
- Defeat the hilichurls ｜ 消灭丘丘人$HIDDEN
- So, have you thought up what you'd like to say, boss? ｜ 想好说什么了吗，雇主？
- A graceful bird with broad wings and slender legs.\nAcross Teyvat, the long-legged crane carries different meanings in different cultures — good luck, elegance, and gentlemanly charm are all reflected in this graceful bird.\nThe poets of Liyue even use the term "gentleman" to describe this tall and dignified bird. ｜ 高贵优雅的鸟类，生着宽阔的双翼与修长的腿。\n长腿的鹭在提瓦特大陆的各国文化中有着不同的美好寓意。吉祥、雅致，或君子的翩翩风度，皆在这种优雅的鸟类身上有所体现。\n在璃月人的诗歌中，也会将「君子」形容为这种修长高挑、举止清新的鸟类。
- Just as I thought, Leonard was an adventurer who lived two thousand years ago. ｜ 和我想的一样，莱纳德是一名两千年前的冒险家。
- ...Ahem, point is, it would seem that some people have been secretly organizing another Hyakunin Ikki. ｜ …咳，总而言之，这几天，似乎又有人在秘密举办「百人一揆」了。
- I daresay that a private performance played using these very same strings would not be an excessive way to show my gratitude! ...Ah, ah... ｜ 为了表示感谢，用这弦为你们办一场「专场演唱」都不过分呢…阿、阿…
- Eh, who cares. They didn't take anything with them. ｜ 算了，反正他们也没带走多少东西。
- Sure! I slept really great here, by the way — the temperature is perfect, and the beds and pillows are super comfortable. ｜ 行啊。我正好已经睡饱了，这盏壶里的温度正好，床和枕头也很舒服…
- It somehow doesn't seem right. ｜ 总觉得，哪里不太对。
- If you encounter any issues, just examine these schematics a bit more closely. ｜ 有什么问题，就多研究一下这张示意图吧。
- (So where should I go?) ｜ （我该去哪里…）

- Is there anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- According to Arakavi, Arayasa, Aradasa, and Arasudraka are looking for clues about Ashvattha's Concourses in the wild. Arama will meet up with them later. Join them in the search of the concourses, for it is the key to finding Vasoma Fruits. ｜ 依照兰加惟的说法，兰耶娑、兰陀娑和兰修提袈分别在野外寻找「觉树之堂」的线索。兰罗摩也会去与他们会合。如果遇见他们，就与他们一起寻找「觉树之堂」吧。毕竟，这似乎是取得「恒素果」的关键。
- Next, put the Fowl on the chopping board and slice it down the middle into thick pieces. Then, we need to marinate it for a while... ｜ 然后，禽肉放在菜板上，从中间剖开，展开成稍厚的肉片，然后腌制一段时间…

- It all worked out! I finished my homework so Mom and Dad are pleased, and I didn't have to try so hard to put on an act. Everyone's happy, so this is a perfect ending! ｜ 从结果来看，我完成了作业，爸爸妈妈也满意，我也不用费力演戏，大家都高兴，是个完美结局呢。

- About Varka: The Captain ｜ 关于法尔伽·队长
- Changsheng's memories and powers are not what they were in her prime. ｜ 长生的记忆与法力，较其鼎盛时已经消散了许多。
- "Weapons are bound to take damage in battle. Thus, the store of a force's consumables and weaponry are a measure of their ability to wage war."\nIt is said that these were the words of the very first Quartermaster of the Corps of Thirty. It has been a long time, though, so the veracity of this attribution can no longer be determined. Of course, all military forces, whether they be the Corps of Thirty or other mercenary bands, place great importance on the maintenance and resupply of weapons.\nThis weapon rack is a product of the evolution of traditional design. Sturdy yet light and reinforced by metal components in key places, it is easy to construct and transport. When operated at maximum capacity, it can supply weapons to a whole combat squad for half a month.\nHowever, it is said that a certain mercenary with long black-and-golden hair once used up all the weapons to be found on one such rack while sparring against other warriors — following which they suggested that she get a custom-made weapon instead of using mass-produced ones. ｜ 「刀剑枪戟难免在战斗中损坏，是征战中的消耗品，武器的储备量反映着一支部队持续作战的能力。」\n据称这是「三十人团」初任军需官的名言，年月太过久远，真实性已无从考证。当然，无论「三十人团」还是其他结队行动的佣兵，都相当重视武器的维护和补充。\n这种武器架正是该传统演化至今的产物——牢固而轻巧，在关键位置设有强化金属结构，便于制造和运输，极限状态下收纳的武器可供一整支队伍连续战斗半月之久。\n不过，据说有着黑金双色长发的佣兵曾在与其他佣兵的比试中消耗掉一座武器架上的所有备用武器，此后佣兵们都建议她专门定制个人的武器，不必使用寻常可见的量产型号。
- Though — and I can't for the life of me say why — Jilliana seems to be very busy lately. I haven't seen her at all. ｜ 不过，不知道为什么，吉丽安娜突然多了很多工作，跑里跑外的，都看不着人了。
- Narzissenkreuz, where did you come across these things? ｜ 纳齐森科鲁兹，你从哪里看来的这些东西？
- Diary of a Soldier Abroad ｜ 驻扎日记
- Hahaha, yes, how considerate of you. Delavar's my friend too, so of course I can take you to him. Come with me. ｜ 哈哈哈，真客气啊迪希雅，德利瓦也是我朋友，有这种好事，我当然会带你去找他了。跟我来吧。
- How can someone write something that terrible in such a matter-of-fact tone!? ｜ 怎么会有人用冷冰冰的句式，写下这么恐怖的话啊！
- Hehe, vengeance should know no bounds, you know... ｜ 哼哼，为了复仇，我什么都做得出来哦。
- You have tea here? ｜ 你这有茶喝？
- Defeat Opponent(s) ｜ 打倒敌人
- If you go to the owner and ask for evidence of just how long the restaurant has been around, they will immediately tell you that the Geo Lord visited this establishment on such-and-such a date in history, this is what he ordered, and here's what he had to say about it... ｜ 你要是去问证据，老板们一准都说在之前的某年某月某日，岩王爷曾经在店里特意点过哪碗菜，赞过哪碗汤的味道…
- As such, it might be best to cover it with a diaphragm or place it within a sealed container to ensure its quality. ｜ 所以，最好将它覆上隔膜或者放进容器密封起来，这样成色会更好。
- Surging Blade Interval|{param8:F1}s ｜ 流涌之刃间隔|{param8:F1}秒
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Hey, don't get too close! Kinich is handling things over there! ｜ 喂，不要靠近那边啊，那是基尼奇的工作！
- She wasn't looking for flowers and applause — all she wanted was to see her audience smile. ｜ 所以她追求的并不是鲜花与掌声，她只想看到观众的笑容，这就足够了。
- Why are you so concerned? ｜ 你为什么如此关心呢？
- Go to Drunkard Gorge ｜ 前往醉汉峡
- ...I say we set up a ring, here and now. I shall summon the mightiest beetle-battlers of Liyue, and as iron sharpens iron, we will hone our skills in training with them. Then, and only then, will we be ready to seek the guidance of Guoba-san. ｜ 不如我们就摆起擂台，由我去邀请璃月的斗虫强者，来一番斗虫修炼，好好锻炼一番本领，再请锅巴兄指导一番。
- A special sensor setup prepared by the legendary Sage of the Stolen Flame.\nHumans and Saurians must each stand in the corresponding sensor zones to complete the trial. ｜ 传说中那位「盗火贤者」准备的特殊感应装置。\n人与龙需要分别站在对应的感应区内，才能完成试炼。
- Brightwood flooring with simple shape patterning and faint veins. The faint veins are a product of the timber's drying process and long storage time, while the simple shapes were drawn using the dregs of herbal medicines commonly used in the forest. These floorboards are both moisture and insect-resistant, and emit a faint woody fragrance. ｜ 浮有隐约纹理，饰以简明图形的「辉木」地板。隐约的纹理是木材干燥和久置后的产物，简明的图形则以林间常用的药材残渣为画笔绘制而成，作为居室的地板，兼顾了防潮与防虫，还有一股淡雅的木香。
- You saw my commission? Have you managed to get 5 Sakura Blooms? ｜ 你是看到了我的委托才来的吧，那五束绯樱绣球你是否准备好了呢？
- A free and joyous city under the jurisdiction of the Knights of Favonius. The city is famed for its wine and songs, which here go hand in hand. ｜ 在西风骑士团治下的，自由而欢快的城市。\n城中的酒与诗都颇负盛名。
- I'm pretty much a riddle master. ｜ 我经验可丰富了。
- Go to The Emanant Skylight ｜ 前往「天光流泻之处」
- About Sucrose ｜ 关于砂糖…
- But my child is locked up in there. If I could just stage a rescue... ｜ 可是我的孩子被关在了那里，如果能把它救出来的话…
- A senior member of the Adventurers' Guild is in charge of the Moonchase Festival events. Knowledgeable in the Guild's affairs as she is, Linyang can accurately mark out the locations of Moonchase Charms and Mystmoon Chests. According to the Guild's rules, however, she can only reveal some of this information to other adventurers each day... ｜ 冒险家协会的资深成员，负责举办逐月节期间的活动，通晓协会的大量事务，能准确标注出逐月符与玄月宝箱的位置。不过，根据协会的规定，琳阳每天只能向冒险家们透露少量线索…
- Collect {param0} Secret Silver Medals or better without resetting the trial ｜ 不重置试验的情况下，获得{param0}个「秘银印章」或以上评价
- Yoon Ah-young ｜ 尹娥煐
- What a shame. This historical village and its fertile land... it's all gone to waste! *sigh* ｜ 可惜了这个古老的村落，和本该肥沃的土地…唉！
- Food ｜ 食物
- You heard it here first — I wouldn't be doing this if I had any other choice! ｜ #还好有证人，{NICKNAME}和派蒙可以证明我是被逼无奈的！
- I, too, wish to return to the very beginning — to the time before the Narzissenkreuz heroes set off on their journey. ｜ 我也想回到最开始的时候。水仙的勇者还没有踏上旅程的时候。
- #Ah, I didn't expect to see you here, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for the envelope — it's lovely. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，没想到会在这里遇见你。谢谢你的祝柬，很漂亮。
- Xochicuicatl Records, Colomche Plaza... There are so many options, but I recommend starting with the real highlight around here. ｜ 花歌唱片店、科隆切广场…嗯，虽然有很多选择，但我最推荐的还是这里的重头戏。
- ...Illumi-what? ｜ 什么…什么图？
- Ah, thank you, thank you! I almost thought that I would have sacrificed myself for science — in the prime of my youth, no less! ｜ 谢谢…真是太谢谢你们了。我还以为自己年纪轻轻，就要献身给实验了。
- Fatui Cryo Cicin Mage ｜ 愚人众·冰萤术士
- Thank you, Miss Navia, but it's fine... I don't mind not riding the Aerial Express... ｜ 谢谢你，娜维娅小姐，但我就算不坐空中列车也没关系的…
- The battle against the beast from another world was the intersection point for this world's fate.\nToday, Fontaine treads a brighter path.\nBut the echoing whale-song of the giant will not fade utterly from your mind.\nRelive your memories and once again partake in the battle. Maybe you'll learn something new. ｜ 与异界巨兽的战斗一度是世界命运的交错点。\n如今枫丹的命运也走上了更光明一些的方向。\n但巨鲸之歌的余响却始终在脑海中挥之不去。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…

- You can find scenarios related to the stone slates' contents in the incidents recorded in the interview notebook. There, you can verify said content. ｜ 从采访手册记录的事件中，找到能与石板内容相关联的情景，即可进行佐证。

- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- A feather-shaped token that was brought forth from a secluded hall. The compassion of its creator led to it being left within that mansion along with a certain slumbering form. ｜ 于避世之幽馆中一同带出的箭羽状的凭证，因创造者的怜悯之情，而与某具沉睡之躯一同置于馆中。
- In short, the Ode of Resurrection still has a number of limitations, but I can promise that it will work reliably on you. ｜ 结论就是说，就算还魂诗没有完全恢复，我也能保证它在你的身上不出问题。
- Ah, Paimon gets it! You want us to distract her! ｜ 我懂了，由我们来吸引她的注意力，对吧？
- If I can squeeze myself inside one of them, Shinobu will never find me! ｜ 只要想办法钻进去，就算是忍姐也找不到我了！
- Aurele happened to come to return a book, so Dad asked him to take care of me, so I came over to play with them. ｜ 正好奥雷勒哥哥来还书，爸爸就拜托奥雷勒哥哥来照顾我，所以我就来这里和他们一起玩啦。
- But... That's ridiculous! He told us the Mountain King is a living symbol of your tribe's glory! ｜ 怎么会这样…山王不是你们活着的荣耀吗？！
- I was all packed up and ready to go, but then I thought, I wonder if the ceremony will go any differently with a new Flame Bearer? So yeah, here I am again! ｜ 本来咱是收拾好包袱了，但突然一想，你主持的回火夜会不会有什么不一样呢，哈哈，所以咱就又来了。

- How do we fight Stormterror? ｜ 有关风魔龙。
- Nilou might be setting him up. ｜ 可能是妮露设下的圈套。
- There aren't enough of us adventurers out here either, so we can't simply send them reminders every few days... ｜ 现在能到野外调查的冒险家又不多，也不可能隔几天就去提醒他们一次…
- Character Preview ｜ 角色预览
- Well, they are our dear cat saviors, after all — The famed Honorary Knight and Paimon the Cat Whisperer! ｜ 毕竟是伟大的猫猫救星，荣誉骑士和白猫魔法师！
- If we water them regularly to soften the soil, one day their branches might reach into the clouds. ｜ 定期浇水松土，总有一天可以长成参天大树吧。
- Shop Colors ｜ 坊店的彩段
- Just because these posts are anonymous doesn't mean you are free to spread slander. Such anti-war sentiment is naught but part of the Sangonomiya rebel's propaganda campaigns! ｜ 不要以为匿名就能无责任诽谤，此等厌战言论皆是珊瑚宫叛贼之宣传战！
- B—But it isn't just me! Avid swordsmanship enthusiasts like yourself are in the minority in Inazuma now. And I was the one who woke up early in the morning to get tickets to the exhibition match. ｜ 又、又不是只有我一个人是这样！现在在稻妻，像你这种狂热的剑道爱好者毕竟是少数。而且表演赛的门票，也是我一大早起来排队才买到的。
- [Contemplation] (Is there any other way?) ｜ [思索]（还有没有别的办法呢…）

- But the work turned out to be more simple than I'd imagined. ｜ 不过在入职了之后我才发现，这份工作比我想象的要简单许多。

- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Cyrus said that Master once threatened to give him a good beating by the side entrance of the House of Daena. It was only thanks to my mother and Professor Zaha Hadi intervening that it didn't happen... ｜ 听居勒什说，老师放话要把他堵在智慧宫侧门打一顿，还是我母亲和萨赫哈蒂女士拦着才没让那事发生…
- Ahem... Uh, Miss Hydro Archon... How did you know we were coming? ｜ 那个、那个…水神大人，你是怎么知道我们要来的？
- If there really was such a thing as a miracle potion that could cure all disease, I'm sure it would be auctioned off and sold for an astronomical price. ｜ 如果世界上真有那种喝一口就包治百病的药，它肯定会被拿去拍卖，然后卖出一个天文数字的价格。
- Well, then why are there so many shipwrecks all around us? Feels like we've gotten ourselves in danger again. ｜ 不对啊？附近怎么有这么多沉船？我们好像来到了更危险的地方！
- "Pumpkin" ｜ 「小南瓜」
- Please take heed of the safety of the people, the ferocious animals and of course, yourselves! ｜ 附近居民的安全，这些凶猛动物的安全，当然了，还有你们自己的安全，都要注意啊！
- #What beautiful technique... Let me try again. I'll give you the bait, Master {NICKNAME}, Master Paimon, and then I'll ready my rod... Even though it's not a professional's pretty rod... ｜ #美丽的钓鱼技巧…我再试试。饵料交给{NICKNAME}老师和派蒙老师，我会看好钓竿做好准备，虽然不是专业人士的美丽钓竿…
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Are you gonna fight back? No one's stopping you. But I hear it's a serious crime to fight outside the ring. ｜ 要不你先还手？不过这样的话你也罪加一等了。
- Ahem! I am going back to work now. Yes, back to work... ｜ 咳！我要去工作了，我现在就要去工作了…
- Beyond Klesha ｜ 劫波破执
- ████ ｜ 「████」

- Ararycan knows that. Around the area of "sickness," there is a weird Nara. That might be the bad Nara you want to find. ｜ 兰利遮知道。在「病」的地方，有一个很怪的那菈。应该是你们要找的坏那菈。

- Help Sister Victoria ｜ 帮助维多利亚修女
- Normal Attacks deal an additional <color=#99FFFFFF>160%</color> ATK as DMG. Can only occur once every 10s. ｜ 对普通攻击命中的敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>160%</color>攻击力的额外伤害。该效果每10秒只能触发一次。
- Is something the matter, Madam? ｜ 前辈怎么了？
- Source of All Waters ｜ 万水之源
- That's him! ｜ 听这声音！是他！
- When I had the choice between becoming who I wanted to be and who my parents wanted me to be, I ended up choosing the latter... But I was never happy about it. ｜ 在「我想成为的人」与「父母想让我成为的人」之间，我选择了后者，但我并不快乐。
- Favonius Sword <size=24>etc.</size> ｜ 西风剑<size=24>等</size>

- Here is the full truth: Bahera took the keys to the office, and when his mentor sent him a letter to ask for them, he sent them in a letter back to the Akademiya. ｜ 故事的完整真相是：巴赫拉带走的东西是导师办公室的钥匙，在导师来信催促后，他把钥匙用信件寄回了教令院。
- I'm much too busy with my research these days to dedicate time to a competition. Besides, even if I did enter, there's no guarantee I'd actually win a prize, is there? ｜ 我最近都在忙着搞研究，没时间去参加比赛。再说，就算参加了也不能保证我一定拿到大奖吧？
- What's there to be researched in this deep cave? ｜ 这么深的山洞里有什么可研究的啦？
- It's mostly Paimon's fault... ｜ 这个主要怪派蒙…
- Great job, cuties. Jean's asked her subordinates to provide us with additional funds. Here you go~ ｜ 工作完成得很棒哦，小可爱们。琴让部下给我们提供了新的支援资金，收好啦~
- You're... the Sage of the Stolen Flame? ｜ 你是…盗火贤者？
- Aizen Medaka ｜ 蓝染花鳉
- What did you think? Personally, I thought I sang rather well. ｜ 怎么样，我唱得还不错吧？
- Huh? No need to rush, the price is negotiable. Besides, you won't find such tasty Dried Fish anywhere else! ｜ 欸？别走啊，价钱好商量，你去别处可找不到味道这么好的鱼干了啊！
- It's nearly hunting time, I shouldn't have any more. ｜ 我的狩猎时间马上就要到了，不能喝酒。
- That's probably the cause. ｜ 大概也是因为这件事吧。
- According to intelligence, the target has the following special traits: \nInvulnerability to Geo DMG \n\nAdditionally, the target has the following weakness: \nDEF decreased for 10s after being hit by a character's Plunging Attack. ｜ 根据调查，目标具有如下特性：\n·岩元素伤害无效\n\n此外，目标具有以下弱点：\n·角色的下落攻击命中目标后的10秒内，目标的防御力降低
- Oh, my needs for amusement have been more than met. Thanks to your help, our little inspiration hunt went perfectly. Not only did we gain invaluable experience in the tournament, we also had all the excitement of exposing a criminal conspiracy... ｜ 我早就尽兴了哦。托你们的福，这次的取材很顺利，不止得到了宝贵的参赛体验，还有破坏阴谋的精彩戏码…
- ... ｜ ……
- When I went out with my brother on a courtesy call, I even saw someone who had hung and framed a congratulatory note left by my great-grandfather. ｜ 和大哥出去拜贺的时候，我还看见，有人把太爷爷写的贺柬裱挂在墙上。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- "Hiring research assistant(s), interesting parties should inquire with Researcher Bricole inside the workshop." ｜ 「聘研究助手，有意者请至工坊内部咨询研究员布里科勒。」
- In addition to the lines from the plays themselves, Director Zosimos also recorded lots of commonly used words that we could combine into sentences to communicate with guests. ｜ 除了剧本里的台词，佐西摩斯导演还录下了大部分常见字词的语音，好让我们组合出正确的语句，和游客们沟通。
- Yes. It seems she has inherited the blood, but not the knowledge... what a miscalculation. There can be no contest like this. ｜ 嗯，看来是只继承了血脉，还没继承知识…真是失算，这根本没法较量…
- Everything will work itself out. ｜ 船到桥头自然直嘛。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Alright, understood. I'll conduct some market research, and once I'm back, I'll provide an official assessment of the sum owed by Ms. Zhiqiao in compensation. Please wait here, Mr. Krosl. ｜ 我知道了，我会先去市场上调查一下，然后再回来评估芷巧小姐需要赔偿的金额，克罗索先生，请您在这稍等一下。
- Jean's outfit. This classic knight's ceremonial outfit is suited to all manner of occasions. ｜ 琴的装扮款式。典雅干练的骑士礼服，适用于多种场合。
- Arama and Arakavi ｜ 兰罗摩和兰加惟

- Regardless, now that we know where the Kory Drums are specifically, we just need to retrieve them all. ｜ 不管怎么说，现在知道了俱利鼓的具体下落，那么就只待将其全部回收了。

- You know Ajilenakh Nuts, right? I used to go crazy for them as a kid... but my dad was the worst at shelling them. He'd just hack 'em to pieces with his knife, leaving a bunch of inedible mush behind. In the end, he'd salvage what he could by scraping pieces of the flesh off the shell, then mixing it with some milk and calling it porridge.\n...I do miss the taste of that porridge sometimes... and I miss that old nut-cracker, too. ｜ 你知道枣椰吗？我小时候最喜欢吃这种果子。但老爹完全不知道拆枣椰的方法，就拿着刀胡乱地戳来戳去，把里面的果肉都弄得乱七八糟，完全没办法下口吃。最后只能把果肉都刮下来，混在牛奶里，勉强给我当做粥来吃。\n我有时候也会怀念这种粥的味道，还有那个拆枣椰都能拆得手忙脚乱的老爹。
