- A vegetable ragout. It is an improvised dish created by Fontainian farmers celebrating vegetable harvests. There are no strict rules for the amount of ingredients or the cooking method. Be it stir-fried or baked, this unpretentious dish never fails to delight with its rustic savor. ｜ 多种蔬菜组成的大杂烩。是枫丹农户为了庆祝蔬菜丰收而制作的随性菜肴，没有明确的食材配比，也没有固定的烹饪方式，不管是炒制还是烘烤都能带来最淳朴的美味。
- A twin-model streetlamp that is suitable for being placed in the many varied environments that one may encounter in the rainforest. The lamp pole adopts a spliced design. By adjusting the angle between the two lamp-pole sections, the height of the whole streetlamp can be changed to stop them from being blocked by either branches or rocks. The lamps hanging at the end of the poles are filled with phosphorescent plant parts that have mild colors and which are safe and stable, thus making the lamps easy to maintain. ｜ 两段式结构的路灯，适合被布置在诸如雨林的多种复杂环境中。灯杆采用了绞接设计，通过调整两段灯杆之间的角度，可以改变路灯的整体高度，从而避免被树枝或山石阻挡。悬挂在灯杆末端的灯体中装有植物的荧光成分，色彩温和，安全稳定，且易于维护。

- · Impressive long-distance combat strength\n· Attacks with various Electro strikes\n· Extremely agile ｜ ·远距离战力较强\n·多种雷元素攻击\n·行动极为敏捷
- A complex scale metal model that is a replica of the marvelous tool used to analyze and upgrade alchemical ingredients. This device is designed to extract active elements from constituent alchemical ingredients and use these elements to enhance ingredients of the same sort.\nRumor has it that this device was inspired by a device used to extract coffee concentrate. However, to increase the success rate of the related research and analysis, its structure is more sophisticated than that of the original, as are the materials used. According to a certain alchemist, it can help to "eliminate the influence of confusing variables that crop up during analysis conducted by experimental equipment." ｜ 结构复杂的等比例金属模型，仿制自用于研析升级炼金药材的奇妙器具，该种器具的功能是从药材中分离萃取出有效成分，并将这些成分应用于同种药材的改良。\n有传闻称，这一器具的灵感来自于某型用于萃取浓缩咖啡液的机关。不过为了提高研析的成功率，其结构相比原型器具更复杂，用料也更为考究。用某位炼金术师的话来说，它有利于「消除实验器材在研析过程中可能引入的混淆变量影响。」
- Huh. Seems like if we want them to talk, we're gonna need to teach them a lesson first. ｜ 看来不给点教训，他们是不打算好好说话了。
- His "friend" wants to restore nature. ｜ 「朋友」想恢复自然。
- A few years ago, before she returned to her home, she entrusted me with the distribution of a game she developed called Shroomsplosion. It became a hit, and earned me substantial capital, which became my startup fund. ｜ 几年前，她在返回故乡前，把她开发的游戏「滚滚炸炸菇」交给了我代理，结果这个游戏风靡一时，让我赚了不少启动资金。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 30 and complete "Chisato's Letter."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nA toy merchant from Fontaine has created a device in Inazuma that can fashion toys and furnishings as long as the right materials are inserted into it. Help him gather the materials with which some test products might be made, and you will obtain rewards.\nTake the Material Collector with you to initiate Source Material Collection, Elemental Charge, and Core Activation to produce a mobile robotic furnishing according to the toy merchant's specifications. The robot's model type and motions will be determined by what you do during the three aforementioned processes, and once they have all concluded, they have a set chance to produce a special furnishing that can perform all three movements.\nOnce you have successfully completed "A-Toymaking We Shall Go: Mass Production," the exchange function will be unlocked, which will allow you to obtain the test product model you want through the product exchange menu. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30，并完成「千里之信」任务。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n在稻妻的枫丹机械玩具商造出了一个只要置入素材即可进行摆设与玩具制造的机器，帮助他收集素材并制造试作商品，以获得更多奖励。\n根据玩具商的介绍，携带「素材收集器」进行「原材收集」、「元素充能」、「核心激活」三道工序之后，即可制造出一个动态机器人摆设。机器人的款式与动作都会与上述三道工序相关，并且有一定概率能够制造出会全部动作的特殊机器人摆设。\n完成任务「进军玩具市场·大量生产」后，会解锁互赠功能，可以通过互赠填充商品目录，以获取自己需求的试作商品款式。
- Particularly fragrant flowers. They can be easily located, even in the dark, thanks to their sweet scent. Commonly used in Teyvat to make sugar. ｜ 香气浓郁的植株。即便在黑暗中，也能循着芬芳的气息找到的花朵。在提瓦特大陆上，是制糖的常用材料。
- Swim with Layla ｜ 和莱依拉一起游泳
- Tisoc ｜ 提佐科
- He was willing to be sealed away. But as the erosion set in... he forgot. ｜ 他是自愿被封印的。只可惜，因「磨损」而忘却了。
- Wings of Shimmering Galaxy ｜ 星汉灿烂之翼
- You look exhausted. Perhaps it was too taxing a task to send you down alone after all... ｜ 看您一脸疲惫，果然让您一个人试炼还是太强人所难了。

- These people... Why are they here? ｜ 这些人是…他们怎么会在这里？
- Good Evening ｜ 晚上好…
- But as I began to consider relinquishing my divine role, I soon discovered that many reasons still remained to not hastily depart. ｜ 但当我开始考虑是否应该退下神位时…我才发现，我还有许多无法离开的理由。
- Special Almond Tofu ｜ 特制的杏仁豆腐
- Xiangling ｜ 香菱
- If... If only I'd realized before it was too late... ｜ 如果…如果我能早一点察觉…
- Hah! That sounds like big talk, Zhongli. Paimon might have believed you if you were treating us to some Third-Round Knockout, but you'd have to pay out your nose just to stand inside Xinyue Kiosk. Are you sure you can afford it? ｜ 哼，别吹牛了，钟离。「三碗不过港」我还能信，但「新月轩」可是连茶位费都要收钱的！你真的请得起吗？
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:P}
- Hmm, now that you mention it, I've heard that someone found some ores nearby that are of better quality than usual. ｜ 说起来，最近听说有人在附近看到了一些矿脉，其中有些似乎比普通的矿石成色还要好。
- However... *cough* Well, never mind that for now. Here are the presents and the letters. I'm putting this in your reliable hands, Traveler! ｜ 不过…咳！先不说这些了，这些礼物和信件请你拿好了，这件事就拜托你了。
- Exactly! Hee-hee. ｜ 就是嘛！嘿嘿。
- The Miraculous Antoine Roger Aircraft! ｜ 神奇的「安东·罗杰飞行器」！
- Okay. ｜ 嗯。
- She was feeling nauseous, so she stayed up there to rest. ｜ 克洛妮艾小姐的呕吐反应有些过于严重，就留在上面休息了。
- Faurooooobert! ｜ 福罗贝尔！
- We live lives of hardship so that everyone below can prosper. Everyone knows it, so they are quite generous. ｜ 我们吃苦，我们让大家发财！大家心里有数，大家总是给我们送钱！
- However, her homicidal urges did not subside with age. Rather, they grew stronger day by day... ｜ 不过，她自幼表现出的杀性并未因年岁增长而消除，甚至与日俱增…
- Talk to Ootomo ｜ 与大伴对话

- Uh, no... we're traveling as close friends who trust each other with anything! ｜ 啊…不，我们是可以互相托付生命的好朋友！
- Oh, so you're a guest here. ｜ 哦，原来是客人。
- "Ugh... Agafya, I'm fine... It's just a little stomachache..."\n"Alright. Well, I found four apples... you can have them when you're feeling a little better..."\n"But... the mission..."\n"Don't worry about that, Zakhar. I'll take care of it... you just head up there and get a good rest." ｜ 「唔…阿加霞，我没关系的…只是肚子有点不舒服而已…」\n「好了，我找来四个苹果…等好点了你就吃了吧…」\n「可是任务…」\n「没关系，扎哈尔，任务就由我来…你就去上面好好休息吧。」
- Oh my... It appears to be saying that a battle once took place on the Guili Plains. And an enormous battle at that... ｜ 这是…好像是在说，在归离原上发生过一场大战，而且规模很大…
- Excellent, we've reached the terminal station. Please prepare to disembark... ｜ 很好，我们抵达终点站了，还请乘客下船…
- Just don't mess around with my things. There are just enough supplies on the ship for you. Leave as soon as you are satisfied. ｜ 别弄乱了我的东西，船上补给还够分你一点。满意了就快点离开。
- How about the kitchen at Xiangling's place... ｜ 香菱家的厨房…
- All thanks to your "artistic license," that's how. I should've made you wait until we got an update from Tanger. ｜ 还不是因为你自由发挥，才闹成这幅样子。早知道我就应该劝住你，再等等丹吉尔先生的消息才是。
- O—Okay... Maybe Paimon needs to reconsider this idea... ｜ 好、好吧！那我再想想…
- #Hehe, night. Sweet dreams, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #嘿嘿，晚安，{NICKNAME}，祝你有个好梦哦。
- Aaah... please work... ｜ 好…好紧张…
- So, I was brainstorming on the way over, and I'm thinking we could draw something on the wall over here, and the snacks and drinks can go over there... ｜ 来的时候我已经想过了。这里画上好看的涂鸦，点心和饮料放在那边…
- Trigger Quota|{param6:I} ｜ 生效次数|{param6:I}次
- That young lady says the most bizarre-sounding things, yet she appears to be rather highly regarded by the staff of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor — even Rex Lapis himself saw fit to serve under her in some sort of "consultancy" capacity... Allegedly, she is similarly peculiar when it comes to her taste in food. One must admit, one finds eccentrics like her rather intriguing. ｜ 那丫头年纪轻轻，说话稀奇古怪，但看「往生堂」的人却对她毕恭毕敬，连帝君都客气，还给她当那什么「客卿」…听说她对食物的品味也不同寻常，这号奇人，倒让本仙有些兴趣。
- Something of practical value. ｜ 有实用价值的东西。
- What, there's more of them!? ｜ 怎么还有？！

- Wh—What's that? It looks dangerous... Feels like if we don't tread carefully, we'll set something off... ｜ 那，那是什么东西！看起来好像很危险…小心点走，别触动了什么…

- A shimmering feather from a songbird that brings a nudge of courage to its wearer. ｜ 明亮的鸣禽翎羽。能带来小小的勇气。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- In terms of safety precautions, I'll also need to prepare a weapon I'm familiar with and prepare to... repel any aquatic monsters that leap above the surface, and perhaps even cut the line if things are untenable! ｜ 安全起见，我还要把以前最趁手的武器拿过来，随时准备…把急了眼跳出水面的魔物给用力揍回去，实在不行也能切断鱼线！
- <color=#FDAFF0FF>[Friend] {0}</color> ｜ <color=#FDAFF0FF>[好友][{0}]</color>
- I'm spending the rest of my life in prison, anyway... I can't just sit back and let him ride off into the sunset with our fortune! There's no way I'm letting him get away with it, not after what he did to Lucien! ｜ 反正我下半辈子都要在监狱里过了…怎么能看着他花着我跟卢西恩的钱，害了卢西恩的命…然后继续逍遥自在！
- But they both just want the best for Inazuma... ｜ 可是，她们明明都是为了稻妻…
- Roar! ｜ 呜呜！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- What if we made them all <color=#00E1FFFF>move equal distances</color>... ｜ 如果让它们<color=#00E1FFFF>行动的距离相等</color>的话…

- Welcome. I just heard that the news of my wedding has been officially announced. ｜ 几位，欢迎。实际上，我刚刚听说…我和千里的婚事被公布出来了。

- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Endless Forms Most Martial" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「纷变繁相豪武谭」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~

- Ah, it's the Lantern Rite, but I don't really have much time to spare. Can't help it when the shop's so popular, you know? Otherwise... ｜ 可惜了，虽然是节庆期间，但谁让我这里这么受欢迎呢。要不是工作太忙…
- If everyone's a gem, then no one is. Just let me be the waste product so the others can stand out. ｜ 人人都是宝石，等于人人都不是，就让我来当碎屑，衬托大家的杰出吧。
- Things really don't look good over here. Let's go back to Manager Kuan. ｜ 唔…看来这片工地的情况确实不太好呢，我们回去告诉阿宽吧。
- Eh? You think so? Hm... True, the riddle solvers would be pretty tired when they get here... ｜ 欸？是这样吗？唔…解谜的人翻山越岭到这里来，确实会感到疲惫啊…
- Tribal Challenge: People of the Springs ｜ 部族挑战·「流泉之众」
- It might look a bit young and docile, but that's got its advantages. Haven't you ever heard the saying, "Don't judge a book by its cover"? ｜ 它虽然看起来有点稚嫩，但这也有优势，有句话叫盲人不怕蛇嘛。
- Your so-called kindness was only an attempt to fatten me up like a lamb for the slaughter. Spare me your lies. ｜ 你对我好不过是为了日后收割，不必花言巧语。
- This place used to be the mistress's greenhouse, but now, perhaps only these flowers survive. ｜ 这里曾是女主人的温室，但现在或许只有这些花幸存了。
- We can't let someone else beat us to it! ｜ 不然说不定就要被别人抢先了！
- Photography Target ｜ 留影目标
- It's too much of a hassle to explain everything from the top... You know what? Come with me. ｜ 从头开始解释太麻烦了，我也不想站在这里讨论这些。这样吧，你们跟我走。
- Hint Settings ｜ 示意牌设置
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon thought we'd be saying goodbye to the amazing cafés after we left Sumeru. But it seems like people in Fontaine are big coffee drinkers too!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>They sure are. Even the newspapers run articles about how great coffee is at keeping you awake and alert. And at boosting your energy levels, so you can keep performing at peak efficiency during a long working day.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Whew, any job where you need coffee to stay energized must be exhausting...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Like, umm... Blacksmiths? Maybe chefs too... And adventurers — they're always running around all over the place. Hey, and what about divers?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Divers, huh? That's definitely the odd one out here...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>How are divers supposed to drink coffee when they work underwater the entire time?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yeah, that's a good question!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>They can't take off their helmets underwater, so they'd probably have to shut themselves inside an even bigger glass box and drain all the water out before they could finally drink their coffee. Probably from a bottle...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>No, wait... If the coffee's already in a bottle, all they'd need is a long straw that goes from the bottle into their helmet. Then they'd be able to take a sip of coffee whenever they want!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hehe, eww, haha. But then the coffee would go cold!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Cold coffee is just gross. With the important exception of iced coffee, but that's its own thing.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Well that's no problem. They can just bring a stove with them underwater.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>You've seen the kind of stove that most people use in Fontaine, right? It only has one small opening up at the top. As long as that's sealed nice and tight, it won't go out even underwater!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Wait a second... No way, is that... That's it! That must be the whole reason stoves in Fontaine are made that way!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Ding ding ding, right answer! That is indeed the reason behind the design of the Fontaine-style stove.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hehe, Paimon's the smartest!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey, how about we open an underwater café? Paimon bets there's lots of divers out there craving some coffee while they're down in the depths... Yeah, this could be a huge opportunity for us!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Once we open the world's first-ever underwater café, the Mora will come rolling in! Heck, and why stop at cafés? The ocean's our oyster! We could build a whole shopping mall down there! Then a whole underwater business district...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hee-hee! Ah, it's gotta be the best feeling in the world, making Mora through your very own stroke of business genius!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Just one thing, okay? ...Don't go taking out a loan in my name! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>之前，我们在须弥见到了很漂亮的咖啡馆，结果枫丹人也很喜欢喝咖啡呢，和须弥人不相上下！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>是呀，就连报纸上的文章都在强调，咖啡的提神效果很好，还能帮助正在工作的人迅速恢复精力，保持最高效率一直上班。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>需要喝咖啡来恢复精力的工作，一听就很累…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>比如说…铁匠吗？厨师和到处跑的冒险家应该也会经常喝咖啡？还有…潜水员？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>咦，潜水员？派蒙好像提到了不得了的职业！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>潜水员在水下干活的时候，要怎么喝咖啡呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对哦，这个问题好关键！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在水里不能摘下头盔，难道要用一个更大的玻璃罩子把自己关起来，然后抽干里面的水，再安安心心地喝瓶子里的咖啡…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不对，这样一说，把咖啡装在瓶子里，装上一根长长的管子，管子的另一头直接安装在头盔里边，歪歪头就能喝到了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那样咖啡就凉掉了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>不热也不冰的咖啡，一点也不香！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>没关系，大不了就再带一个炉子去潜水。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你看，枫丹人经常用来做饭的炉子只有最上边一个开口，只要把它牢牢封住，放进水里，炉火应该也不会熄灭…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>等等…这么巧吗？会不会…枫丹的炉子本来就有这种用法？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>噔噔！居然被派蒙发现了！枫丹烹饪炉的真正设计意图！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不愧是我！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这么说来，在水下开一间咖啡馆也不是不可能嘛！肯定会有很多潜水员来喝咖啡的，这都是商机，商机呀！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>只要我们开了第一家水下咖啡馆，摩拉就会滚滚掉进我们的口袋，说不定还有机会发展成水下的商业街…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿！靠商业头脑赚来的摩拉，更有满足感！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>要提醒派蒙的是…千万不要用我的名字向银行贷款哦！
- ...I imagine you'd scold me. Why are the things I say and do always worlds apart? ｜ …如果是你的话，你一定会斥责我，为什么每次想做的事和说出口的话语总有差别。

- "Oh? You wish to duel me, little one? Well, I hope you've brought your best deck with you..."\nHint: Yae Miko's deck contains many Artifact Cards, and she can also create large numbers of Summons. This allows her to constantly build momentum and control the duel as the match progresses. ｜ 「啊呀，小家伙要来和我玩一局吗？那可得准备好你最强的牌组哦…」\n【提示】八重神子的牌组包含了大量「圣遗物」卡牌，并且能够大量召唤「召唤物」，在对局过程中不断地积累优势。
- I've taken jobs from her before. She offered to pay me to act as a "battle advisor," and the Mora was good, so I accepted. After working with her a few times, though, I noticed she's not exactly a pushover. When I pressed her about it, she eventually admitted that "battle advisor" was just code for mentoring Kachina in wilderness survival...\nSo a "battle against nature," then. Hmm, I'd probably just call that "life."\nAnyway, that business is concluded, and I now have two new acquaintances. ｜ 我接过她的委托。她出钱让我担任「战斗顾问」，金额不菲，我答应了。但合作几次后，却看出她身手不赖。再三追问下，才知道所谓「战斗顾问」是要教授卡齐娜野外生存技巧…\n原来是和「自然」战斗。嗯，在我概念里，这叫「生活」。\n总之，这笔生意做完，我多了两位熟客。

- Increases all party members' CRIT Rate by <color=#3399CCFF>10–20%</color> for 300s. ｜ 队伍中所有角色暴击率提升<color=#3399CCFF>10%-20%</color>，持续300秒。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT], then consumes all <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127011]</color> stacks. For each stack consumed, this instance deals +1 DMG. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]，消耗所有<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127011]</color>层数，每层使此伤害+1。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Bird and Blossom Park."\nA Mondstadt-style park lined with lush hedgerows and sturdy trees that surround a fountain. A passing breeze is sure to carry the lovely fragrances enjoyed by finches and butterflies.\nIn the eyes of some poets, flowers and birds are a symbol of goodness and nature. As such, bards will sometimes sing by the fountains, which often attracts the attention of passers-by — and their various pets, of course.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Venti, Rosaria, Barbara, Jean, Kaeya ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「花鸟公园」的放置方法。\n蒙德式样的公园，繁茂的花篱与茁壮的树木环绕喷泉布设，微风吹拂而过，就会捎上团雀和蝴蝶所喜爱的淡香。\n在一些诗人的眼中，花与鸟是美好与自由的象征。因此，喷泉边偶尔会有吟游诗人献唱，附近的民众也会被歌声吸引而来，带着自家的宠物驻足欣赏。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：温迪、罗莎莉亚、芭芭拉、琴、凯亚

- Chestnut ｜ 板栗

- Shortly after, Murtada slit his own throat with the pieces of a broken bowl... By the time Taj arrived at the scene, it was already too late. He never had a last chance to see his son. ｜ 没过多久，穆尔塔达就在监狱中，用摔破的碗划了自己的脖子…塔杰赶过来的时候已经晚了，甚至没能见他最后一面。
- When did they appear? And insisting that we wait like that... What are we even waiting for!? ｜ 它们什么时候出现的？而且还一个劲地要我们等着…到底要我们等着什么啦！
- Wait, don't go! We turned off our Wisdom Orb just now, and we were playing with the Fungi and everything! ｜ 别走啊，海妮耶！我们刚刚还关闭了「意智宝珠」，在和蕈兽们一起玩呢！

- I'd almost forgotten... ｜ 我差点都忘了…

- The traces are quite weak, though, so there are only two possibilities. Either the spirit that left the traces is very weak, or it has already left for some time now. ｜ 痕迹比较淡，有两种可能，一种是留下痕迹的妖邪能力弱小，另一种是这个妖邪已经离开很长时间了。

- Using an Elemental Burst increases all party members' ATK and DEF by 20%. Max 5 stacks. At 3 stacks, Normal Attack SPD and Movement SPD are increased by 50%. ｜ 角色每释放一次元素爆发，队伍的所有角色攻击力和防御力提升20%，可叠加5层，叠加到3层时，玩家的普攻速度和移动速度提升50%
- I think so too. ｜ 我也觉得是传说。
- On stormy days, the people of Inazuma chant "kuwabara, kuwabara," believing that this will protect themselves from being struck by lightning. You need not worry about any storm summoned by my own hand — they will bring you no harm. Lightning storms that occur naturally, however, can be more unpredictable. ｜ 民间都相信，雷雨天口念「桑原桑原」，便可以无恙。如是因我一念而起的雷暴，必不会加害于你。但是自然天气形成的雷雨就难说了。
- Okay, that's enough out of you! ｜ 你、你给我闭嘴！
- Hohoho, they say roosters crow at first light, and finches go to bed at night, but Director Hu Tao's always on the ball — anytime, anywhere, she'll answer your call! ｜ 哼哼哼，说是那公鸡白天要起早，团雀晚上要睡觉，我往生堂堂主胡桃，可是随叫随到！
- "Thorns capable of impeding an Enraged Fruit. We need to find a way to set them ablaze and remove them..." ｜ 「可以阻挡生气果实的荆棘，要想办法点燃它们，让它们消失…」
- "I've placed the second clue where heaven meets water. The answer, seemingly amongst the stars, was ultimately washed to some unremarkable place downstream." ｜ 「我把第二个线索放在了天与水之间，答案貌似藏在星点之中，最后却都被流水冲到了无所谓的地方。」

- Make sure I look good. ｜ 拍得好看点喔。

- Ever since they closed the Chasm, I've been patrolling this area. Mostly to stop people breaking the rules and trying to get inside... ｜ 自从「层岩巨渊」被封了之后我就在附近巡逻，主要是不希望下面的人违反命令去「层岩巨渊」…

- So, is invincibility possible? ｜ 原来真能实现不败吗？
- I doubt Edwin had the opportunity to do anything to that effect... which leaves two remaining suspects. Myself, and Mr. Nacker. ｜ 艾德温应该没有机会来做这件事…剩下两个嫌疑人，只有我和纳克先生了。
- That I'd like to do? Why are you asking? ｜ 想做的？为什么会这么问？
- This is not what I was expecting... ｜ 完全超乎了想象…
- Sayu, a ninja of the Shuumatsuban, is a petite figure skilled at skiving.\nShe is well-trained in many arts of concealment and covering her tracks, and she uses these to evade work and look for places to nap during the day.\nThis is not laziness, of course! Rather, she is simply spending time on more important matters, such as sleeping more, so that she can grow taller... Or at least, that's how Sayu would rationalize things.\nAlso, the animal her clothes are based on it is a mujina, not a tanuki. You'd better remember that! ｜ 隶属于「终末番」的忍者早柚，身形小巧，擅长偷懒。\n精通多种隐匿身形、消除痕迹的忍术，用于逃避各项工作，寻找白日安寝之所。\n这绝非偷懒，而是把时间用在更有意义的事上，比如多睡觉才好长高什么的——早柚如此辩解道。\n另外，她身上所穿的服装灵感来自于貉，而不是狸猫，这点还请熟记。

- C'mon, you don't need to pretend in front of us! Need a hug? ｜ 此时无声胜有声，你需要拥抱吗？
- I'm sorry. I don't know. I don't know anything about what happens after this... ｜ 对不起，我不知道…这后面的事情，我什么都不知道…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- How does that saying go again? ｜ 那话怎么说的来着？
- I did not understand what she said, but I believe that since Lady Sumida said so, then that must be how things are. ｜ 我不是很明白这些话是什么意思。不过，既然墨田大人这么说了，那就是这样吧。
- Huh? But won't that mean you'll lose your current identity? ｜ 欸？可是那样一来，你不就…不就会失去现在的身份吗？
- The power of the Irminsul Fruit Fragments have twisted this Domain, creating bizarre traps and constantly attracting powerful enemies to dwell within. If you wish to plumb its depths, you too must possess the power of the Irminsul Fruit... ｜ 地脉之果碎片的力量扭曲了秘境，产生了诡异的陷阱，也不断吸引着强大的敌人盘踞其中。如果想要深入此处，地脉之果的力量不可或缺…
- You're welcome. ｜ 我没意见。

- Elemental energy!? ｜ 元素力！？
- He didn't like how Och-Kan was such a cruel tyrant. So he stole the Turnfire and threw it at the Och-Kan's army. The soldiers couldn't defend against it, and they all got turned to ash. ｜ 他不认同奥奇坎的残酷统治，就为人们偷出了回火，并把它抛向了暴君的军队。没有人能抵挡，士兵们全被烧成了灰。
- Once we have enough Wolfhooks, I should be able to make those toys for you. ｜ 有了足够的钩钩果之后，我应该就可以把那些玩具做出来了。
- We'll just have to roll with it for now. ｜ 到时候有样学样，应付一下吧。

- Sometimes, I can't help but wonder what Cesar thought in those final moments. ｜ 有时候我也会忍不住好奇，十年前塞萨尔坠落的时候在想些什么呢？
- Ah... My apologies, children. I was a little distracted. I forgot you were there. ｜ 啊…抱歉，孩子们。我有点走神了，忘记了你们还在场。

- But he thought that he might attract suspicion by leaving heavy-laden and returning empty-handed, so he collected Naku Weed along the way and made to sell them. ｜ 但是他觉得自己背着背篓出去又空手回来会让人起疑，于是摘了路边的鸣草回去卖。
- Ayo is a very important companion to me! Even though he looks well-behaved now, he really loved headbutting people when he was younger. He's super strong, so even I get knocked over sometimes. Not much you can do about it, though, because it's just how Tepetlisaurs show their affection! Oof, Ayo, stop headbutting me! Alright, alright, I won't say any more! ｜ 阿尤是我很重要的伙伴，别看它现在模样乖巧，它再小些的时候，表达喜欢的方式是冲过来用头撞人。它力气可大了，有时候我都会被它撞得摔倒。不过这也没办法嘛，毕竟嵴锋龙是一种很亲人的龙。哎呀，别撞我呀，阿尤，好好好，我不揭你短啦。
- We're twins, and most people can't tell us apart by appearance. We sound very different, though, so we get exposed the moment we open our mouths. ｜ 我们是双胞胎哦，只论外表的话的确常被认错，但因为声音不同，一说话就会露馅啦。

- A simple dish filled with rich flavors straight from the wok, made from stir-fried Ham, Bird Eggs, Rice, and all manner of other ingredients.\nThey say that the myriad recipes for fried rice have resulted in it being considered the first choice for those who don't know what to eat at the moment.\nOf note is the fact that this simple dish is, in truth, quite the comprehensive test of a chef's capabilities. Only skill and will, they say, will get you a dish that brings back memories of home. ｜ 素材简单且极富烟火气息的菜式，由火腿，鸟蛋等原料配合稻米炒制而成。\n据说在璃月菜中，炒饭常因选材自由且花样百出而被视为「不知道该吃什么的时候」的首选。\n值得注意的是，这道看起来颇为简单的菜式却十分考验厨师的综合能力。据说只有技法与心意齐备的厨师，才能做到给人以宾至如归的感觉。

- This combination of furnishings was created by Tubby herself, and it is made from the Scoreboard and Flash Step components, decorated in a lovely shade of mallow mauve. After stepping on different Flash Steps, the lamps on the Scoreboard will light up one by one and the corresponding score will be recorded.\nCombine these mechanisms with the Realm Within's various furnishings to form all sorts of time attack tracks.\nTubby mentioned that Travelers sometimes need to set multiple nodes on their routes to accurately control the pace of their adventures; and sometimes they need to drive innocent critters to designated locations to prevent them from being caught in the battle. With this combination of furnishings provided by Tubby, you can easily carry out the above training in the Realm Within, and even play "cat racing," "dog racing," and "boar racing" games with your friends. ｜ 阿圆精心制作的摆设机关组合，由「计分灯架」与「闪烁踏板」组成，采用了「锦葵」色泽的装潢。踩踏不同的「闪烁踏板」后，「计分灯架」上的灯笼将逐一亮起，记录相应得分。\n将这些机关与壶中洞天的摆设合理搭配，就能规划出各种竞速挑战。\n阿圆听说，旅行者有时需要在行动路线上设置多个节点，来准确控制自己冒险的节奏；有时则需要将无辜的小动物们驱赶到指定的地点，防止它们被战斗波及。有了阿圆提供的这套机关组合，就能轻松地在壶中洞天进行上述训练啦，甚至可以和偶尔来访的友人们玩些「赛猫」「赛狗」「赛林猪」的小游戏。

- However, I am the God of Contracts. For thousands of years, I have made countless contracts. If the deal was of no benefit, then I certainly would not be inclined to agree to it. ｜ 但我是「契约」之神。千百年来经由我手，订立了万千「契约」。一场交易若非有利可图，我是绝对不会轻易出手的。
- When the Wind Is Blowing ｜ 刮大风了…
- An unknown creation, with origins deep in the past. It seems to be able to affect the phlogiston in the environment. ｜ 不知名的造物，年代非常久远，似乎可以影响环境中的燃素。
- One of the standard types of housing in the Court of Fontaine's Quartier Lyonnais utilizing a regular, symmetrical design. Leschots Clockworks is one store that has adopted this architectural style. According to a research group at the Fontaine Research Institute, this symmetrical design projects a sense of stability and reliability, and as a result, it subconsciously raises people's confidence in a store's merchandise. But the research group failed to consider the reality of municipal planning in the Court of Fontaine — the main road of Quartier Lyonnais curves, and customers rarely approach a building from the front, so few ever notice the design that's supposed to subconsciously influence them. ｜ 枫丹廷利奥奈区标准式样之一的房屋，采用了规整的对称设计，「莱舒的发条工坊」便是采用这种建筑的店铺。根据枫丹科学院某研究组的说法，此类镜面对称的设计能让人感受到一种稳重、可靠的感觉，潜意识中就对店家的商品有了更多信心。但实际上，该研究组并没有考虑到枫丹廷内市政规划的因素——利奥奈区的主道呈弧形延伸，客人们很少从正面走向一座房屋，还真没几个人人注意到所谓影响潜意识的设计。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Idle Hours." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「浅斟的暇刻」。

- Like the statue of a god... ｜ 宛如一尊神像…
- But what the inhabitants of this land do have is bravery. They were courageous enough to stand up and resist the gods, and accomplish what they knew could not be done... This is yet another instance in which that certain thing shines. ｜ 可这片土地上的人们，为了更好的生活，却有勇气向神明挥起反抗的旗帜，有勇气为明知不可为之事…这又是那个东西闪耀的时刻。

- A great black monster that has come from the abyssal dark, eroding the memories of the earth. It can warp itself and transform into a formidable foe. Some of its attacks can cause stackable Attrition that, after a time, will cause your active character to lose HP. During combat, the Tenebrous Papilla will use Beseech the Dark to grant itself a Void Ward. At this time, use <color=#FFE14BFF>a certain number of elemental attacks</color> to break the Ward, which will cause it to enter a confused state. <color=#FFE14BFF>Nightsoul-aligned elemental attacks</color> will break the Ward more effectively. ｜ 来自深邃晦暗的异界，侵蚀大地中记忆的漆黑魔兽。能够扭曲自己的姿态，变化成强大的敌人。其部分攻击会施加可叠加的「蚀破」状态，会在一定时间后，使队伍中自己的当前场上角色损失生命值。战斗中，深邃摹结株会进行「晦暗祝祷」，为自己赋予虚界力护罩。如在此时利用<color=#FFE14BFF>元素攻击到一定次数</color>破坏护罩，即可使其陷入混乱，<color=#FFE14BFF>具有夜魂性质的元素攻击</color>会更有效率地突破其防御。
- Do you still wish to continue looking for her? ｜ 还要继续找吗？
- Ah, Tonatiuh... Now that is a fine name. Before the false sky enveloped the world, the city that lay beneath it could have rivaled Tollan itself. ｜ 「天蛇船」真是个好名字…在虚假的天幕覆盖整个世界之前，这座「天蛇船」下的城市曾经是比肩图兰的大城。

- Oh, so you're just here to watch? Well then, feel free! My grand gardening campaign continues! ｜ 原来只是想来这看看呀，那您随意您随意，我继续我的花园大业了！
- I've never heard of some strange guy like that. You're barking up the wrong tree here. ｜ 我从来没听说过这种奇怪的家伙，你问错人了。
- I don't know what came over me. ｜ 当时有点上头。
- Heh, who are you to talk about pride and oaths with me? ｜ 就凭你，也配和我提承诺，提骄傲…
- Although Furina does tend to give people the impression of one prone to wandering thoughts and only tangential concern for the rules, she does have strict standards — in certain circumstances, anyway, especially before or after performances.\nEverything must be to her satisfaction, be it the make or color of the props, the timing of the brightening and dimming of the lighting, or the pace and rhythm of the music.\nAs such, sharing the stage with a god is not some shortcut to glory, but one paved with blood, sweat, and tears, to the point where even the stories of a hard-to-please superstar prima donna fond of shows and with theatrical swagger to spare has reached even the lowliest street stalls.\nIndeed, there was once a famous troupe that won the chance to perform with her, and pretended to agree to her exacting demands, only to default to methods they were more accustomed to during real rehearsals and performance prep.\nThe troupe director was confident in this method, believing that given Furina's personality, she would be most willing to back down on said demands if she were appropriately flattered and saw that everything was already complete and thus too late to change — a most excellent way to save effort and trouble.\nBut when the director began moving their props to the Opera Epiclese, he found Furina there, directing another troupe as they set up the stage rigging.\n"Why, hello. You didn't seem interested in my opinions, so I arranged to perform with a different troupe."\nThe director was stunned. He had planned for Furina to discover the "flaws" in her view only after setup was complete.\nBut he could already tell that the stage sections that had been constructed precisely in accordance with her directions were significantly superior. Ordinary audience members couldn't necessarily tell, of course, but to professionals, the difference was always in the details, and these were obvious at a glance.\nStill, this director was unwilling to simply turn back, criticizing Furina for not adhering to the spirit of contractual obligation by not informing them beforehand of her contingency arrangements.\nFurina would not let this villain cast the first stone, instead scrunching her face into an expression of disbelief.\n"You don't really think I'm that much of a gullible fool, do you? Guards! Send them on their way." ｜ 虽然芙宁娜很容易给人留下一种喜欢突发奇想，不会遵守规则的印象，但某些特殊情况，尤其是演出前后，她会有严格的标准。\n比如道具的制作与上色，灯光的进入和淡出时机，音乐的起奏点与节奏，每一个点她都要调整到满意为止。\n正因如此，和神明共演并不只是轻而易举沾个光，也要付出很多的辛劳，以至于坊间也会听到这位枫丹的「大明星」很难伺候，喜欢耍大牌这样的传闻。\n曾经就有知名剧团得到了与芙宁娜共演的机会，但因为她提出的要求难以满足，于是他们就先假装答应下来，但在实际排练和演出准备上，还是按照原先更加习惯的方式去处理。\n剧团长对此胸有成竹，认为以芙宁娜的性格，只要木已成舟，对她说些好话，就能让她降低要求，从而省去很多麻烦。\n结果，当剧团成员千辛万苦将演出用的道具运到「欧庇克莱歌剧院」的时候，却发现舞台上的芙宁娜正在指导另一个剧团的搭建工作。\n「哦，因为你们对我的意见充耳不闻，我就安排别的剧团来和我演出了。」\n剧团长有些目瞪口呆，按照他的计划，应该是在搭建完成之后，芙宁娜才会注意到她所谓的「瑕疵」。\n但从现在已经准备好的部分来看，严格按照她的指示去做的剧团所呈现出的舞台效果，确实要好出不少。虽然在普通观众的眼里未必能够看出区别，但在专业人士的角度，演出的优劣在细节上便可一览无余。\n但这位剧团长也不甘心就此离开，他谴责芙宁娜缺乏契约精神，提前找好替代方案却不事先通知他们。\n芙宁娜当然不会容忍这种恶人先告状的行为，她露出有点难以置信的表情，大声回斥：\n「你不会真以为我是个容易被骗的傻瓜吧？来人，把他们赶出去！」
- I'm not used to having so much free time. Hahaha... ｜ 现在这么放松，反而有点不太适应了。哈哈哈…

- A kite the Traveler made under the guidance of Cloud Retainer. Surely, stealing a little dessert isn't the worst thing Paimon's ever done. ｜ 旅行者在留云借风真君的指导下制作的风筝，生动还原了派蒙局促不安的神情，就好像她正在竭力辩解着：「派蒙我才不是因为做错事被放上天的…」\n在海灯节这样的好日子里，区区偷吃几块甜点这样的小事…还是原谅派蒙吧。

- You've come to the right person. My family was in the mining business in the past. As a result, I have the ability to discern the quality of ore with a single glance, which earned me the moniker "Pan Guan'er." ｜ 你算是问对人了，我家以前是做矿石生意的，因此我一眼就能分辨出矿石的好坏，所以得了个「判官儿」的外号。
- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获得
- (The handwriting here is exquisite, to the point of seeming like some sort of printout. This doesn't look like a fortune slip...)\nTo be honest, we weren't the most familiar of people in the organization Alice founded. But I find that things and people around me have changed much in the many years that followed... and now, you are amongst the few I am most acquainted with.\nI must confess that I did not initially understand what Alice saw in you. Being "interesting" was the measuring stick, said she, and being the "most interesting" was the only criterion for being invited to join. Later, I realized that I had only thought that I had understood your stories. That your acuity for the world's operating principles could perhaps sometimes surpass that of astrology. Sometimes, that is!\nI, too, have grown old, and I do not know how long I have left. So yes, I admit that I really do miss you, just a little. Not that I would actually go over to keep you company or anything, though. ｜ （精美华丽、仿佛印刷体一般的字迹，似乎不像是占卜用的签文…）\n其实我原本觉得我们在艾莉丝建立的结社里不算很熟。但是过去了这么多年，我发现身边的人与事物都变化得飞快。你已经是我最熟悉的几个人之一了。\n一开始我也不明白艾莉丝看上你什么了。毕竟她说「有意思」是标准，「最有意思」是被拉入伙的唯一标准。后来我明白了，你写的故事我当初只是自以为看懂了。或许你对于世界运行的规律很敏锐，偶尔比占星术还灵。只是偶尔哦！\n我也已经很老了，不知道还能活多久。当然我也就提一嘴，有点想你是真的，但是我可不准备去陪你。
- With you, me, and a few sacks of potatoes and flour serving as a front, the deal she's overseeing on her end should go off without a hitch. ｜ 有你和我，还有这些土豆、面粉当幌子，她那边的交易应该很顺利吧。

- I am most pleased to see "you both," as well as Ann. ｜ 见到「你们」和这位，安，我很高兴。
- #Every mountain, rock and inch of land is filled with the power of Geo, but those who can wield such powers freely are few and far between.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press}</color>\nCommands the power of earth to create a Stone Stele.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nCauses nearby Geo energy to explode, causing the following effects:\n·If their maximum number hasn't been reached, creates a Stone Stele.\n·Creates a shield of jade. The shield's DMG Absorption scales based on Zhongli's Max HP.\n·Deals <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color>.\n·If there are nearby targets with the <color=#FFE699FF>Geo element</color>, it will drain a large amount of <color=#FFE699FF>Geo element</color> from a maximum of 2 such targets. This effect does not cause DMG.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Stone Stele</color>\nWhen created, deals <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color>.\nAdditionally, it will intermittently resonate with other nearby <color=#FFE699FF>Geo constructs</color>, dealing <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color> to nearby opponents.\nThe Stone Stele is considered a <color=#FFE699FF>Geo construct</color> that can both be climbed and used to block attacks.\nOnly one Stele created by Zhongli himself may initially exist at any one time.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Jade Shield</color>\nPossesses 150% DMG Absorption against all Elemental and Physical DMG.\nCharacters protected by the Jade Shield will decrease the Elemental RES and Physical RES of opponents in a small AoE by 20%. This effect cannot be stacked.\n\n<i>A true master of stone may carve jade and shape gold.</i> ｜ 山脉中、大地上、磐石间，都遍布着岩之力。能自如驱动这股力量的人却少之又少。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>点按</color>\n命令大地上岩元素积聚而起，创造岩脊。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n令附近的岩元素爆发，造成以下效果：\n·如果岩脊数量没有达到上限，则创造岩脊；\n·形成玉璋护盾，伤害吸收量受益于钟离的生命值上限；\n·造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>；\n·身边如果有附带有<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素</color>的目标，则大量消耗至多两个目标的<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素</color>。这个效果不会造成伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>岩脊</color>\n创造时，造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>。\n此外，存在期间会与周围的其他<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素创造物</color>间歇进行原岩共鸣，对周围的敌人造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害</color>。\n岩脊视为<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素创造物</color>，可以阻拦攻击，可以攀爬。\n由钟离自己创造的岩脊，初始同时只能存在一个。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>玉璋护盾</color>\n对所有元素伤害与物理伤害有150%的吸收效果。\n处于玉璋护盾庇护下的角色，会使附近小范围内敌人的所有元素抗性与物理抗性降低20%，该效果不可叠加。\n\n<i>岩者坚也，可攻玉雕金。</i>
- Adventure Item ｜ 冒险道具
- Such discrepancies illustrate the difference between history as it happened and folk accounts based on hearsay. The value of reading accounts penned by others is in the chance to view the world through their eyes. It is very often an unfamiliar sight, though never an uninteresting one. ｜ 此中偏差，正是逸话与正史的区别。读他人作品，无异于用他人的眼睛看世界。陌生之余，又有趣味。

- I've heard that a new manager was appointed who laid down a great number of new rules that have made the guards' jobs much easier. ｜ 不过听说后来换了个新的管理人，随之立了很多新规矩，看守们的工作好做了许多。
- You betrayed the tribe that birthed you... and you betrayed Remuria. You may have become the "Golden Hunter," but you cannot remove the brand of the Sebastos that marks you still. You will always be a Remurian. ｜ 背叛了自己出身的部族，又再度背叛了雷穆利亚…虽然你成了「黄金猎人」，但也无法抹去至尊留下的烙印，你到底是个雷穆利亚人。

- Abyssal Corrosion Level ｜ 深渊侵蚀度
- A common household dish in Sumeru. The shrimps are first boiled until chewy, then added into the curry broth. The perfect blend of savory curry and flavors from the ocean is enough to make one's stomach growl. Though it's a common household dish, almost every family seems to have made their own variations to the recipe. Perhaps one could say that for every Sumeru household, there'll be a different version of curry shrimp. ｜ 须弥的家常菜肴。浓香的咖喱与海洋气息相结合，虾肉经炖煮变得弹牙，带着鲜味一并融入到咖喱汤汁之中，令人食欲大开。在须弥几乎每家每户都会做这道菜肴，但味道大相径庭，可以说一千个须弥家庭有一千种咖喱虾。
- Hosseini ｜ 胡塞尼
- Talk to Sigewinne ｜ 和希格雯交谈
- Now, my name has been cleared, and I can work for President Sango. It's all the grace of the Electro Archon... ｜ 我现在一身清白，还能为珊瑚社长卖命，真是雷神保佑啊…
- I trust you guys. I know you'll nail this side dish! ｜ 我相信你们，绝对能做出最美味的配菜的！
- Isak's parents were both Eremite mercenaries who rarely returned to the village after finding employment in the city. He was raised by his grandfather. ｜ 伊萨克的父母都是镀金旅团的成员，进城之后几乎没有回过村子，他是被爷爷抚养长大的。
- I've examined this island. His footprints are nowhere to be found, and there's no sign of a boat having left. ｜ 我在这座岛上检查过了，没有他的脚印，也没有开船的痕迹。
- Blackcliff Slasher ｜ 黑岩斩刀
- Haha, I didn't put that much thought into it. ｜ 哈哈，我没想那么多！
- Oh! And then what? Then what? What do you think that was, Ms. Paula? Have you heard it before? ｜ 哦哦！然后呢？宝拉小姐，你觉得那是什么声音？之前有没有听到过？！
- Opening Treasure Chest: III ｜ 打开宝箱·其三
- According to Inazuman folklore, as the day wanes and eyelids grow heavy, a chubby little creature may visit those blessed by fortune. Should this happen, you'd best set aside whatever it is you're doing and go to sleep immediately, for this cute critter is a baku — a youkai who feeds on nightmares.\nThe current inhabitants of Inazuma, however, need not be particularly well-blessed to rid themselves of unpleasant dreams. All they need do is book an appointment at the Aisa Bathhouse in Inazuma City. Rumor has it that each of the bathhouse's therapists is a baku in the guise of a young woman, and that they have helped many a nightmare-plagued patient find release from their troubles.\nNevertheless, the once-flourishing Aisa Bathhouse appears to be facing a financial crisis. To understand why, you must first rest your weary head and seek an encounter in the realm of dreams... ｜ 稻妻民间流传着一种这样的说法——运气好的话，你可以在昏昏欲睡时看到某种圆滚滚的可爱生物。这时，你最好放下手中的事情尽快进入梦乡，因为这种生物便是名为食梦貘的妖怪，她会趁你熟睡时一口吃掉你的噩梦。\n不过，现在的稻妻人想要享受这种服务并不需要等待好运气的降临，他们只要前往稻妻城的秋沙钱汤预约心理诊疗即可。据说这里的心理诊疗师都是食梦貘化形而成的少女，许多被噩梦纠缠的顾客都在这里得到了解脱。\n但是，原本生意兴隆的秋沙钱汤似乎正在遭遇一场严重的经营危机。而要了解个中原委，你先要经历一场梦中的邂逅…
- Perhaps this romanticism is an expression of great wisdom. ｜ 莫非浪漫是智慧的一种高层次表现？
- Windborne Hymn ｜ 风带来的圣歌

- Still, thanks for demonstrating so many things to me. ｜ 不过，还是谢谢你展示了这么多东西给我看。

I can, ah... run you through my annual review from last year? That should bring you up to speed on me... No good? Oh, okay then... ｜ 「想要了解更多甘雨的事情」…这，这是什么工作要求啊。我，我还从来没有处理过这样的…去年年底述职报告的背诵可以吗？啊，不行啊。
- Explosion has been past and done. So what's next? Flooding the entire Fontaine with Fonta? I can't even imagine... ｜ 上次是爆炸，下次是什么？用枫达淹没整个枫丹？我真是不敢想…
- That's the exact opposite of Ningguang's tastes! ｜ 北斗跟凝光小姐的口味，根本完全相反嘛！
- Are you... with the Shogunate? ｜ 你…你不是幕府的人吧？
- Seems interesting... ｜ 有意思…

- No, it's not that. We shouldn't involve innocent students in this. A single mistake could completely ruin their lives. ｜ 不，我是说我们不能将无辜的学生卷入这件事，冒着毁掉他们人生的风险。

- You take a few deep breaths to cast aside a few unwanted thoughts and clear your head. ｜ 深呼吸数次之后，尝试清空多余的思绪，直到脑海中一片澄明…

- Be careful of the mud and monsters along the way. ｜ 嗯…路上黑泥啊怪物啊那么多，你自己得小心啊。

- I wonder, whose invitation are you here on? ｜ 不知今日前来，可是受哪位「贵客」邀请？
- Yes, and I hope you're doing well, too! Now that the war's over, I can finally enjoy the scenery here on Watatsumi Island again. ｜ 你也好！现在战争结束了，可以好好享受海祇岛的风光啦。
- Uh... Are we? Are you sure you're not exaggerating a bit too much? To Paimon, saying that sounds like we just breezed through every fight without having to even think about it. ｜ 没…没那么夸张吧？我觉得「无敌」这个词，应该说的是…想都不用想，就轻轻松松把对手打趴的情况。
- If they got it into their heads to go playing around in the forest for a few days, I'd be doomed... ｜ 要是它们兴致来了，往林子里一钻玩个几天，那我就惨了…
- Thank you. I can't remember the past, but trusty friends, you surely are. ｜ 谢谢你们，虽然回不来了，以前的记忆…但可以信任的朋友，你们是的。
- We need to help it defeat a challenging enemy. I've marked the location on the Map for you. ｜ 我们需要帮它们打倒难对付的敌人，具体位置我标记下来啦。

- I get where Mr. Hampeq's coming from. If the factions in charge of public amenities are up to no good, we're all in trouble. ｜ 我能理解汉佩克先生的想法，掌握了公共设施的派系为非作歹的话，的确不是件好事呢。
- Since we first met, I have had a warm feeling inside. Not the kind of warmth that makes me feel rotten. The other kind of warm. The one that happens inside my heart. Thank you. I am happy. Sadly I only recognize the current you. If I forget you... No. I will order myself to remember you. ｜ 从第一次见面开始，你就给我一种很温暖的感觉。和让人不舒服的热不一样，是我的心，感觉到了温暖。谢谢你…我很高兴。可惜我只认识现在的你，如果以后我忘记了…我们就…不，我会「命令」自己记住你。

- Oh, let me see... Ah, whew, what a relief! You two nearly scared the life out of me. So you two just have some questions for me? ｜ 让我看看…呼，吓死我了，差一点胃病都要犯了。原来你们只是要向我打听一些事啊。
- My heart almost stopped there! If it really had turned into a Geovishap, my whole world-view would have been shattered. ｜ 吓了我一跳，要是这个东西入水直接变成岩龙蜥，那我的世界观的立柱都要崩塌了。
- ...And that's the way the cookie crumbled! So, what do you think? You two fancy taking a stroll around my kingdom? ｜ …事情就是这样！怎么样二位？要不要到我的王国来玩玩呀？

- Oh? So you've already become like one of us then, haha. That's good to know. ｜ 哦？那和我们一样了，哈哈。

Especially at eating spicy food... ｜ 唉，重云这家伙，虽然也知道我的底细，但真要和他搭档去完成任务还得审慎。他现在还是执着「武」技，却不理解「侠」心的境界。需要多练练。尤其…是吃辣的方面，哈哈。

- #{NICKNAME}, you're too modest. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你太谦虚了。

- Of course. ｜ 当然。

- A three-legged cup. Once, many heroes were gathered around the bonfire, raising their cups high in toast and drinking their fill while discussing their wishes and ambitions. ｜ 陶制的三足杯，曾有诸多英雄在篝火边举杯酣饮，谈论各自的野心与期冀。
- A dish with ground meat as its base. The crunchy and chewy coating wraps around the savory filling, giving it a layered texture that's easily a cut above regular meatballs. Try eating one, and its irresistible aroma will leave you brimming with satisfaction. ｜ 以肉末为主的菜肴。酥脆又带嚼劲的表皮包裹着鲜香可口的内馅，相比普通的肉团更具层次感。仅是吃下一个，迷人的肉香就席卷着幸福感直冲头顶，带来独一无二的曼妙享受。
- L—Look, I didn't have a choice, okay!? My father cared about those blasted animals so much that he didn't bother to take care of his human wife and son at all... While those animals were showered with love, I lived worse than a dog... ｜ 我，我也没办法啊！老爹为了这些阿猫阿狗，把我们家搞得家不成家…我过得连猫狗都不如…
- Brew up a herbal soup out of raw ingredients listed in my prescription and add a <color=#00E1FFFF>Starshroom</color>. ｜ 把那个方子里的药物煮成药汤，然后再加入一株<color=#00E1FFFF>星蕈</color>。
- There's nothing I can say, except that it looks like I picked a fight with the wrong opponent. I ended up in here last time for striking someone in anger. I won't make the same mistake this time. ｜ 我没什么可说的。看来是我选错了对手，上次因为一气之下揍了人被送到这里来，这次我可不会犯同样的错误了。

- I had a drink with a junior two days back. He said he wished to study the applications of the Long-Lasting Fayz Potion in different environments. ｜ 前两天和师弟喝酒，他想研究长效溢神剂在更多环境中的应用。
- I'm not over my last defeat yet. ｜ …对上次的失利，还是有些耿耿于怀。
- Which would mean you'd caused me even more trouble... my vengeance would be swifter still! ｜ 那你们就又给我添了一笔麻烦！这个仇就更是结下了！

- *sigh* Sometimes I wonder if I'm the only one in this family who actually worries about our future here... ｜ 唉，有时候我会想，这个家里是不是只有我一个人对未来上心…

- The simple fact is that being a shrine maiden is just not for me. The reasons are complicated... let me think how to explain it... ｜ 只是巫女这个职业真的不适合我。这里面的原因很复杂，我得想想怎么解释比较好…
- Ilyas claims that Siraj, a Vahumana researcher, is working on a dangerous experiment. According to Ilyas, Siraj will be meeting someone at the tavern. This matter seems to have caught Alhaitham's interest... ｜ 伊利亚斯指证因论派学者西拉杰正在谋划危险实验，根据他的记忆，西拉杰会与某个人在酒馆进行交易。艾尔海森对此似乎也有些兴趣…
- Yes, but... ｜ 是的，但是…
- Still, I'm just an ordinary "cog" in the Knights of Favonius "machine," so I'm honored that you remember me at all. ｜ 无论如何，我只是西风骑士团这台「机器」中一枚普通的「齿轮」而已。能被荣誉骑士记住，本身就算是一种荣誉。
- That's right! The lady we just ferried over had urgent business to attend to, so she paid us triple for the ride! ｜ 是呀，刚才我们载的那位女士，因为有生意上的要紧事，所以出了三倍的船费来雇我们呢。
- This... travel companion of yours — do you know anything of her origins? No matter what, I cannot seem to discern a single shred of information regarding this floating fairy's fate.\n...Oh? So you don't know where she comes from, either? ｜ 欸——你身边带着的这个小家伙，到底来自哪里？无论我用什么方法，都没法找到一丝关于她命运的踪迹。\n…哈？你也不知道？

- Hehe, surely you're exaggerating. ｜ 嘿嘿，有那么夸张吗？

- Jilliana already came back. She said that she just remembered an errand she had to run for Sister Victoria, which is why she ran off in a hurry. ｜ 吉丽安娜已经回来了，她说刚才是想起了维多利亚修女交给她的一件事还没办，这才慌慌张张地出去办了。

- ...I—It's not my forte, okay!? ｜ 不属于我的强项！

- This land was once a realm of freezing-cold blizzards and ice storms filled with razor-sharp ice shards, all at the command of Boreas. In his final moments, he finally realized that the chilling north wind could only extinguish life, not nurture it. Therefore, Boreas let his powers freely flow into the land to protect it and its inhabitants. ｜ 这片大地上曾经北风呼啸，呼气凝霜。但它在最终终于明白，酷烈的北风只能熄灭生命，不能滋养生命。在生命的末尾，它让自己的力量流入这片大地，永远守护大地与大地的住民。

- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Pool of Sapphire Grace and Shaded Clarity. \nThis medium-sized, round fish has horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters, and drive away creatures that try to harm it. \nThis sandy-colored, plain-looking fish is an important breed. Researchers have managed to deduce the ecological characteristics of the whole pufferfish lineage from the anatomy of this species. With its immense strength and strongest horns amongst its kind, this fish acts as an "underwater workhorse." They have evolved their protective coloration as a result of long-term activities in the riverbed and the bottom of the lake, along with spending all their days with pervasive river and lake sand as companions. ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「灵沼云池」和「澄波游影」中。\n体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n这种角鲀有着黄沙般的色泽，其貌不扬，却是相当重要的品种。学者们根据这种角鲀的生理结构，推断出了整个角鲀谱系的生态特点——这种角鲀有着同族中最强的力量和最坚硬的犄角，扮演着「水下工人」的角色。由于长期在河床与湖底活动，与弥漫的河沙与湖沙为伴，它们也进化出了相应的保护色。

- When a character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks hit an opponent, they will unleash a random Pyro/Electro shockwave at the opponent's location that will deal AoE DMG from the corresponding element. This effect can be triggered once every 2s. ｜ 角色的普通攻击、重击或下落攻击命中敌人时，将在敌人的位置随机释放一次火/雷元素冲击波，造成对应元素的范围伤害。此效果每2秒至多触发一次。

- A simple stool made from affordable Sandbearer Wood, oft found in Chunming Teaworks. While the appearance and comfort of its seating are unremarkable, these lightweight, portable stools are, in fact, more suitable for the working environment inside a tea house as opposed to regular chairs that take up excessive floor space, with the frequent movement of personnel and the frequent changes in workstations granting them superior practicality. During mealtime, they can be pulled conveniently over to a table, creating a lively and convivial atmosphere as craftsmen from different tea houses gather around, chatting and enjoying their meals. ｜ 结构简单的条凳，以价廉物美的「却砂木」打造而成，可见于春茗茶坊内。虽说外表平平无奇，且坐感算不上舒适，但这种轻便易搬运的条凳相比占地面积过大的普通座椅反而更适合茶坊内的工作环境——人员频繁走动，工位时常变动。到了吃饭时间，还能将这种条凳直接拉到桌边，与其他茶坊的工匠围成一桌，热闹谈笑，享用美食，轻松又方便…

- A peculiar bird that can walk on two feet yet cannot spread its wings to fly. Lively and friendly, they are often found in habitats close to water in groups, or floating on their backs in the water without a care in the world.\nThere is something very "down-to-earth" about the dynamics and contours of this flightless creature. By familiarizing yourself with this aspect of its nature, you will surely be able to capture this quality in your own graffiti, and thereby meet specific visual requirements... ｜ 懂得双足行走，却无法振翅飞翔的奇特禽类，活泼而友善，通常成群栖息在水边，或是仰面漂浮在水中，悠悠哉哉。\n熟悉了这种生物的动态和轮廓后，就能在涂鸦中画出「敦厚」的观感，满足特定的画面需求…

- A dish fried over a great flame. Matsutake and Ham have been sliced up, stir-fried, and garnished with some spicy condiments. The flavor of the Ham is a match for the Matsutake's crispness, and the combination grows ever lovelier and more addictive as you chew. The heat-conducting wok also serves to keep it piping hot for long periods. ｜ 旺火炒制的菜肴。将松茸火腿切片，翻炒后加入少许香辛料。火腿的干香配合松茸的脆嫩，在口中越嚼越香，十分过瘾。易于导热的锅体也让它能长时间保持热气腾腾的美味。

- Increases Shield Strength by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%. ｜ 护盾强效提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。攻击命中后的8秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>。该效果至多可叠加5层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。此外，处于护盾庇护下时，该效果的攻击力提升效果提高100%。
- Thanks to the clues you brought back, I'm now able to pinpoint the location of the Ruin machines. ｜ 感谢你带回来的线索，现在我已经基本可以定位那些遗迹机械的所在了。
- That's the commission in general. It'd be great if you're willing and free to take it. ｜ 大体就是这样的委托工作，如果你有意愿也有空闲接手的话，那就太好了。
- And such incidents are inevitable during research. You lose a few researchers? Hire a few more. You destroy a lab? Build another. As long as the supply of Arkhium is guaranteed, I can get the research project up and running again. ｜ 搞研究哪有不发生意外的，研究员没了就再招，实验室没了就再建。只要能保证始基矿的供应，我就能让这场研究重新跑起来。
- It seems that this marriage between the two Commissions is a real thing. Ayato invites you and Paimon to go with him to send well-wishes... ｜ 两大奉行间的婚礼确有其事，神里绫人邀请你和派蒙同去，向他们送上祝福…

- No. They hate the light, but only because down here in the depths, the presence of light signifies human activity. ｜ 深海龙蜥只是讨厌光，因为在这深渊之下，光就代表着人类的活动。
- The feather of a predatory bird that soars through lightning storms. It was said to have been adopted as an insignia by the legendary hero who pacified thunder and lightning. ｜ 在传说中，挺身平息了雷电的勇武英雄的徽章，是翱翔于狂雷的猛禽之羽。
- We often ask people to send some letters to him to suggest certain changes he might make in future works to perhaps make a breakthrough... ｜ 我们也总结过几封意见信，托人带给常九爷，希望能帮助他在后续的作品里做出一些突破…
- It definitely applies to healthcare. If you wanna get healthy, there are things that you just have to sacrifice. ｜ 在临床上也是一样呢。只有牺牲某些东西，才能获得健康。
- But the trip might be a little inconvenient. First, we'll have to go into town and buy a few things we'll need. After that, we'll head out of town for a while, and we'll likely need to return to the Police Station again before the day's through... ｜ 但行程会有点麻烦呢。得先去町街买点用得上的东西，再去趟城外，最后可能还得回奉行所…
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- She said a few things that were... uh, a bit hard to understand, and also that she's looking forward to working with us in the future. ｜ 说了一些比较玄的话，还说期待未来某日跟我们合作呢。
- If you have no other matters to attend to, then we can return together. ｜ 如果没有其他事要做，我们就一起回去吧。
- (Some people might enjoy the sun, but I prefer humidity.) ｜ （也许有人享受阳光，但我更喜欢水分。）
- A splendorous helmet from ages past. Clean the dust away and it will look brand-new once more. ｜ 年代久远的华丽头盔，洗净尘沙后依旧明亮如新。
- A few of them ran off again today, which is most worrying indeed. ｜ 今天又有几个不知道跑到哪去了。好担心。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character to which this is attached takes DMG:</color> If possible, $[K56] 1 card from your Hand with the highest original Elemental Dice cost to negate 1 DMG, and then gain 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Stoic's Symbol</color> point. (Once per Round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character deals DMG:</color> If there are <color=#FFFFFFFF>Stoic's Symbol</color> points already, consume all points and increase DMG dealt this instance by 1, then draw 1 card for each point consumed.\n(Only <color=#FFFFFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#3203}Claymore Characters</color> can equip this. A character can equip a maximum of 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3003}Weapon) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>所附属角色受到伤害时：</color>如可能，$[K56]原本元素骰费用最高的1张手牌，以抵消1点伤害，然后累积1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成伤害时：</color>如果此牌已有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>，则消耗所有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>，使此伤害+1，并且每消耗1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「坚忍标记」</color>就抓1张牌。\n（<color=#FFFFFFFF>「{SPRITE_PRESET#3203}双手剑」角色</color>才能装备。角色最多装备1件「{SPRITE_PRESET#3003}武器」）

- An occurrence by chance. ｜ 偶得妙手。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Ooh, then shall we go out to play? How about a beach vacation, like last time? ｜ 那我们一起出去玩吧？和上次一样去沙滩度假。
- C'mon, up and at 'em! We can't let them get away with the ingredients! ｜ 我们快上吧！不能让它们就这样把食材拿走！

- Seems like everyone really trusts Jean. ｜ 琴真是被大家信任着呢。

- Still, this series of events has me thinking that I should pay our internal affairs more mind... Once I have finished my work here, I will pay the main clan a visit... ｜ 不过经此一事，我觉得自己也该多关心下家族的事情了…等忙完这些工作，还是应该找个机会去主家拜访一下…

- Actually, I wanted to ask you about dead gods... ｜ 我想问些有关魔神的事…

- Life is all about these moments when you can finally relax and hang out with good friends after a job well done... And also those desserts Cyno got — they were really good! Paimon definitely needs more of those in the future. ｜ 忙碌过后坐下来吃吃喝喝，休息聊天，才是人生呀。赛诺请的甜点真好吃，下次我还想来！
- Do you know me? ｜ 你认识我？
- No problem, come back to me once you're ready. ｜ 没问题，你收拾妥当之后再来找我吧。

- I'll stick with tails. ｜ 这次我猜反面吧。
- It wasn't my imagination, they really are here. Prepare to engage! ｜ 并不是我的错觉，只是你抢了愚人众的台词，快备战！！

- The doctor refused to admit it of course, and so he died defending himself in a duel. Only then did things start to calm down. ｜ 博士当然没有承认，所以才在为自己抗辩的决斗中死去。那之后，事情才渐渐开始平息。
- A timepiece made in imitation of the wheel of fate. It ceased turning long ago. ｜ 仿照命运之轮的样子打造的时计，如今早已无法转动。
- Well, I suppose it can't hurt to have cleared the area of slimes. It can only make the area safer. ｜ 唔…算了，清理掉这些史莱姆，这里也会安全一些吧，都是好事。

- The Holy Blade can be any object. But there is particular symbolism in it being a sword. ｜ 圣剑可以是任何一种东西。只不过剑会有特别的象征意义。
- ...B-e-a-utiful! ｜ 回甘啊！
- You know, I can't help but feel a bit disappointed. ｜ …总感觉有点失望。
- Lanoire's family lives at the foot of the mountains to the southeast, in a mansion with a garden full of purple flowers... It should be pretty easy to spot. ｜ 莉诺尔的亲人，就在西南边山麓的一处宅院，院子里开满了紫色的花朵…应该很容易找到。

- That day, you passed Dawn Winery, clutching a bottle of fine wine in your hand, to be delivered to Mondstadt. Daylight was failing, and you were hoping to use one of the small roads by the river, only to hear hilichurl voices ahead of you...\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: When Action Phase begins, the opposing active character will be affected by Hydro.</color>\nHint: Use the Wet status proactively to trigger Elemental Reactions on your opponents! ｜ 那是你从晨曦酒庄怀抱一瓶送至蒙德的珍贵美酒路上发生的事，天色已晚，于是你打算走湖边的小路，可没想到路上传来丘丘人的声音…\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】行动阶段开始时，对敌方的出战角色附着水元素。</color>\n【提示】积极利用潮湿效果，在敌人身上引发元素反应吧！

- Father... seems to have taken the conclusion of the previous incident very hard. It seems like he aged several decades overnight — you can barely see any of the conviction and glory he had while leading the clan now. ｜ 事情过后，父亲备受打击，一蹶不振，看起来像老了几十岁，已经完全看不出他曾经引领家族的信念与光辉。

- Finally, the Coffee Management Office will then send the certification to the coffee maker in question. ｜ 最后，再由「咖啡管理办公室」为各位咖啡师制作并颁发「正式咖啡师」证书。
- Is this the place? I've confirmed the presence of another stone tablet in my field of vision. ｜ 是这里吗？视野内确认也有石碑。

- Simulanka was created by magic, and the trees within do cannot seem to produce ordinary timber.\nBut some special plants and fruits can be brought back to Teyvat all the same... ｜ 「希穆兰卡」的世界由魔法创造，这里的树木似乎无法产出寻常所用的木材。\n不过，部分特别的花草和果实依然能被带回提瓦特…
- Wow! Really? This is awesome! You're the best, Aunty Eula! ｜ 哇！是真的吗？太厉害了！优菈姐姐太厉害了。

- Two reasons have been given for that floating island and the huge graffiti: One more akin to a story, and the other to a real legend. ｜ 关于海面上浮岛与巨大涂鸦的故事，有两个来由，一个更像故事，一个更像真实的传说。
- Forgive me for saying this now, Lady Furina, but I have long known of your various secret investigations into certain matters. ｜ 芙宁娜女士，事已至此我必须说，我早已知道你动用各方力量暗中进行某类调查的事。
- Mr. Ahangar looked quite pleased to finally have an apprentice. I can get by well enough on my wages, so I guess I'll just take it one step at a time for now. ｜ 反正有了学徒之后，阿汉格尔先生看上去挺高兴的。我的工钱也还够吃饭，就先这样吧，走一步看一步了。
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。

- Let's go again! You can do it, you just need to look a little harder. ｜ #我们再来一次，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}要加油喔。
- After the game begins, all Character Cards will be placed in the Character Zone.\n(1) The character's HP will appear to the top-left of the Character Card. HP will decrease when the character takes DMG, and they will go down if their HP reaches 0.\n(2) The character's Energy is displayed on the right side of the Character Card. When the character's Energy maxes out, they can unleash powerful Elemental Bursts!\n(3) Each player will have an active character. Only the active character can use Skills, and conversely, and only they can be affected by opposing Skill attacks. The active character's Character Card will be shifted forward to denote their role.\n(4) Characters who are not in combat will be designated Characters on Standby. "Switch Characters" can be performed to make them the active character.\n(5) If the active character is taken out, that player must choose a character on standby to take their place. ｜ 游戏开始后，牌组中所有「角色牌」都会被放置到角色区。\n（1）角色牌的左上角会显示角色「生命值」。「生命值」会在角色受到伤害后扣减，角色的「生命值」为0后将被「击倒」。\n（2）角色牌的右边会显示角色「充能」。角色「充能」达到上限后，就能使用威力强大的「元素爆发」！\n（3）每位牌手都会有一名「出战角色」。只有「出战角色」才能使用技能，同时只有「出战角色」会受到对方的技能攻击。成为「出战角色」的角色牌，会通过向前摆放一段距离来表示。\n（4）其他未出战的角色被称为「后台角色」。可以通过「切换角色」行动来将他们切换为「出战角色」。\n（5）如果「出战角色」被击倒，牌手就需要选择一个「后台角色」成为新的「出战角色」。
- Busy Adventurers' Guild ｜ 繁忙的冒险家协会
- Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Cliffbreaker's Banner</color> by 3.\nMaximum upgrade level is 15. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>破嶂见旌仪</color>的技能等级提高3级。\n至多提升至15级。

- Yes, you've guessed correctly. The preservation of a thread of Qiqi's consciousness was in fact the work of the adepti. It's also thanks to Qiqi that I managed to come up with a way to save someone on the brink of death. Since the adepti took pity on this child and even used their arts to keep her on this side of existence, I thought I'd take the opportunity to keep her around the pharmacy. There's no harm in that, is there? ｜ 你猜得没错，封住七七一缕神智的的确是仙人的秘法。也是多亏七七，我才摸索出了保住将死之人的方法。既然仙人都怜悯这孩子，施法将她留在「此岸」，那我顺水推舟收留她，又有何不妥呢？

- Looks like it worked! All we have to do is mess up every step of a professional mixing method, and we end up with an absolutely terrible drink. ｜ 这方法果然有效，只要把专业调酒手法的每一步都变糟糕…最后就能调制出难喝的酒。
- You just drew a bunch of Xs and lines... ｜ 只是几个叉号和几条线呢…

- Springvale!? That's crazy! ｜ 什么？袭击镇上？！这也太嚣张了！

- About President Sango... ｜ 关于珊瑚社长…
- For all I know, more people might realize that coming to the Yilong Dais to light a Crane Crown Incense will really make their wishes come true. ｜ 没准，这样就能让更多人意识到，亲自来这遗珑台上一炷「鹤首香」是非常灵验的事…
- Others say that they are an investigation team sent into the desert by the Akademiya. ｜ 也有人说他们是教令院派到沙漠深处的调查队。

- It might have wanted to hide it... ｜ 可能是想把画板藏起来…
- Elder Gwaffah was such an eyesore to you, and you were that to him, too. And sadly, it was me in the end with a Sumpter Beast's jawbone. Again, and again, and again, and again... ｜ 戈瓦法长老，你的眼中钉，他一定也是这样看你的。真遗憾，我只能用驮兽的颌骨一下一下、一下一下…
- I suggest that you stay out debates like that, else you might end up like me... wasting years, losing the debate in the end, and offending an entire cafe worth of scholars... ｜ 奉劝你以后不要参和这种争论，不然就会像我一样，花了几年时间，最后还是吵输了，而且得罪了一个咖啡馆都装不下的人…

- Well, we didn't meet this Yaksha you speak of... ｜ 我们没有遇到你说的夜叉…
- I've marked the locations out on your map. If you check those spots out, you're bound to reap quite the harvest! ｜ …我在你的地图上画出来了，你去这些地方找找看，保准有收获！

- It is rare to see Lan Yan without a smile on her face, and even her best friends would be hard-pressed to recall a time they've seen her cry.\nOf course, she too has moments of unhappiness, though they are few and far between. Whenever she feels sad, all she needs to do is allow a mischievous lamb to butt its head against her leg or a fluffy puppy to nip her hand, and her worries melt away like morning snow.\nAs far as Lan Yan is concerned, every second spent thinking unhappy thoughts is time that could be better devoted to playing happily with the beasts of the fields and forests.\nMost of the time, an afternoon whiled away among the tea trees with her animal friends is enough to dispel unpleasant feelings.\nHowever, there are times when more drastic action is required — such as letting her cares wash away while swimming in the wilds.\nThere isn't a pool or waterway between Qiaoying Village and Mt. Lingmeng that Lan Yan hasn't swum in, nor a crisp mountain spring that hasn't filled her cupped hands or reflected her face.\nShe reclines in the water, the gentle current keeping her afloat, as her black hair swirls on the surface and tiny fish nibble playfully at her feet. All the while, warm rays of sunlight cast dappled shadows on the streambed below.\nHere she daydreams in viridian and emerald hues of a life much the same as hers.\nShe wakes at dawn in such dreams, in a house with white brick walls and a gray tiled roof. There she drinks a cup of morning tea, before punting a bamboo raft down the stream outside, singing all the while. In her dream, too, she weaves rattan objects, as a tiny dog bounds over to her side and licks her hand. And with that, she awakens.\nLike every son and daughter of Chenyu Vale, Lan Yan is as simple and pure as a clear mountain spring.\nShe has everything she wants and so doesn't dwell on dreams.\nThe bright lights and exotic sights of the world outside are no more attractive to her than a butterfly to a deer. Sure, a curious deer may leave its verdant slopes to gaze upon a passing butterfly, but it will soon return to whence it came to happily graze once more.\nWherever Lan Yan's travels may take her, it is never long before she returns home to Chenyu Vale.\nEven the most wonderful dreams cannot compare to the scent of freshly roasted tea leaves, just as even the most distant fantasies cannot compete with the beauty of the swirling mountain mists that wreath Mt. Xuanlian.\nAfter wringing out her hair by the water's edge and getting back into her dry clothes, Lan Yan carefully dons each of her silver bracelets, earrings, and necklace. It is time for her to return home.\nThe silver ornamentations that adorn her are gifts from her family, and they chime and jingle as she walks, playing a melodious mountain tune. Wherever she goes, she is accompanied by joyful music.\nSwimming in the wilds is not without its dangers, and she has been reprimanded by her grandfather on more than one occasion. There would surely be more stern words if she were to be caught again today. Next time, she muses, it might be better to take a friend.\nBut that's a matter for another day. Tonight, there is Tea-Smoked Squab on the menu. ｜ 蓝砚总是一副开开心心的样子，嘴角永远翘着，再好的朋友也很少见她撇着嘴或是落眼泪。\n她当然也会不快乐，不过这种时候很少。只要跟路过的小羊羔、小狗崽玩上一阵，被犯倔的小羊顶一顶腿，被毛乎乎的小狗崽用乳牙咬一咬手，心里那几颗硌人的小石子就不知道滚到哪里去了。\n对蓝砚来说，最大的道理就是——一直想着不开心的事，就浪费了和小羊、小狗、小猫还有燕子、狐狸、松鼠一起玩的时间！\n大多数时候，只要在茶坡转悠一阵，和小动物们玩个半天，她的气就消了。\n不过也有无论如何还是无法释怀的时候，那就只能去游野泳了。\n翘英庄外，灵濛山东面，大大小小的水潭她都游过，每一道水波都拂过她的手，每一汪泉眼都倒映过她的脸。\n她的黑发会在清透的潭水里荡开，鱼儿要啄她光着的脚，和缓的水流丈量她的腰，一线一线的阳光在水底投下流动的影子。\n她会做苍青色的梦，梦里的她过着和平时一样的生活。\n清晨起来，她先喝一杯茶，撑竹筏的时候她一样唱歌，住的屋子依然是白墙灰瓦。她也还是在梦里编藤，编着编着，跑来一只小狗舔她的手，她就醒了。\n蓝砚是沉玉谷的儿女，沉玉谷的儿女心思简单干净，就和这里的山水一样。\n她对生活没什么不满的，因此不留恋梦。\n远方的五光十色对她的吸引就像翩飞的蝴蝶吸引林间的鹿，就算因一时好奇离开了青草遍地的山坡，四处徘徊之后，鹿还是会回到它们的山坡吃草。\n不管蓝砚去哪里旅行，没过多久她还是要回到沉玉谷。\n再美的梦也没新炒出的茶香，再遥远的幻想也不会比山岚笼罩的悬练山更动人，所以梦醒了也就醒了。\n在水边绞干头发之后，披起衣服，一道一道戴好手腕上的银镯、腿上的缠银丝带、颈上的银项圈还有耳间的银铛，蓝砚该回家啦。\n满身的银饰是家人送她的礼物，每当她走动起来，叮叮当当的清脆声音就像灵动的山歌，她来到哪里，歌就唱到哪里。\n游野泳很危险，爷爷说过她好几次了，这次要是被发现又得挨训了，她想下次自己还是和伙伴一起去比较好。\n不过这些先放一边，今天晚上有茶熏乳鸽吃呢。

- These intelligent weasels live underground within the mining tunnels and cavernous depths of The Chasm. Their fur has a unique blue sheen.\nHaving long become used to life in the darkness, they now have excellent hearing and olfactory senses.\nNow that they are in The Realm Within, these weasels nonetheless prefer areas not bathed in as much piercing sunlight. Tubby sometimes makes use of their keen senses to find some lost objects. ｜ 出没在层岩巨渊的矿道、洞窟深处，生活在地下的机智鼬类，皮毛泛着特异的青色光泽。\n适应了长期光线黯淡的生活，拥有非常优秀的听力与嗅觉。\n来到壶中洞天后，这种鼬依然倾向在阳光不那么刺眼的区域活动，有时阿圆也会借助这种鼬的敏锐察觉力去寻找一些失物。

- Oh... D—Dori... ahem... I took the plunge and bought something from her once. She looked euphoric as I was settling the bill — I think she assumed I was some sort of mega-rich person. Kept relentlessly sending product ads to me in the mail afterwards. Ugh... biggest mistake of my life! I paid such a huge price for it... 'cause not only did I spend all of my scholarship money in one go, but for most of the next year, I had to survive mainly on cheap vegetables, and I couldn't buy textbooks unless they were on sale... ｜ 多、莉、吗…我咬着牙、攥着拳头在她那里买过一次东西，她看我结账很痛快，好像误以为我是什么有钱人，后来还一直寄商品宣传单给我，唔…真是天大的误会！那次购物的代价…不仅把我的奖学金垫进去了，接下来的大半年里，我吃饭都不敢多要肉，买书还得等打折…

- We once discussed matters concerning the summer festival deep into the night. We were both really tired, and I invited her to go take a bath. But when she heard that it involved many people bathing in the same pool, she went red in an instant! That was when I first learned that noble ladies can't use public baths. ｜ 有一次谈夏日祭的事谈到很晚，我们都很累了，我就邀请她去泡澡解乏。但她听说「泡澡」是很多人泡在同一个池子里的时候，脸一下子就红了，那时候我才意识到，大小姐是不能使用公共浴场的。
- ...But it turns out grown-up kids are no use! When Naphis comes after me, Cyno still can't do anything to protect me! ｜ …但有什么用呢！纳菲斯找我麻烦的时候，赛诺根本保护不了我嘛！

- Oh, you're back. How were things at their headquarters? ｜ 你们回来了，休息处的情况怎么样？
- Me? As you can see, I'm busy dealing with the barbarian threat! According to the reports I've received, there've been traces of them skulking about here. ｜ 我？如你所见，我还在忙着处理蛮族的威胁。根据我所收到的报告，附近发现了蛮族活动的痕迹。
- What!? ｜ 什么？！
- #<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe honeyed scents of the Windblume Festival are wafting upon the winds again. During this festival of unparalleled romance, why not come to the city upon the lake for a spell and learn to follow the floral fragrances riding the winds of freedom? From a note most accidentally discovered, embark again on a journey most fantastical.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nYou must reach Adventure Rank 18 and complete the prerequisite Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom." (Complete the Archon Quest "Akasha Pulses, the Kalpa Flame Rises" and the Story Quest "Princeps Cretaceus Chapter:{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Act I" first to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nThe Windblume's Breath event is divided into 3 themes:\n\nTheme 1: Ballads of Breeze\nParticipate in 7 musical performances to earn event rewards.\n\nTheme 2: Floral Pursuit\nExperience Floral Chess, a new game created by the Mondstadt Adventurers' Guild.\n\nTheme 3: Breezy Snapshots\nHelp Fassben the Adventurer make a photobook by taking photos across Mondstadt. ｜ #<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n「风花节」的甜蜜气息再度飘扬。在这极富浪漫的节日里，不妨来湖中之城逗留片刻，伴随花香与自由之风，从意外发现的纸条之上，再启一段奇幻之旅。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到18，并完成以下前置任务：「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「虚空鼓动，劫火高扬」和传说任务「白垩之章{NON_BREAK_SPACE}第一幕」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n「风花的呼吸」活动分为三个主题：\n\n主题一·「风物之歌」\n参加演奏七首乐曲，获得活动奖励。\n\n主题二·「万风逐花」\n体验由蒙德冒险家协会推出的新式游戏「逐花棋」。\n\n主题三·「风物留影」\n帮助冒险家法斯宾制作画册，在蒙德各处留影。
- Aw, a fed Paimon is a happy Paimon, huh? ｜ 派蒙一吃饱，心情就好？

- What hypothesis? ｜ 什么东西？

- Same situation for the Children of Echoes. ｜ 回声之子也差不多是这样。
- An Inazuman house that has utilized construction techniques from Konda Village to suit the local conditions. The cost of building this place is particularly low due to it being built with very common wood and boards. Still, the living conditions cannot be considered poor by any means, and indeed, it is even known to give people a strange sense of "peace." Older folks enjoying their sunset years and open-minded people who care little for worldly affairs particularly love this place. ｜ 因地制宜的稻妻民房，采用了绀田村的建筑式样，和随处可见的木材与板材，造价尤为低廉。看似简陋，居住体验却并不算差，听说还能给人一种莫名的「安心感」。一些安享晚年的老者，以及看淡世事的豁达之人，尤为喜欢这种房屋。
- Guerilla Tactics ｜ 奔袭战术

- I understand. Seems like you've given this a lot of thought, Atea. Thank you for telling me all this. ｜ 阿伽娅…看来你已经想了很多，我明白了，谢谢你能告诉我这些。
- The fact that I was born in this era, that I got to meet legendary heroes like you and our Archon... actually makes me feel really lucky. ｜ 我很幸运，能够生在这个时代，能够亲眼见到像是你，还有火神玛薇卡大人这样的英雄。
- Xilonen opens the door and walks into her workshop. Some unsettling crashing sounds come from the workshop, followed by some agonizing creaks and squeaks. ｜ 希诺宁拉开门走入了工坊。工坊里先是传来了一连串让人不安的沉闷碰撞声，随后又是几声让人牙酸的吱呀声。
- Shh... Those guys down there aren't friendly. We must find a way around them to proceed forward, or... ｜ 嘘。下面那些，不是朋友。我们要继续前进，只能想办法绕过他们，或者…
- Honestly, did you use the wrong seasonings? ｜ 我直说吧，你是不是放错调料了？
- Bing-bing-bong... ｜ 咚咚咚——
- You have finally broken the shrine's seal, and the Spirit Pearl is yours to claim. Go forth and take it! ｜ 终于解除了神龛的封印，「御灵珠」唾手可得。请前去摘取吧！
- #Good to see you, {NICKNAME}, Paimon. I trust all has been going well for you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，派蒙，很高兴见到你们，愿一切都好。
- I do hope that kid grows up soon — that way, he can just send those Treasure Hoarders flying with a couple of kicks! ｜ 希望那孩子能快快长大。这样的话…它就能亲自踢飞那些盗宝团了，哈哈哈！
- Kachina? Haha, looks like we've got ourselves an easy start. ｜ 卡齐娜？哈哈，没想到这次捏到软柿子了。
- When people move forward with all their might... ｜ 当人们全力以赴前进时…
- Oh... ｜ 哦？
- And despite how complicated it was, it wasn't engaging in the slightest! ｜ 而且它这么复杂，竟然也没让我心动！
- I thought I was doing a good job of hiding it... ｜ 没有演好吗…
- Ugh, okay... might as well come with you... ｜ 好吧…我陪你们就是了…

- Sangonomiya Kokomi's specialty. The egg is wrapped up almost like a package, and the fish tail at the end is both small and very cute. It really makes you wonder what's inside the package, but at the same time, you can't bear to eat such a beautiful-looking thing... You glance at the crystal-clear smile in Kokomi's eyes. Ah, darn it, you've fallen for her trick, haven't you? ｜ 珊瑚宫心海的特色料理。蛋皮包成锦囊之形，末端鱼尾小巧而又可爱。如此珍品让人好奇「锦囊」中包裹之物，却又捧在掌心不忍下口…看着心海脸上盈盈的笑意，可恶，已经中计了吗？

- A fell dragon, congealed from the power of pitch-black darkness.\nA monster of the void, known as both the Reaper of the Abyss and "Gosoythoth." It is able to corrupt memories contained within the ley lines of the earth, congealing them into tangible forces of catastrophic portent. From these memories that since time immemorial have flowed below the land, it has managed to extract the remnant will of a primordial elemental dragon sovereign, drawing it out like marrow to repurpose as the foundation of its own fabricated image.\nBut is it truly a mere "image"? Brought back by the very otherworldly forces it had once resisted, a once-dead dragon opens its eyes anew, forsaking all in this brief dream of a resurrection. Trapped perpetually in the final day of its existence by this pitch-black gospel, its boundless fury has consumed all reason. Now, what remains is its unrelenting lust for battle, burning on without end. ｜ 漆黑之力凝成的魔龙。\n被称为深渊浮灭主亦被称为「古斯托特」的虚界魔物，拥有侵蚀地脉之中的回忆并将之凝聚为实体的如同灾厄的权能。而在大地之下，亘古流涌的诸多过往之中，原初元素龙王残留的意志被如髓抽出，构成了拟造形象的基底。\n然而那真的只是单纯的「形象」吗，借由曾经抵抗的异界之力再度睁眼的已死之龙，如梦一般在短暂的甦生中舍弃了一切。漆黑的福音令其永困于生命的最后一日，无穷的怒火吞没所有的理智，此刻，唯有战意不遑宁息，燃烧不止。
- A cheap accessory that is actually made from ancient meteoric ore. ｜ 便宜的饰物，却是远古时代的陨星带来的奇特的金属制成。

After a Solid Strike is hit by any shell, it will <color=#ffcc33>immediately defeat all Slimes of that same Elemental Type on the field</color>.\nIf this device is not hit within a certain period of time, it will disappear. ｜ 「立体打击」分为<color=#ffacff>「雷元素」</color>、<color=#ff9999>「火元素」</color>、<color=#99ffff>「冰元素」</color>三种类别。「立体打击」被任意炮弹命中后，会<color=#ffcc33>瞬间击败场上所有相同元素类型的史莱姆</color>。\n若一段时间内未被命中，该装置将会失效。

### Part 005

Choose between 2 diverging paths.\nPyro Crystal: <color=#ef5534>Radical Scatterfire</color>: After an Ignition Wave hits an opponent, decrease that opponent's Pyro RES.\nPyro Crystal: <color=#ef5534>Intense Incineration</color>: Ignition Waves deal <color=#f39001>{0}</color> additional DMG instance(s) after being triggered. ｜ 强化火晶祝福至<color=#f39001>最高等级</color>，可选择以下两种分支：\n火晶·<color=#ef5534>极限碎火</color>：迸火冲击命中敌人后，该敌人的火元素抗性降低；\n火晶·<color=#ef5534>极限殉燃</color>：迸火冲击触发后将额外造成<color=#f39001>{0}</color>次伤害。
- Everyone in Merusea Village helped me during that time. That's what made me realize what Father meant... ｜ 海沫村的大家在这段时间里，一直在帮助我。所以，「父亲大人」说的话，我才真的明白过来…
- Just tell her it "embodies fond memories and my strength of will." She'll know what I'm trying to say. ｜ 「我相信这里面一定寄托着我的思念与意志」。替我转达给火神大人，她自然明白我在说什么。

- Yes, time's a-wastin'. ｜ 事不宜迟。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\n6 trials with different themes await you in Battlefront: Misty Dungeon. Each has a different Ley Line Disorder and the distribution of enemies and trap mechanisms also varies.\nIn Battlefront: Misty Dungeon, you may only use the specific trial characters provided, and Elemental Resonances will not be available to you. Assemble a team suited to the challenge in question and complete the trial to obtain rewards.\nThe trial characters in this game mode will adopt the Constellation levels of characters you actually own.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 to take part in the Battlefront: Misty Dungeon event. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n迷城战线中，有6个不同主题的试炼等待旅行者的挑战，每个试炼拥有不同的地脉异常，敌人和陷阱机关的分布也有所不同。\n迷城战线中，只能使用给定的试用角色，也无法产生元素共鸣，根据不同试炼的倾向，挑选合适的队伍出发，完成试炼任务获取奖励吧。\n此玩法中的试用角色，将继承旅行者实际拥有角色的命之座层数。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，可以参与「迷城战线」活动。

- A noble bird that has broad wings and sleek legs.\nIt lives near desert oases, and it was once widely worshipped as a symbol of the divine. The ancient legends of the desert migrants say that these beings are the guardians of lost shrines and that they have the sacred power to deflect calamity. ｜ 高贵优雅的鸟类，生着宽阔的双翼与修长的腿。\n栖息在沙漠绿洲附近，在过去曾被视为神明的象征而受到广泛的崇拜。在沙海遗民的古老传说中，这些生灵乃是失落灵庙的守护者，拥有着可以消弭灾厄的神圣力量。

- If I can guard shipments, I can guard people. Since you seem to trust me, how 'bout I be your bodyguard from now on? ｜ 走镖也是镖，保镖也是镖，信得过我的话，以后我来当你保镖咯？
- In the end, it's all the Abyss' fault. Paimon's had enough of them! Hmph! ｜ 说到底，还是怪深渊，大坏蛋，哼！

- A torii gate like the ones used at the Grand Narukami Shrine. The path that winds its way up Mt. Yougou is lined with such gates. A significant number of those who come to the shrine to pray believe that it is important to pass through each and every torii gate, for each passage is equal to one blessing. Those who hold to such a belief fear naught even should they obtain an inauspicious fortune slip. ｜ 鸣神大社式样的鸟居，林立于登上影向山的参道末段。前来祈福的民众里，有相当一部分人坚信，层层叠叠的鸟居有着至关重要的意义——每经过一道鸟居，就将得到一重护佑。抱有这般想法的人，即使抽到了不妙的「御神签」，也很少感到惶恐不安。

- Oh, we're fine, we're just a little down right now... It kinda feels like the end is coming, you know? ｜ 没事啦！我只是有点郁闷…总觉得，末日真的要来了。

- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Thanks so much, Xingqiu! ｜ 谢谢你行秋！
- A crystal that contains a sliver of Tatarigami power. Adding this material during smelting will greatly increase the strength and toughness of metals.\nIn Inazuma, "Tatarigami" refers to the corpse of a divine being and the strange phenomena it creates. They say that before the god that created Crystal Marrow became the Tatarigami, it had many names, one of which was "Orobashi no Mikoto." Orobashi no Mikoto's body was as long as the winding seashore, and its voice was so resounding that only the Dark Sea could absorb it. Yet in the end, it too was cut down together with Yashiori Island itself. ｜ 蕴含着「祟神」力量的晶体。冶炼时加入这种物质的话，能极大地提高钢铁制品的强度与韧性。\n在稻妻，所谓的「祟神」即是神骸本身，也是神骸带来的怪象。传说中，产生晶化骨髓的那位魔神还没有成为祟神时，拥有许多名字，其中之一为远吕羽氏尊。远吕羽氏尊的身躯有如海对面陆地的海岸线一般长，声音如同只有暗之外海才能容纳的巨鲸一般悠扬。但在最后，却被连同八酝岛一齐斩断。

- In the ruins of Ochkanatlan, the Abyssal energy that seeps out of the city accumulates into an ooze known as Abyssal Blight.\nSolitary Abyssal Blights can be instantly melted away by<color=#FFE14BFF> "Cocouik"'s halos of light.</color> When multiple Abyssal Blights are connected, you may need to quickly <color=#FFE14BFF>suppress them all</color> within a short period to melt them away. ｜ 在化为废墟的奥奇卡纳塔，城中渗透而出的深渊能量会淤积汇聚成被称为深渊秽露的聚合体。\n单个的深渊秽露可以利用<color=#FFE14BFF>「绿松石」的光环</color>使之顷刻消融。而当多个深渊秽露相互连结时，可能需要短时间内<color=#FFE14BFF>同时对其进行压制</color>才能使它们消融。
