- Yay, Almond Tofu! I'll take that. ｜ 好的，这份杏仁豆腐我就收下了。
- Yes, yes, keep laughing. Just make sure your stomach stays in one piece while you're at it... Ugh, that was embarrassing. ｜ 好啦，你就笑吧，小心笑坏肚子了…真是丢人。
- Wow... ｜ 哇…

- I'm looking for info about a certain... "something." ｜ 我想打听「东西」的消息。
- Oh yeah, that's right! The more used we are to Kichiboushi's aura, the better we'll be able to understand him! ｜ 啊，对哦！我们越适应吉法师的气息，就越能理解吉法师的意思。
- A ceremonial hunting bow that has become petrified over time. The trinkets on it are still visible. It grants the wielder the power to withstand the winds of time. ｜ 在漫长岁月中石化的道具猎弓，上面的仪式性装饰依然清晰可见。拥有受时间之风冲刷的祝福力量。

- This map of Teyvat is lined with dense notations in various colors, and if you read closely, you can find the places where Xiangling has been, and where she intends to go in future.\n"The shellfish of the shallows around Guyun Stone Forest are unmatched in their freshness. They say that 'here be sea monsters'?"\n"Sea monster meat tastes great. Should look for Beidou to go fight another one. Will steaming them with eggs make them taste better?"\n"There's a dragon in Mondstadt? Great! I just need three days of provisions to get there."\n"Valberries are sweet. Lots here. I'll bring a basket. Take some back. See if they'll grow."\n"This Mondstadt restaurant's Sautéed Matsutake is way too luxurious! They should just sell the matsutake. Ooh, what if I fry some with Jueyun Chili? Sounds good already. Might as well borrow a kitchen tomorrow and give it a go."\n"Haven't found the dragon yet. Am I in the right place?"\n... ｜ 在这张提瓦特大陆地图上，密密麻麻地标着各色小字，仔细阅读，可以从中找到香菱途经之处和将去之地。\n「孤云阁浅海，贝类鲜美无比。传闻有海兽？」\n「海兽肉的味道好棒。下次叫上北斗姐姐一起打海兽。加进蛋液一起蒸会更好吃吗？」\n「听说蒙德有龙？好！带足三天干粮，就能去了。」\n「落落莓，甜！这里多。带好篮子，挖几棵回去种种看。」\n「这家蒙德餐馆里卖的黄油松茸吃法太奢侈了！只卖松茸就好了。绝云椒椒炒松茸，想想就好吃。干脆明天借个厨房试试。」\n「还没见到龙，我来对地方了吗？」\n……

- Just as Shinobu expected, Bull-Chucker is spending all his time beetle fighting without resting or eating. ｜ 和阿忍的预料一样，放牛的确实在废寝忘食地斗虫。
- Talk to Caterpillar ｜ 与卡特皮拉对话
- Well, Freminet told us that it was a private matter, so he didn't want to just share it willy-nilly. ｜ 菲米尼说啦，那是夫人的隐私，不能随便透露详情。
- Score 1,000 points in the challenge, "Over the Broken Bridge" ｜ 在「断桥易渡」挑战中获得1000分
- Chat: Life ｜ 闲聊·生活
- Mualani's parents are both quite successful merchants. Not only have they established a trade network that spanned Natlan, but they have even established partnerships with foreign merchants.\nWhen she was little, her parents were always busy cultivating relationships with their business contacts, and sometimes, they'd be running around outside the home for weeks at a time. So, Mualani would often roam around town with their puppy, or spend her time with the other kids in the tribe, trying their hand at all kinds of watersports.\nIt was only on holidays that the family would always decorate their house and make a big meal to celebrate.\nDuring one such family dinner, Mualani asked if she could help lighten their load and shoulder a bit of their work. That way, they should have more quality time together as a family.\n"Lots of adults say I've got an ideal personality for doing business!" said she.\nHer mother thought Mualani ought to try doing many different things, experience different places, and then decide what she really wanted to do.\nHer father added that it wouldn't be too late for her to join the family business if she still wanted to be a merchant afterward, but that they would support her completely should anything else capture her interest.\nIn the end, Mualani did travel all over, flitting freely over every peak and valley of Natlan like a bird. Many of those faraway vistas were truly enchanting, but as a seabird whose home was by the coast, she often missed the salty smell of the seabreeze.\nAnd so she returned home and engaged in all kinds of watersports, researching the equipment used in them. She wasn't satisfied with the completed products available, so she began learning how to manually modify their functionality herself. She would also apply some lucky colors and some patterns, giving the products a dash more personality.\nShe became the trendsetter, and every time she changed her gear, everyone else would fall all over themselves to get identical items. Mualani was more than happy to indulge their requests, and over time, she became an "equipment seller" and earned a tidy sum.\nEver since the Leisurely Puffer opened, it has also become more of a gathering place for watersports enthusiasts. Naturally, some among them are more into the sports aspect, and others are more focused on the equipment.\nRegardless, Mualani gradually experienced the joy of operating a business — the smiles on the faces of people when they receive something they love shine brighter than glittering gold.\nWhat is this really what Mualani wants to do the most? If you ask her that question, she'll definitely scratch her head:\n"Hey, life's a journey, you know, and you can keep on enjoying all kinds of scenery as long as it lasts! There's no rush to decide on a destination, especially when there's such a long way to go! That's what makes it so fun!" ｜ 玛拉妮的父母是颇有成就的贸易商人，他们不仅在纳塔各地搭建了贸易网络，与国外的商人也建立了合作关系。\n小时候，玛拉妮的父母总是忙于应酬，有时候十天半月都在外奔波。玛拉妮就和家里的小狗走街串巷，或是和部族里其他的小孩挑战各类水上运动。\n唯独到了假日，一家人一定会好好地布置家里，再做一顿大餐来庆祝。\n在一次家庭聚餐中，玛拉妮提出，想要替忙碌的父母分担一些工作。这样的话，温馨的家庭时间也会增加吧。\n「好多大人都说我的性格适合做生意呢！」玛拉妮说。\n母亲认为，玛拉妮应该多尝试不同的事情，体验不同的风景，再决定自己真正想做的事。\n父亲也说，到时候如果她真的打算经商，再接手家里的生意不迟；如果她找到了更感兴趣的事，他们也会全力支持。\n后来玛拉妮确实去了很多地方，她像一只飞鸟，轻轻地掠过纳塔的每一座山峰，每一个峡谷。远方的风景很迷人，可是来自海边的鸟儿飞得久了，常常思念起海风的咸腥。\n她又回到了家，玩各种水上运动，研究起装备。她不满足于成品，学着自己动手改装性能，再涂上能带来好运气的颜色，足够有个性的纹样。\n流行趋势因她而起，玛拉妮每换一种装备，大家都争相向她打听同款。玛拉妮有求必应，一来二去，成了「装备商人」，赚了不少摩拉。\n「悠游豚豚」开业以来，更是成了水上运动爱好者的聚集地。当然，这里面有人更喜欢运动，有人则更喜欢装备。\n无论如何，玛拉妮逐渐体会到了经商的乐趣——人们在得到心爱之物时如获至宝的笑容，比亮闪闪的摩拉更为闪耀。\n但这是玛拉妮最想做的事情吗？若是这么问她，她定会挠挠头：\n「哎呀，人生还长呢，也没必要一下子就决定终点啦。只要旅途不结束，就能一直看到不同的风景，这样才有意思嘛！」

- In "Joyful Beasts and Their Auspices," you must complete stage objectives within the time limit and score the highest amount of points possible.\nPress to use your Skill and don a special Wushou Dance puppet costume to enter <color=#ffcc33>Bumper Wushou mode</color> and <color=#ffcc33>knock aside</color> other participants that you come into contact with.\nWhen two parties in Bumper Wushou mode come into contact with each other, both parties will have their Bumper Wushou mode deactivated. ｜ 「瑞兽欢跃」玩法中，旅行者需要在限定时间内达成关卡目标，尽可能取得更高的评分。\n点击施放技能，穿戴特制舞兽戏的玩偶服，即可进入<color=#ffcc33>「舞兽碰碰」状态</color>，<color=#ffcc33>弹开</color>触碰的其他参与者。\n处于「舞兽碰碰」状态的双方互相触碰时，双方都将自动解除「舞兽碰碰」状态。

So when I write to him, I tell him that I'm out there with the cream of the crop, fighting battles and all that... ｜ 但是他身子一直不好，要是知道我在这守门，说不定就气出个好歹来，所以我在信里说，我一直随着骑士团的精锐在野外战斗…

- When a character <color=#FFCC32FF>receives healing</color>, ATK is increased by 100% for 8s. When a character obtains <color=#FFCC32FF>Bond of Life</color>, ATK is increased by 100% for 12s.\nAfter a character in your party defeats an opponent, the current active character in your party is granted a Bond of Life worth 40% of their Max HP. This effect can be triggered once every 5s. ｜ 角色<color=#FFCC32FF>受到治疗</color>时，攻击力提升100%，持续8秒；角色获得<color=#FFCC32FF>生命之契</color>时，攻击力提升100%，持续12秒。\n队伍中自己的角色击败敌人后，将为队伍中当前场上自己的角色赋予其生命值上限40%的生命之契，此效果每5秒至多触发一次。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Rebound Hydrotherapy</color>'s Bolstering Bubblebalm can bounce 3 extra times, and the first 3 bounces will not cause big Bubblebalms to become smaller.\nThe Passive Talent "Requires Appropriate Rest" is enhanced: Each Bubblebalm bounce adds 1 stack to her Convalescence tally, and the values for the Convalescence stacks' DMG bonus will be modified to: Every 1,000 max HP Sigewinne has above 30,000 increases the DMG by 100. The maximum DMG increase for Elemental Skills that can be gained in this way is 3,500. You must first unlock the Passive Talent "Requires Appropriate Rest." ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>弹跳水疗法</color>的激愈水球能额外弹跳3次；前3次弹跳不会使较大激愈水球变小。\n此外，固有天赋「应有适当的休憩」的效果获得提升：激愈水球弹跳时，将为希格雯赋予1层静养计数，并使静养计数产生的伤害值提升改为：希格雯的生命值上限超过30000的部分，每1000点生命值上限将提升100点，通过这种方式，至多提升3500点伤害。此效果需要解锁固有天赋「应有适当的休憩」。

- I need to take care of some things first. ｜ 稍等我处理些事情。
- For a long time, though, I had no idea what to do. ｜ 但是，在很长一段时间里，我也不知道自己该做什么。
- This area's combat effects are unknown. ｜ 此地存在的战斗效果未知。
- That might be a little hard to pull off... ｜ 这要做得逼真可不简单咯。
- The Sebastos gave us such bodies in the hope that we could escape our prisons of rotting flesh and fate. ｜ 至尊赐予我们这样的身躯，是希望我们能够摆脱速朽的肉身与命运的桎梏。
- Meng, I'm back! I'm afraid we're still no closer to finding Big G. ｜ 老孟，我回来啦！很遗憾，还是没找到狼哥。
- And I haven't seen a live, jumping unagi for a long time either, what with coming here every day to train and all. ｜ 而且因为天天在这鬼地方练习射箭，我都好久没见过活蹦乱跳的陆鳗鳗了。
- Huh, that doesn't sound right. The invitation is pretty big, isn't it? And, if it's in his shoe, he would feel it when he's walking! ｜ 喂，怎么可能，邀请函不是挺大的嘛。再说了，如果放在鞋子里，走起路来怎么可能会感觉不到！
- Convincing him to replace the lead actress won't be easy... ｜ 想让他同意更换主演，应该不容易…
- Defeat Spirit of the Fallen Dawnstar without ever having been hit by the Obsidian Storm. ｜ 在从未被「曜石风暴」命中过的情况下，击败「陨落的晨星之灵」。
- ...Huh? ｜ …嗯？
- Already reached a considerable level ｜ 已达可观水准
- That letter. Give it to me. ｜ 那封信，给我看看。
- *sigh* If only I new how to make food... ｜ 唉，要是我有烹饪的才能就好了…
- An Unwavering Culinary Dream ｜ 愿为一炊之梦
- After entrusting the secret to a kind young person like you, I'm more relieved now... ｜ 把秘密托付给你这样善良的年轻人，我多少也放心了些…
- Yeah, let's go. ｜ 嗯，走吧。
- I specially commissioned an adventurer to help me go to Dragonspine and obtain some Chilled Meat for this dish. ｜ 为了这道菜，我还特地去拜托了一位冒险家，帮我去雪山里取一些「冷鲜肉」回来。
- Bathhouses, Hawks, and Narukami ｜ 一汤二鹰三鸣神
- Prop Arrow DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 隐具魔术箭伤害|{param11:F1P}
- The Abyss Mage seems scared. ｜ 深渊法师有些害怕。
- That would imply that you trust me and proves that I am capable of helping you solve your problems. ｜ 这说明你信任我，也说明我有这种为你解决问题的能力。
- Wanderer's String-Kettle ｜ 吟游者之壶
- Time Edited\n{0} ｜ 编辑时间\n{0}
- Where's the entrance? Paimon can't see one anywhere. ｜ 这里好像没有疑似入口的地方呀？
- Celebratory Kite: Prosperity and Wealth ｜ 吉庆纸鸢-「亨通财运」
- Not gonna lie though. Working the graveyard shift day after day is tough stuff. One of these days, I'll get a message to Hawka asking him to send someone else to replace me. ｜ 不过天天昼伏夜出还是有点吃不消，改天给豪卡捎个信让他换个人来接替我好了。
- ...Huh! ｜ …啧！
- So this is the kind of place where the big shots of Inazuma live, huh? Paimon kinda expected it to be... snazzier. ｜ 这就是稻妻大户人家的宅子吗？没有想象中那么…夸张？
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Desert House: Ordinary Lives.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「沙域平屋-『端居』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Eh, is it too hard for you... ｜ 欸，太难了吗…
- Receiving a Gift: II ｜ 收到赠礼·其二
- *sigh* Fine, I'll exercise a little patience, and explain. ｜ 唉，真麻烦，那我耐心一点解释吧。
- Not yet. ｜ 还没有。
- ...Let me restore them... ｜ …我来还原一下吧。

- This is the Qingce Village Bulletin Board. You can find local news and notes from villagers posted here. ｜ 此为轻策庄公告板，村内大事小情、村民留言等皆可张贴此处。
- Get some new underlings... ｜ 换条狗…
- Well done me. ｜ 不愧是我！
- Let's not disturb them for now... We can wait until after they're done. ｜ 我们两个局外人还是先别打扰他们了，一会儿我们再过来扫墓吧…
- Normally, yumkasaurs never live longer than a century. It's possible that the Abyssal power is responsible for his unnaturally long lifespan. ｜ 它的状态不正常，因为匿叶龙的寿命最多不过百年，或许是深渊的能量让它成了例外。
- Yeah, I've heard of her before. Isn't she the one that won the King of Invokations Grand Prix in Liyue? ｜ 听倒是听说过。这次拿了「召唤王大奖赛」冠军的也是她吧？
- But we have never received a reply. Perhaps the letters were lost on the way, or... ｜ 但信寄出去之后却一直杳无回音，也不知道是送丢了，还是怎么回事…
- Genius Invokation TCG: Radiant Secrets has added all-new cards to obtain, new players to challenge in the open world, and new Tavern Challenges.\nMore friends can now be invited to take part in invitation duels.\nIn addition, a new Heated Battle Mode has been added alongside the Arena of Champions and The Forge Realm's Temper events.\nHit "Prince" up to take part in The Forge Realm's Temper, through which you can obtain Lucky Coins.\nIf you are confident in your skills, you can use the Invitation Board to participate in the Arena of Champions, increasing the stakes and the fun of your duels. ｜ 在秘典华焕版本中，增加了全新的可获取的卡牌、可挑战的大世界牌手与酒馆挑战。\n现在可以邀请更多的朋友进行邀约对局。\n除此之外，不仅有全新的热斗模式，还新增了「铸境研炼」活动与「胜冠之试」挑战。\n在「小王子」处参加「铸境研炼」活动，可获取幸运牌币奖励。\n对自己的实力有自信的牌手，可在对局邀请板处进行「胜冠之试」挑战，在与他人的对局中获得更多乐趣。
- Oh, it's Navia! She's over there! ｜ 看到了！娜维娅在那边！
- The nation of Saurians beckons — an all-new odyssey is about to begin.\nNew adventures, new encounters, and a vast world that keeps unfurling like a neverending scroll.\nStanding silently in the midst of that strange land, the Stadium of the Sacred Flame awaits the arrival of heroes... ｜ 向着龙的国度，冒险即将起航。\n新的旅程、新的邂逅，广袤的世界如同不断延展的画卷。\n在那陌生的土地上，圣火竞技场无声矗立，等待着英雄的到来…
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Byakuyakoku's... ｜ 白夜国的…
- Everyone's got their own agenda, but they all have to pretend to be cordial and considerate. ｜ 大家各怀鬼胎，表面上却还得推杯换盏，互相问候。
- Hilmer ｜ 伊尔梅
- Is the pizza ready? ｜ 披萨烤好了吗？

- ...Are you kidding me? ｜ …你们不会是在拿我寻开心吧。

- Wrought of tears and mettle. ｜ 眼泪与勇气熔铸出的宝石。
- In a single attempt, deplete the HP bar of a boss in the second half {param2} times ｜ 单次挑战中击穿下半场强敌生命值{param2}次
- Avoid the Mist Bubbles along the pathway and reach the destination within the time limit.\nIf you are hit by a Mist Bubble, you will be restrained for a time and lose Facundity. ｜ 躲避路径上的水泡，在限定时间内抵达终点。\n被水泡命中后，将被包裹一段时间，并损失「表现力」。
- Large Overgrown Breacher Primus ｜ 大型狂蔓隙境原体
- Dropped by Fatui Cicin Mages ｜ 愚人众·萤术士掉落
- Oh, speaking of which, where's the young master? ｜ 这么说来，你们二少爷呢？
- Yes... ｜ 是这样的…
- There's nothing timid about you, having the courage to ask about my hobbies.\nSo, fight me. How long do you think your body will last against my blows? ｜ 你还真是胆量不小，有勇气询问我的爱好。\n那便来战吧。以你的身躯，扛得住我几招呢？
- You've got an... interesting taste in drinks... ｜ 芭芭拉对饮料的品味还真是特别啊…
- What about ores in Sumeru? ｜ 关于须弥的矿产…
- Meow~ ｜ 喵~
- As for me, I never considered myself a hero. We're all the lowest of the low. We have no right to even imagine such an existence. ｜ 我不是要自诩英雄，我们都是最肮脏的生命，没那个资格。
- To put an end to Yelan and Xiao's argument, and also to gain even the slimmest chance of survival, Itto drains all his strength to break the stone wall in front of you. Behind it lies a new path... ｜ 为了制止夜兰与魈继续争执，为了争取一线生机，荒泷一斗使出全力轰开石壁。石壁后，竟是一条从未见过的新路…
- Deep Gallery's Lost Crown ｜ 深廊的遂失之冕
- From what I've observed over the past few days, you have great potential as "fusion" artists. ｜ 经过这几天的观察，我也确定了，你们两位具有「融合」乐手和控碟乐师的独特潜质。
- Enhancing Potions ｜ 药剂改良
- Great! Give me a moment. I think... I think I know what to do now! ｜ 太好了，你们稍等一下，我对于怎么做这道菜…已经有思路了！
- Find Dunyarzad ｜ 寻找迪娜泽黛
- Hello! But you're not the only ones who called in reinforcements! Hee-hee, look who we got... ｜ 你好你好。嘿嘿，但可不只有你们请到了外援哟，我们也…
- Mmm? ｜ 嗯？
- #You mastered potion-making in such a short amount of time? I guess that's expected for someone of your talent, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #这么短的时间内就上手了吗？不愧是{NICKNAME}。
- Very well. Await my arrival at one's abode later this night. On this special occasion, you should indulge yourself with some savory dishes. ｜ 嗯，晚些时候回府上等我吧。佳节难得，你大可放开吃些菜肴。
- <color=#808080CC>Free</color> ｜ <color=#808080CC>免费</color>
- Oh, yeah, I heard about that too! He came over and confessed his crimes, but gave no explanation as to why he pulled the trigger. ｜ 哦对对对！我也看到了。他倒是对自己的罪行供认不讳，但却没说为什么要这么做。
- I would advise you to keep your secrets close to your chest. Divulge them too easily, and you never know where the wind might carry them. ｜ 不要轻易讲述自己的秘密，你不知道风会把它们带去什么地方。

- I have no idea why she wants to be a helper here, really... ｜ 真不知道她为什么在这里做服务生…
- (Speaking of longing for the deceased, I'd better tell Nahida about Greater Lord Rukkhadevata.) ｜ （说到对故人的「思念」，大慈树王的事还是告诉纳西妲吧。）
- What is it? ｜ 茶叶怎么了？
- You know that Jeht is currently living with the Tanit tribe, but how is she doing right now? ｜ 你们得知婕德目前在塔尼特部族生活，不知她过得如何呢？
- Leave ｜ 离开
- Surprised Audience Member ｜ 惊讶的观众
- But why today, of all days... ｜ 要说今天有什么不一样的话…
- Oh, Paimon can't just leave them here to suffer and endure alone like this! ｜ 对啊，什么独自受苦，听上去也太可怜了！
- Imagine bringing a bottle of finely-aged wine here and having a taste... Now, wouldn't that be bliss? ｜ 带上陈年的美酒，在这里品尝的话，那就太惬意了。
- Hmmm, the meaning of these two is that "the wind brings the flowers' fragrance," which is intimately linked to the line that follows immediately after. ｜ 嗯，这两句隐含的意义是「风带来花的芬芳」，和下文也连接得很紧密。
- Sure, it'll be a piece of cake. ｜ 哈哈，小菜一碟。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- A team of people with various skillsets invited by Muning, with funding from Khedive.\nTheir main purpose is to delve into The Chasm and collect data on the Ley Line movements there. ｜ 由海迪夫出资，沐宁邀请各方人员组建的地质勘探队。\n其主要目的在于深入层岩巨渊，收集地脉活动数据。
- Not everyone knows how to appreciate tea. Some aren't particular about the flavor. ｜ 不是所有人都懂得细细品茶，也有许多人只喝个大概的味道。

- Atsuko's family come out. ｜ 竺子一家人走了出来。
- You chance upon Gorou and Yae Miko near Yae Publishing House. Gorou seems to be somewhat troubled... ｜ 在八重堂附近偶遇五郎与八重神子，五郎看上去似乎有些困扰…
- Waverider reached 4 Mooring Points ｜ 驾驶浪船抵达停泊点4次
- It is only by fate that people's paths may cross. Now that Shenhe's path has crossed with yours, please be sure to treasure the gift that fate has given you, and take good care of her. ｜ 人海中相遇，本是缘分。你们与申鹤有缘，还请多照顾照顾她。
- +5 HP ｜ +5生命
- #Hey, {NICKNAME}, the land you're talking about is the Serenitea Pot that Granny gave us, right? ｜ 喂，你说的「土地」，不会是之前婆婆给我们的「尘歌壶」吧？
- How did she even get up here? ｜ 这个小孩是怎么过来的？
- Qiqi ｜ 七七
- ...Do you have any evidence? ｜ …依据呢？
- Yeah, we'd be happy to help. Is there anything we can do? ｜ 不用放心上，需要帮忙吗？
- And you seem to know all about... investments? You're always talking about huge sums of Mora! You must have made a ton of money before! ｜ 而且你好像很懂…投资？总之是大笔大笔摩拉的事！以前一定赚到过很多钱吧！
- *sigh* I'm sorry, I didn't mean to keep you so long... I don't get to talk about my daughters much, and once I got going, I lost track of time. ｜ 唉…抱歉了，平时没什么机会跟别人说道她们俩的事，一不留神就拉着你们讲了那么久。
- Nice work back there, Paimon. ｜ 大功一件啊，派蒙。
- Paimon was just watching the baku eat the nightmares. They got really full, and started rolling around on their tummies. It was sooo cute... Anyway, that's why Paimon fell behind. Got a little distracted watching them, heh. ｜ 刚刚我看食梦貘们吃噩梦，一个个肚皮打滚，特别好玩儿…所以有些入迷了，没跟上。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Dealing with The Withering will be a piece of cake once I have a Vision. ｜ 有了神之眼，那对付死域不就是小菜一碟嘛。
- Although the Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering is the main organization involved in clockwork meka research and design, there are also many independent engineers and workshops that are not affiliated with the Research Institute.\nThe first ever machine of this type was designed by an independent engineer to commemorate their lover and sponsor. In the end, it was acquired by the Maison Gardiennage as a tool to uphold municipal security — or, as some would have it, state apparatus enforcing the monopoly on violence. ｜ 尽管枫丹动能工程科学研究院是最为主要的发条机械研究与设计机构，坊间也有许多不隶属于科学院的工程师与独立工坊。\n这种机械起初是为一名独立工程师为纪念情人及赞助者而设计制造的。它最终被执律庭选中并采购作为城市安全或称公共暴力机构的武器之一。
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- Comin' at ya! ｜ 正面偷袭！
- A misunderstanding, you say? If so, then tell me, why are you hiding here? ｜ 误会？非要说有什么误会的话，可能是你们埋伏的地方太容易引起误会了吧。
- Guess what? Paimon just thought of the best Mora-making idea ever! ｜ 嘿嘿，你听我说哦。我发现了一个不得了的发财机会！
- How long is the hunt over for? ｜ 会休猎到什么时候？
- And he helps you protect this place? ｜ 他也在帮你守护这里？
- Well, no sign of Mona. Lisa isn't in, either. ｜ 图书馆里好像没见到莫娜呢，丽莎小姐也不在。
- Now, let's reorganize the information that everyone just recalled. This might take quite some time, and might be somewhat hard on our throats. ｜ 现在，我们来整理一下大家刚才想起的情报吧。可能会花些时间，也一定很费嗓子。

- You worship the Anemo Archon? ｜ 你在向风神祈祷？

- We can eat anything that you desire. Whatever your imagination can conjure, one's machine can surely cook. ｜ 至于要吃什么菜，你就尽管发挥想象力吧。本仙为你实现。
- Doing nothing is the happiest thing. ｜ 没有什么事，就是最快乐的事。
- The boundless favor of the Sacred Sakura fills the air, and the Electrograna that often accompany you on your journey have grown sufficiently, and should prove to be of aid to you in future adventures in Inazuma. ｜ 神樱无边无际的眷顾充盈在大气中，常常与你同行的雷种子也得到了长足的成长。在稻妻的冒险想必会无往不利吧。
- Nymph's Constancy ｜ 水仙的时时刻刻
- Hmm, I don't know where else to start... ｜ 唔，那就真的没什么头绪了…
- So crisp and refreshing! ｜ 很清新的口感。

- ♩~ ｜ ♩~
- Mid-Air Normal Attack DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 空中普通攻击伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Ah, the Windblume Festival has its origins in Old Mondstadt and the days of the Lord of the Tower. Nowadays, no one knows what the Windblume truly is. ｜ 风花节起源于烈风高塔之王时期的「旧蒙德」，「风之花」是哪种花已经找不到记载了…
- Don't bother reading it. It's boring and long-winded. ｜ 没看的话也别看了，都是些无聊的啰嗦话。
- Once upon a time, there was an evil researcher who went into the mountains and did a crazy experiment on whopperflowers to transform their appearance. After a lot of pain and suffering, the whopperflowers finally took on a human form. Then, they stood by the side of the mountain to wait for unsuspecting bypassers... ｜ 从前有一个邪恶的学者，抓着山上的骗骗花进行改造，这些骗骗花带着痛苦变成了人的样子，站在山路旁等着过往行人…
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- Sigewinne, we've brought him — and he seems to have taken a turn for the worse again. ｜ 护士长，人已经带过来了，他的情况好像又恶化了。
- ??? ｜ ???
- Tupac's Grip ｜ 图帕克之握
- Hmm, let's make the dish for Miss Tang Wen after deciding! ｜ 嗯~想好了就赶紧做给汤雯小姐吧！
- Hmm, I quite like the environment. The temperature and humidity are both near perfect. It's a very fitting place for a leisurely vacation. ｜ 嗯，环境很好，温度和湿度都无可挑剔，是适合悠闲度日的地方。
- Springtime Folding Screen: Fragrance Fills the Air ｜ 春曦屏风-「满庭芳」
- The wind never blows in the Sanctuary of Surasthana... Oh, sorry. That's probably obvious to you. ｜ 宫殿里可不会起风呢…哦，抱歉，对你来说是理所当然的知识吧。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}

- Water these three seeds first, and I'll think about what to do about the fertilizer. ｜ 先给这三颗种子浇点水吧，施肥的事情我再想办法。
- Ei ｜ 影
- We only need to find an opportunity to switch the capsules. Once it's been entered into the Akasha on Jnagarbha Day, if someone were to be seen performing in public... ｜ 只要找到机会将两枚罐装知识替换，等「识藏日」录入后，再找人违反那条「艺术禁令」…
- Ready... ｜ 预备…
- What are you two yammering about? ｜ 鬼鬼祟祟嘀咕什么呢？！
- Do you have a Vision, by any chance? ｜ 你拥有「神之眼」吗？

- (That voice... is that Citlali?) ｜ 这个声音…茜特菈莉？

- Thank you, but you've already done enough. ｜ 多谢，但你们已经为我做的足够多了。

- Huh. That reminds Paimon of the curious abilities used by people with Geo Visions. ｜ 唔…就和拥有岩元素神之眼的人能操使的奇怪力量差不多吧…？

- Why are you so afraid of her? We're all Operatives, aren't we? ｜ 你那么怕她吗？我们都是干部啊！
- Okay, then Paimon'll have strict requirements for herself... starting tomorrow! ｜ 好哦，那就从明天开始对自己严格要求吧！
- Message ｜ 留言
- A dessert with a romantic flair. The meringue has been baked to form a passable shape — albeit after several failed attempts that resulted in suspicious, burnt lumps. Unfortunately though, the cooking took so long that the Bulle Fruit now grimaces with frustration and no longer tastes sweet. ｜ 散发着浪漫气息的甜点。在烤糊多次蛋白霜之后，好不容易做出了还算是不错的外形。但由于花费的时间过多，泡泡桔片已经哭丧起了脸，变得不再香甜。
- What are you doing here again? ｜ 你在这里做什么呢？
- Make Delicious Jueyun Chili Chicken ｜ 制作「美味的香嫩椒椒鸡」
- Alright! What's on the scroll this time... Looks like a broken bow, covered in flames... ｜ 出来了！这次的织物…好像是一张碎掉的弓，在火焰里燃烧着…
- If it wasn't for his determination, both he and his brother would have been defeated by Coatlicue in the final battle. ｜ 要是他没这么坚强，那最终决战的时候，他们两个肯定都会被科亚特利库埃打倒！
- Well, that eccentric Aranara we met before also said that Bija is yielded from the extraction of memories and dreams. ｜ 这么说来，之前我们遇到了那个风格和别人不同的兰那罗，也说过…惟耶之实是抽取记忆和梦想结出来的…
- "Ouranides of Ouranopolis" ｜ 「乌兰诺珀里斯的乌兰依代」
- Receiving a Gift: II ｜ 收到赠礼·其二
- It seems that you are very busy yourself. But this is not a bad thing, for the more we toil, the more we sweat, and the more keenly we feel the winds of Barbatos. ｜ 看来你也是个忙碌的人呢。不过这样也好，借助着辛勤的汗水，才能更清晰地感受到巴巴托斯大人的风。
- Wait a second... That person, it's... Dainsleif! ｜ 等等，那个身影是…戴因斯雷布！
- Continue exploring ｜ 继续向前探查

- Very well. Looks like borrowing it is not going to be possible. We're simply going to have to steal it. ｜ 那么，看来明借是行不通的，只能巧取了。
- The Forge Realm's Temper: Game of Wits ｜ 铸境研炼·奕思巧战
- This pot used to carry concentrated and extremely potent concoctions. It is now empty, but still gives off a strong smell of medicine. ｜ 原本装满了提炼后极浓的药汁，如今只剩下浓烈的药味。

- We captured them all, and the goods were retrieved and brought back here. ｜ 被我们一网打尽，货物也全部收缴回来了，都在这了。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You compare me to the cats in town? Such... Hmph. Follow closely and try not to get lost, then. ｜ 居然将我和镇上的猫相提并论吗，真是…可不要跟丢了哦。
- The settlement of the tribe who live alongside the Tatankasaurs, known as the "Collective of Plenty." Volcanic ash has bestowed upon them fertile lands whose golden harvests sway in the wind and symbolize the rich bounty that the collective has been blessed with. ｜ 与突角龙共同生活，名为「沃陆之邦」的部族聚落处。火山的余灰带给他们肥沃的土地，在这里，象征富饶的金穗在部族民的双手之中随风摆动。
- Character Movement SPD slowed by 30% for 3s after being hit by Big Bad Barrages ｜ 角色被坏坏弹幕命中后的一段时间内，移动速度降低30%，持续3秒
- Many Oaths of Dawn and Dusk ｜ 诸多朝与暮的誓约
- And, I am also very fortunate to have you to accompany me and find the answers. ｜ 而且我也很庆幸，能有你们陪我一同找出答案。
- The Hidden Ebb and Flow ｜ 盈虚藏象
- Golden Night's Bustle ｜ 黄金之夜的喧嚣
- A dish that requires great precision to make. The finely diced chicken breast is stirred vigorously and added into a soup with various other minced meats, before being cooked over a small flame. The result is light and elegant, and it tastes like tofu pudding. The meat is presented in such a form that the experience of consuming it is like tasting the finest chicken one has ever eaten, yet without appearing to have eaten chicken at all. This is part of Liyue's culinary fine arts. ｜ 制作精细的菜肴。将鸡脯肉剁至细腻，搅至上劲，加入以多种肉茸扫过的清汤中，小火慢煲。成品清新淡雅，色泽洁白，吃起来有豆花的感觉。将荤料制成素形，「吃鸡不见鸡、但又胜似鸡」，也属璃月的一种烹饪美学。
- Gesine said <color=#00E1FFFF>Liyue Harbor</color> was just up ahead. We should go check it out when we have time! ｜ 听格茜妮说，前面就是<color=#00E1FFFF>璃月港</color>，有空我们也去看看吧！
- Confident ｜ 自信
- Rather, she sees that period of entrapment as an experimental error. As a researcher, she must accept everything that results from her experiments, even if they don't fall within expectations. ｜ 她视被困百年为一场实验中的失误。作为一名学者，理应接受实验带来的一切结果…不管这个结果，是否符合自己的预期。
- They sound pretty dangerous... ｜ 听上去都挺危险的呢…
- Tch, it's called being a professional. I'm a bodyguard, and I work for whoever's paying. ｜ 啧，我是保镖啊，而且现在小姐还花钱雇了我，这叫职业素养。
- Itzcuin was confident when he spoke, and didn't seem like one to purposely lie. But Tozan... Now that's an experienced liar. ｜ 伊茨昆说话时很自信，也不像是刻意撒谎的人。但托赞不一样，他是很擅长说谎的人。
- Someone that aggressive doesn't seem like the type to take advice from anyone. Why would he give up so easily...? ｜ 看他之前一直气势汹汹的样子，不像是会听人劝的类型呢。怎么刚才放弃得这么干脆…
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Ah, back from your intrepid adventure, I see... So, what did you manage to find? ｜ 哦，总算回来了，怎么样，买到什么东西了？
- Seems like we've got a bunch of correspondence between the higher-ups... ｜ 看上去好像是一些书信往来的片段…
- That's pretty amazing... ｜ 好神奇…
- Defeat all of the malfunctioning meka ｜ 打倒所有失控的机关

- We're here to make certain somebodies run on back to their mommies. ｜ 我们是来送某些人回家喝奶的。
- So, young one, do you think that the things recorded on these three fragments are true? ｜ 怎么？年轻人，你觉得这三枚碎片记载的东西是真的？
- The Pilgrimage is a competition that represents the highest honor to us Natlanese. Only the mightiest warriors stand a chance of attaining ultimate victory! ｜ 归火圣夜巡礼在我们纳塔是象征着至高荣耀的赛事，只有最强大的战士才能取得最后的胜利！
- Time Remaining: #2#s ｜ 剩余时间：#2#秒
- Yes, Ma'am! ｜ 是！
- Now that the door to the Oasis is open to the Tanit, we must keep it a secret from outsiders... ｜ 如今，「永恒绿洲」的门户已经向塔尼特洞开，我们必须保证它不为外人所知…
- Little Zuo ｜ 阿佐
- ...Tepal, I don't know where you are right now, so I don't know how to reach you... My best bet is to send this letter to the Flower-Feather Clan. ｜ …特帕尔，我不知道你现在人在哪里，这封信又该寄到哪里…我只能赌一赌，把信寄到花羽会来。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- It's... Katheryne again. This one must be a puppet too... ｜ 又，又是凯瑟琳。这一位应该也是「人偶」吧…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Hehe, you sure do care about your friends, don'cha? ｜ 嘿嘿，赫卡真的很关心朋友呢。
- Okay. Let's see how it goes... ｜ 那我看看情况吧…
- ...You mean, the people who got stuck because of the Goddess's magic? ｜ …是指那些被魔法困住的人吗？
- No list would suffice to record the horrible things you've done. ｜ 我就不必列举了吧？这家伙做的坏事数都数不清。
- Here? In the Fortress? ｜ 欸？在这里？在梅洛彼得堡？
- Ryuuji? ｜ 龙二？
- Then it's settled! Excellent, all of our problems have been solved. ｜ 就这么办！太棒了，一切问题都得到了解决。
- Hey...! ｜ 喂…！
- If you would just think for a moment, it should be pretty obvious why we are here. Yet now you're intentionally trying to provoke me? ｜ 那种事情随便想一想就明白了吧，还需要特意向我挑衅吗？
- ... ｜ ……
- #It would be my pleasure to join you for a match. However, I can't borrow {NICKNAME}'s deck forever. Our match might have to wait until after I manage to obtain my own Casket of Tomes. ｜ #我很乐意。不过，我也不能一直借用{NICKNAME}的牌组，对局可能要等我拿到自己的「秘典之盒」后才行。

- Gain <color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color> All Elemental DMG Bonus. Obtain the Tireless Hunt effect after hitting an opponent with a Charged Attack. Only 1 instance of Tireless Hunt can be gained every 12s. ｜ 获得<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>所有元素伤害加成。重击命中敌人后，将获得「无休止的狩猎」：重击造成的伤害值提高，提高值相当于元素精通数值的<color=#99FFFFFF>200%</color>。该效果将在生效12次或10秒后消失，每12秒至多获得一次无休止的狩猎。

- Housekeeping, you say... ｜ 家政课啊…
- Hmph... And I was the one using unsafe materials, Uther? ｜ 厄舍这家伙，还敢说我的用料有问题。

- Choo-Choo Cart platform unlocked ｜ 「呼呼飞车」站台已解锁
- Odds are one to one-point-zero-five. Both sides are quite evenly matched in strength... But I'm hoping Gigadrill takes the win. ｜ 赔率是一比一点零五，嗯，两者的实力很接近…真希望「极钻」能赢啊。
- Activation Cost|{param5:P} Current HP ｜ 技能消耗|{param5:P}当前生命值
- Figure it out... ｜ 想办法…
- Yup. It's just like soap bubbles that rise to the water's surface. ｜ 嗯，它就像是皂角在水里扬起的泡泡一样。
- You are a high-profile figure within the Knights of Favonius. As his commanding officer, I have a duty to make sure no misunderstandings arise between you. ｜ 你是骑士团的重要人物，我作为他的长官，有义务防止你们误解彼此。
- I have found something! ｜ 嫣朵拉我发现了！
- I gaze up at the moon and lend my ear to the gentle breeze, with wine in my cup and peace in my heart... Have a wonderful evening. ｜ 抬头见月，侧耳听风，壶中有酒，我心太平…\n晚上好。
- Crystal Marrow...? What's that? ｜ 「晶化骨髓」是…？
- Oh, but fortunately for you, it appears your savior has just arrived. ｜ 哎呀，你真走运，你的救星来了。
- Elemental Skill: III ｜ 元素战技·其三
- #No worries, {NICKNAME}'ll definitely be able to catch it again! ｜ #嗯嗯，没关系，{NICKNAME}一定会把鱼抓回来的。
- I don't get it... ｜ 想不通…
- No more than {param2} Lil' Fungi retreated ｜ 小小灵蕈退场数量不超过{param2}
- Lore reportedly passed down within a lost religious group in the desert. Someone has transcribed it into a script. ｜ 传说是失落的沙漠教团流传的歌谣，不知由何人录成文稿。
- (Ugh... It's so humid here. Feels awful.) ｜ （唔呃…好潮湿…难受死了。）
- You gain a maximum of 1 Boulder Receiver effect.\nWhen you gain 1/2/3 stacks of this effect, your characters gain a <color=#faeb8d>Geo DMG Bonus</color> of {0}%/{1}%/{2}% respectively for <color=#faeb8d>12</color>s. ｜ 至多获得1项「磐石应振晶」映射效果\n该效果叠加至1/2/3层时，角色分别获得{0}%/{1}%/{2}%<color=#faeb8d>岩元素伤害加成</color>，持续<color=#faeb8d>12</color>秒。
- Plume of the Changing Winds ｜ 迁风的苍翎
- It's a real shame that Qucusaurus got away. That quality would fetch top Mora, no doubt about it... ｜ 真可惜，被刚才那只绒翼龙逃走了。以它的品相，肯定能卖个好价钱…
- Turns out even our regrets were exactly the same... ｜ 原来就连我们的遗憾，都是如此相似…
- A two-story Liyue-style house that is a lot more spacious than it looks. An ordinary family could live here without feeling too tightly packed at all. And if you happen to be living in this sort of house with several other tenants, then you can take it as an opportunity to hone your social skills. ｜ 双层璃月民房，内部面积远比外观宽敞。寻常家庭在此生活起居，完全不会感到拥挤。若是与其他租客同住在这种房屋中，则能充分锻炼待人接物的技巧。
- The sound has completely stopped... ｜ 到这里为止，声音完全消失了…
- Yeah, what's going on? Do you know Lyris, Caterpillar? ｜ 对啊对啊，这是怎么回事？卡特皮拉你认识莉利丝吗？
- Oh! So the pictures are moving because it's actually a score? ｜ 哦！原来因为是「曲谱」，上面的图案才会一动一动的吗？
- ...It's been so long, I almost didn't recognize you, Edgar. ｜ …这么多年不见，真是完全认不出你了啊，艾德加。
- I've heard that Mr. Vsevolod's orders have kept him from going home to his family in Snezhnaya for a very long time now. ｜ 我听人说，弗谢沃洛德先生一直因为命令在外奔波，已经很久没有回过至冬陪过家人了。
- Never mind... ｜ 还是算了…
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。
- The robot's severed arm must have broken the entrance to the underground ruins open. Well, at least it wasn't completely useless. ｜ 看来大机器人断掉的手臂真的把通往地下遗迹的入口砸开了。总算还是发挥了一点作用嘛。
- It was Guthred, wasn't it? ｜ 就是古瑟雷德的灵魂？
- Huh, that won't do! Don't flatter me just because I'm your boss! ｜ 哎，不行，你这属于下属乱拍上司马屁了。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param11:P}/{param12:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param11:P}/{param12:P}
- Faced with such an unexpected development, what will the crew of the Black Nacre do? ｜ 面对突如其来的意外，「黑水晶」号的众人会作何反应呢？
- Yup, that's the wok, alright! Wait for me! ｜ #就是这种大大的锅，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_CUTEBIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_CUTEBIGSISTER]}你等一下…
- Will you be sticking around? ｜ 你要留在这里吗？
- After finishing the drink... ｜ 喝下饮料之后。
- So of course, the most direct result of our research is that we can use the "age" and "life" of these anomalous Electro growths to determine the size and origin of Electro anomalies. ｜ 当然啦，最直接的研究成果，自然是通过雷元素异常增生物的「寿命」与「年龄」，估算出雷元素异常的范围与起始点。
- You're back. Do you have the Maushiro? ｜ 你回来了。木簧笛拿到了吗？
- Poor boy, he's been acting more anxious than usual lately, and is always looking outside. And I thought he just wanted someone to take him for a walk... ｜ 最近太郎丸总是很着急的样子，经常望向外面，我还以为是它想出去散步…
- Okay, this should be... *cough* This should be enough... just keep it away from me! Oof, my nose can't take it! ｜ 咳…咳，这样应该就…可以了…拿远一点！我的鼻子要失灵了…
- An article said the south side of this line shows "the order of law," while the north shows "the advance of science." But if you ask me, that article was just trying to create opposition between the two. ｜ 有篇文章说，这条航路的南侧是「安全的法律」，北侧则是「激进的科学」。但我想，这篇文章只是在刻意制造对立罢了。
- Well, if you're enjoying our hospitality, feel free to stay with us as long as you like... ｜ 喜欢的话，两位可以在花羽会里多留一会儿…
- This is long overdue. ｜ 这项工作，该划掉了。
- Sefana ｜ 瑟法娜

- This is the way of Natlan — the way of heroes. Do you understand? ｜ 这是纳塔的做法，英雄的做法，明白吗？
- Hey, Ms. Linlang, sorry to bother you — Zhiyi ordered a wineware set from you not long ago, right? ｜ 打扰一下，琳琅老板。我记得知易前不久在你这订购了一套酒具？
- Plunge DMG|{param8:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param8:F1P}
- Beware, brave warrior. ｜ 勇士啊，请小心。
- Criminal's Testimony ｜ 犯人的口供
- An unreasonable bunch... ｜ 完全没道理…
- Mom says we just have to all shout out where we want to go at the same time, and poof! We'll be there in the blink of an eye. ｜ 信上说，只要大家一起大声喊出想去的地方，就能像眨个眼睛一样，咻地到达。
- #Hello, {NICKNAME}! How've you been? ｜ #你好，{NICKNAME}！最近过得如何？

- Kamisato Ayato shifts positions and enters the Takimeguri Kanka state.\nAfter this shift, he will leave a watery illusion at his original location. After it is formed, the watery illusion will explode if opponents are nearby or after its duration ends, dealing <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Takimeguri Kanka</color>\nIn this state, Kamisato Ayato uses his Shunsuiken to engage in blindingly fast attacks, causing DMG from his Normal Attacks to be converted into <color=#80C0FFFF>AoE Hydro DMG</color>. This cannot be overridden.\nIt also has the following properties:\n·After a Shunsuiken attack hits an opponent, it will grant Ayato the Namisen effect, increasing the DMG dealt by Shunsuiken based on Ayato's current Max HP. The initial maximum number of Namisen stacks is 4, and 1 stack can be gained through Shunsuiken every 0.1s. This effect will be dispelled when Takimeguri Kanka ends.\n·Kamisato Ayato's resistance to interruption is increased.\n·Unable to use Charged or Plunging Attacks.\n\nTakimeguri Kanka will be cleared when Ayato leaves the field. Using Kamisato Art: Kyouka again while in the Takimeguri Kanka state will reset and replace the pre-existing state.\n\n<i>"When, I wonder, did you come under the illusion that you were winning?"</i>\n<i>— Ayato is like this in both matter of martial prowess and political intrigue, but to preserve the dignity of his fellow Commissioners, he does not say such things to them. As such, only Thoma, Itto, and Ayaka have ever heard this line.</i> ｜ 神里绫人垫步移动并进入「泷廻鉴花」状态。\n移动后，神里绫人原本的位置上将产生「水影」。水影完全形成后，将在附近存在敌人或持续时间结束时破裂，造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>泷廻鉴花</color>\n在此状态下，神里绫人将使用瞬水剑进行迅速的攻击，将普通攻击造成的伤害转为无法被附魔覆盖的<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素范围伤害</color>。\n此外，具有如下效果：\n·瞬水剑攻击命中敌人后，将为神里绫人赋予「浪闪」效果，基于神里绫人自己当前的生命值上限，提升瞬水剑造成的伤害。浪闪初始至多叠加4层，每0.1秒至多通过瞬水剑攻击获得一层，将在泷廻鉴花状态结束时消失。\n·提高神里绫人的抗打断能力；\n·无法施放重击与下落攻击。\n\n泷廻鉴花状态将在神里绫人退场时解除；处于泷廻鉴花状态下时再次施放神里流·镜花，将移除已有的泷廻鉴花状态。\n\n<i>「你什么时候产生了自己得手的错觉？」</i>\n<i>——不止是武艺，权谋之事上也是如此。但是为了照顾其他两方奉行大人的颜面，这句话不方便说出来。因此只有托马、一斗和绫华听过。</i>
- Stance Change DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 状态激发伤害|{param1:P}

- "The dads..." That's how I refer to all the older adventurers in Mondstadt. Apparently, I was an orphan kid that they rescued from the most perilous situation ever. How cool is that? I have such terrible luck all the time, and yet I was rescued against the odds and survived all this time. It's a miracle if you ask me. ｜ 「老爹们」…这是我对蒙德的老冒险家们的叫法，听说我是他们在非常险恶的绝境中捡到的孤儿。很奇妙对吧？明明我的运气这么差，居然能被人捡到还活到了现在，简直是奇迹啊。
- I am the Jibashiri Kurai. Are you here to help solve the problem of these small orbs of thunder? ｜ 我乃地走官·久濑。你们是过来处理这些小雷球问题的帮手吗？

- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Gosoythoth? What's that? ｜ 古斯托特？那是什么？
- I've had enough! ｜ 我受够了！
- You come to the desert to find the parts needed to fix Karkata... ｜ 为了找到维修卡卡塔所需的部件，你们来到沙漠之中…
- ... ｜ ……

- Day After Tomorrow ｜ +2日

- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得

- The next time this character acts, they will immediately use the Skill <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S74054]</color>. ｜ 本角色将在下次行动时，直接使用技能：<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S74054]</color>。
- Don't be naïve! I'll remind you that your job is to collect taxes and fees, not to promote business. ｜ 幼稚的想法！你的工作是什么？是征收税费，而不是推动商业。

- No, we have to strike now! He was greatly weakened when I managed to break out of his control. If we let him rest, he might have time to escape. ｜ 不，现在…现在才是最好的时机！我摆脱控制之后，他非常虚弱，如果给予其喘息的机会，他很有可能会逃离那个藏身之处。
- Huh? What are you yapping about? ｜ 嗯？你们在叫唤什么？
- Little Mao's met other adepti? ｜ 小茂认得其他的仙人？
- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- Pl—Please, you two, have mercy on me, I beg you... If you say any more, I fear my fingers shall crush the hilt of my sword... ｜ 二位，二位…你们就饶了我，饶了我吧，你们再说下去，我的手指就要把剑柄给捏碎了…
- I was abandoned, like you. I lived here for a while at first, but... There's nothing for us here. We can't stay... ｜ 跟你一样，我也被人遗弃了。那时我就住在这里。…不是什么好地方，我们不会搬到这里来。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Wow, didn't expect to see you again. Hello there! ｜ 你好！想不到又能见面，真开心！
- "My son Zhang is a sturdy young man with a gentle personality, adept both in company and in the kitchen. He has a home in Liyue Harbor where he runs an honest family business making weapons, some of the finest you will see." ｜ 「犬子章某。体格健壮性格温柔，上得厅堂下得厨房。在璃月港有稳定店面住房，以打制神兵利器为业，祖传工艺，童叟无欺。」
- Rusty sword. ｜ 生锈的大剑

### Part 010

- Accomplices... You make it sound like she's committing a crime... ｜ 同谋者…听起来就像是犯罪了一样…

- Well, here's the thing... Because of my previous experience with adventurers, I'm more perceptive about things that happen outside the tribe. ｜ 嗯，是这样的啦…因为先前在冒险队的经验，所以我对部族外的事物有更敏感的洞察力。
- Huh? What are we doing here again? ｜ 我们又回来了？

- There was no combat during the drive. ｜ 行驶中没有战斗。
- Well, it wasn't right anyway, taking the record without consent. You should return it. ｜ 擅自把人家的唱片拿过来，这样不对。快点还回去吧。

- The place that Asagiri wants to take a picture of appears to be nearby... ｜ 朝雾想要「留影」的地点，似乎就在这附近…
- Now then, leave the rest to me. ｜ 那么，接下来的事情，就请交给我吧。
- Starfell Sword ｜ 星陨剑
- Yes, that's the one! I can't stand that fellow, but I can't get rid of him... so I look for excuses and go on missions to get away from him. ｜ 是啊！我实在是受不了那家伙了！但是又没有办法解决掉他，只好找个借口，主动外出执行任务，以便从他身边逃开——
- Dori mentioned something even more concerning, though. Apparently, the craftsman made another gem just like this one. ｜ 但更令我在意的，是多莉小姐说还有一块与它相似的宝石。
- It was a story well told. ｜ 不错的故事。
- There are more merchant caravans than usual traveling the route between Dornman Port and Mondstadt City during the festival. Extra traffic means extra security is required. ｜ 佳酿节期间，荆夫港和蒙德城之间的商队来往频繁，正是需要加强戒备的时候。
- Martial Artist's Wine Cup ｜ 武人的酒杯
- Dehya: Stalwart and True ｜ 迪希雅·崇诚之真
- Reach a testing score of 20,000 ｜ 测试评分达到20000
- So that's what happened... That silly girl's already... ｜ 原来是这样…傻丫头…原来她已经…
- Rashnu will definitely be happy to answer us when she hears her favorite music. ｜ 听到自己喜欢的乐声，拉沙鲁一定会愿意回应我们的，嘿嘿。
- #It seems that you know your way around a sword, {M#young man}{F#young lady}, but you do look a little... frail. If we see each other on the field, don't blame me for not going easy, haha! ｜ #{M#小兄弟}{F#小姑娘}，看你也像也是个舞刀弄剑的，不过这身板可欠点火候啊。要是赛场上碰见，可别怪咱下手重啊，哈哈哈哈。
- Oh, you're still here? Looks like your passion for beetle fighting has fully blossomed... ｜ 哦，你们还在这里啊？看来你们对斗虫的热情已经彻底被激发出来了呢…
- What the heck? That's a strange-looking Saurian... Or wait, is it even a Saurian? ｜ 这、这是什么东西？好奇怪的龙，不对，它是龙吗？
- A Kalpalata Lotus motif that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 劫波莲样式的纹样，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Huh? You serious...? ｜ 啊？这…
- O—Okay... I see. I'll give it some more thought... Hmm, then again, what IS the use of this thing? I'm the one who came up with it, and even I can't think of a potential application... ｜ 这、这样啊…那我再想想…话说回来，这东西有什么用来着？怎么我自己也想不到呢…
- About the Grand Bazaar... ｜ 关于大巴扎…
- Childishly Written Message ｜ 笔迹稚拙的留言
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- It's a long story... ｜ 说来话长。
- I have great affection for the arts: music, song, poetry, shougi, and dancing. And you? ｜ 风雅之物我都很喜欢：雅乐诗词、棋艺与舞蹈。你也感兴趣吗？
- Oh! Paimon gets it. It's that feeling of home! ｜ 哦！我懂了，这就是「家乡的感觉」对吧！
- What about the Tone-Deaf Bard? ｜ 那么，卖唱的呢？
- Use Theme ｜ 使用该主题
- Windtrace Coin bonus for fellow Rebels freed ｜ 营救游侠次数的「迷踪币」加成
- Putting forth the last remnants of its power, the prized Isshin blade exhorts Kaedehara Kazuha to go to the anvil in the smithy. Its final wish is to be reforged at the cost of everything that comprises its present consciousness. At its instruction, Kazuha hammers and forges, and the red blade slowly regains its luster. In this manner is the Isshin Art at last revived and continued... ｜ 「一心传名刀」动用所剩无几的力量驱使枫原万叶走到锻冶屋内的铁砧旁。它最后的心愿是以自身所有的意识为代价重铸身躯。在它的指引下，枫原万叶拿起铁锤反复锤锻，红色刀刃逐渐恢复光彩。如此这般，「一心传」的锻冶之技终于得到延续…
- Rama ｜ 拉玛
- Spread Out Less Than an Arcminute! ｜ 散布小于一角分！
- You're the one giving the orders. ｜ 下命令的是你。
- Please visit again tomorrow, Traveler! ｜ 旅行者，请你明天再过来吧！
- What are you looking to buy, Traveler? I'm afraid that we may be somewhat out of stock. ｜ 旅行者，你是想买什么吗？抱歉，现在店里可能有些缺货…
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So in Natlan, warriors who impress the Wayob enough get an Ancient Name. Paimon's so jealous! Having an Ancient Name would be so cool!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Huh? Don't you already have a bucket load of titles, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hmm? Oh wait... Yeah, you're right!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon's your "best travel companion" and "trusty guide," plus she's the "Trendy Flyer," "Silver Companion," and "Assistant to the Honorary Senior Researcher"... Heck yeah, Paimon's an actual legend!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> If the people of Natlan end up making a record of our adventures, Paimon's gonna make sure they use every single one of those titles!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Huh? But wouldn't that make everything too long?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Just think about it. If the locals also used all of their names, records would look something like:\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> On this day, "Uthabiti" Kachina of the Children of Echoes, otherwise known as the Nanatzcayans, and "Umoja" Mualani of the People of the Springs, of Meztli fame, encountered "Malipo" Kinich of the Scions of the Canopy of Huitztlan, traveling alongside his impish partner, K'uhul Ajaw, while on their way to the Masters of the Night-Wind in Mictlan...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Okay, okay, you can stop now! Geez, with a document that long, it'd stretch from here to the Stadium and back... and that's before it even got to the point!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well, if Paimon had to pick just one out of all her titles... Yep, it'd have to be: "Best companion ever"! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>据说被大灵认可并且选中的纳塔战士会获得「古名」呢，真羡慕…要是我也能有自己的「古名」就好了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>欸？可是派蒙不是已经有很多称号了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>咦？是哦！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我可是你「最好的伙伴」和「非常可靠的向导」，同时还是「荣誉高级研究员助理」、「时髦飞行家」和「白银伴星」…这样想想，真是不得了的大英雄！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果纳塔人要记录我和{NICKNAME}在这里的冒险，我要把这些称号都用上！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>欸？这样不会太长了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>想一想，如果纳塔人也把他们的称号都用上，织物就会变成这样…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「这一天，『回声之子』纳茨卡延的『乌沙博蒂』的卡齐娜，和她热情的朋友，『流泉之众』梅兹特利的『沃摩延』的玛拉妮，在去往『烟谜主』米克特兰的路上，遇见了『悬木人』维茨特兰的『马力卜』的基尼奇，和他狡诈的伙伴，『库胡勒阿乔』…」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>停停停！说了这么多，都够从这里一直铺到圣火竞技场，再铺回来了…可是根本还没讲到关键信息啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔，如果只能选一个称号的话…果然还是只要「最好的伙伴」好了！
- But I'm tougher than nails! Haha! ｜ 但我命硬，哈哈！
- You look like you're about to fall asleep! I feel terrible. It was me who invited you for a drink, and here I am wasting your time... ｜ 看你的样子都要睡着了，真是抱歉，明明是我提出的请你喝饮料，却浪费了你这么长时间…

- Pomum de Ambra Chapter: Act I ｜ 香氛瓶之章 第一幕
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is a mysterious melody from Natlan. ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含着来自纳塔的神秘旋律。
- I know where Zohrah Mushroom is, I take you there! ｜ 我知道「须罗蕈」在哪里，我带你们去！

- So why... why am I crying? ｜ 可是为什么…我好像在哭呢？

- But the truth was not as complicated as he believed. Each person's fate is charted by their wishes, and the possibilities are not so great in number in the first place. ｜ 但事实上并没有他想的那样复杂。每个人的命途说到底是被他们的愿望所锚定的，从一开始便不存在那么多的可能。
- Oh, you mean Kinich! ｜ 哦，是基尼奇！
- Sumeru's a big place with lots of researchers, so we've got new work coming in every day. We're basically working round the clock at this point. ｜ 须弥这么大，学者这么多，每天都不断地有新活进来，我们几乎都在连轴转了…
- Well, if you have time, we do need a judge... ｜ 唔，如果你有空的话，我们确实需要一个负责评判味道高低的裁判…
- Certified player Lan. She is a Branch Master of the Adventurers' Guild, and her skills at cards are as fearsome as her sword-arm. ｜ 协会认证牌手岚姐。冒险家协会分会长，她的牌技与她的剑法一样凌厉。
- Capture! ｜ 捕获！

- Based on my understanding of astrology, it shouldn't be too hard to teach a cat to read the various aspects of the stars. I might even... teach one to help me write manuscripts...? ｜ 凭我对星象学的理解，教会猫猫看懂星象，似乎也不是难事，甚至还能…让猫猫帮我写稿？
- That's right, Uncle Tanger! ｜ 没错，就是那个丹吉尔先生！
- Tartaglia ｜ 达达利亚
- I'll make sure it doesn't get away this time. ｜ 有我在，它就没可能再从你眼前消失一次了。

- "Fill up the barrels and store them away,\nThen wait, wait for a windier day.\nWax the bottles, seal them tight,\nFor the south wind that soothes, for the north wind that bites." ｜ 「我们把这些东西封进桶，\n等啊，等啊，等着风起涌。\n把佳酿的瓶口先蜡上，\n南风和煦，北风猛。」

- He's always hanging around these parts. I swear he does it just to show off to any outlanders that might come this way. Don't let his size fool you, though. He's just a big softie! ｜ 它每天都在这里绕圈，就好像特地要给外地人留下深刻印象，顺便也炫耀它健硕的大身板！
- No. The mire could not be traversed by human strength. ｜ 否。泥泞并不是用人力能够越过的。
- All I did was touch a Statue of The Seven. ｜ 我只是碰了碰七天神像。
- We Melusines are Monsieur Neuvillette's familiars, but that doesn't mean he shows us any favor beyond what is fair and legal. I willingly accepted when he put me on trial, and I fully agreed with his verdict. I remember the day I left for the Fortress of Meropide, it was raining really hard. But I didn't feel like the raindrops were cold at all. They were warm and gentle, just like the way Monsieur Neuvillette looks at me... ｜ 美露莘是那维莱特先生的眷属，但不代表他会给予我们超出律法和公正的偏爱。当初我乖乖接受了那维莱特先生的审判，我认同他的判决。还记得出发去梅洛彼得堡那天下了好大好大的雨，但我一点都不觉得雨点冰冷，反而非常温润，就像那维莱特先生的目光一样…

- You can do it! ｜ 加油！
- I'll pay you based on Adventurers' Guild rules. Let's get going, shall we? ｜ 报酬还是按照冒险家的规矩来算。我们立刻出发吧。
- ...to make that choice on another living being's behalf. ｜ 代替其他生命做出这样的选择。
- Aw, man... How are we supposed to know? ｜ 呃，这我怎么知道…
- Weren't you gonna sign some autographs? ｜ 凯亚不签名了？
- Is this some kind of new scam? ｜ 是什么新型诈骗吗…
- Forest Elder ｜ 森林的长老
- As soon as Paimon saw your shadow, she thought straight away: What a cute hat! ｜ 刚才看到影子的时候就觉得宽宽的帽檐很可爱！
- I'm almost done working with these commercials. After this, it's "nose to the grindstone" — I'll start work on my next film. Let's keep chasing our dreams even as we go our separate ways, eh? ｜ 手头的广告片都完成得差不多了，接下来我该为拍出下一部长篇，继续焦头烂额了。咱们不见面的时候，就各自为梦想努力吧！
- #Whew! That really hit the spot. {NICKNAME}, wanna get some air? The view in this place is pretty good. ｜ #呼！真痛快，{NICKNAME}，跟我一起出去吹吹风怎么样？这轻策庄的风景可不赖。
- That's right. You just weren't paying attention, Ms. Gendou. ｜ 对呀，因为玄冬小姐一副心不在焉的样子。
- Well, that should do it, right? Now let's get back and look for Aranakula. ｜ 嗯！这样应该就可以了吧？我们快回去找兰那库拉吧！
- ...The day will come. So long as we're both standing here breathing, the day will come when we find out who the winner is! ｜ …总有一天。只要我们还能站在这里喘气，那就总有一天能分出胜负！
- (...If that's truly what you believe, why did you keep your connection with Haypasia? Surely, with the power you've come to possess, you can cut her off with just a thought.) ｜ （…既然你抱有这种想法，为什么还要留着与海芭夏的意识连接？凭你现在的能力，应该能切断这种联络吧。）
- #{NICKNAME} and Paimon are really strong. If it were Colonel Kate, he'd have gotten blown to pieces right away. ｜ #{NICKNAME}骑士和派蒙好强。凯特上校的话，一炮就会被打散吧。
- Talk to Kayabuki ｜ 与茅葺对话
- The Pyro Regisvine's core has re-formed near its <color=#FF5E41FF>roots</color>! ｜ 爆炎树的原核在<color=#FF5E41FF>根部</color>重新凝聚！
- Increases Elemental Burst DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color> and Elemental Burst CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>7.5%</color>. ｜ 元素爆发造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>，元素爆发的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>7.5%</color>。
- Goodbye! May you always be blessed with the courage to face your challenges head on! ｜ 再见！祝你拥有战胜困难的勇气！
- Yo! Dear customer, you look like your travels have you absolutely beat. Are you looking for a place to put up your feet and enjoy a cuppa tea? ｜ 唷！客官，看您这风尘仆仆的样子，在找喝茶歇脚的地儿吧？
- No problem. ｜ 没问题。
- Few people know that the true origin of throwing coins into the fountain comes from tossing Hydro Sigils into the Fountain of Lucine, which is in fact the correct way of making a wish to the fountain. ｜ 鲜为人知的是，将冒险中获得的「水之印」投入伊黎耶岛的露景泉，才是向喷泉许愿的正确做法，以及这一习俗真正的来源。
- Then please begin. Preparing to access cognitive currents. Establishing waypoint... ｜ 那么，请准备。预备开始访问意识洪流，建立锚点…

- Be careful out there. I'll observe the situation from here. ｜ 路上小心，我会在这里观测「夜神之国」的变化。
- Hah! How was that? Were ya scared? ｜ 怎么样，被吓到了吧！

- Let's go and try to leave the city today. ｜ 走吧，今天试着到城外去。

- Decreases the rate of Sheer Cold accumulation for all party members for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色严寒积累速度降低，持续900秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- Rawr! ｜ 呀！

- Earnestness and responsibility. That's all I ask. ｜ 都可以，只要够认真，够负责就好。
- His patient record mentions that he loved nothing more than a heated argument. No matter how trivial it was, he could never agree to disagree — he always had to be right. The happiest part of his day would be winning an argument and proving the other person wrong. ｜ 从诊疗记录来看，他非常热衷于和别人争执，鸡毛蒜皮的小事也要论个对错，每天最大的快乐可能就是吵架吵赢了谁。
- I'd love to have someone to help me out here, but I am well aware the Ministry has no spare manpower during Lantern Rite. ｜ 我真想找个人来帮忙，但…海灯节的总务司，想来是绝对匀不出人手了。
- Of the Land Amidst Monoliths ｜ 浮世浮生千岩间
- Synopsis (Shots 1 to 6):\nThe scene revolves around members of the Tabletop Troupe taking part in an activity together. Guided by their Game Master, Clorinde, they encounter a <color=#e5870a>merchant</color>, a <color=#e5870a>Sternshield Crab</color> blocking their path, and a <color=#e5870a>Cryo Regisvine</color> guarding some treasure, in <color=#e5870a>that order</color>. Navia, who is playing an Adventurer, will attempt to use <color=#e5870a>"Persuasion"</color> in each encounter. ｜ 脚本规划（第1至第6镜）：\n展现桌上剧团成员们一同进行活动时的场景。在克洛琳德饰演的主持人的引导下，众人<color=#e5870a>依次</color>与<color=#e5870a>商人</color>，挡路的<color=#e5870a>坚盾重甲蟹</color>和守护宝藏的<color=#e5870a>急冻树</color>遭遇。而在每一次遭遇中，娜维娅饰演的冒险家均会尝试对对方使用<color=#e5870a>「说服」</color>。

- I can't wait either. ｜ 我也很期待。

- A fashion festival is being held in Fontaine. You and Paimon decide to check it out for yourselves... ｜ 枫丹似乎正在举行一场时尚盛典，你和派蒙决定前去一探究竟…
- Crackers shaped like little Saurians. The enticing aroma of butter draws forth the delightful, irresistible interplay between the Cacahuatl and Grainfruit, while the cute shapes make them truly hard to put down... Be that as it may, you received these treats on the parade of blessings and it might be nicer to keep them as an uneaten memento. ｜ 小龙造型的饼干。黄油诱人的味道牵引着味蕾抓住苦种与颗粒果交织出的美妙。可爱造型让人爱不释手，香甜味道让人停不下口…不过这是在「祝福之路」得到的点心，作为纪念品也不失为一种选择。
- Oh, did the birds wake you up? Haha, let me have a quick talk with them. We'll see if it works — they don't always listen to me. ｜ 被鸟叫吵醒了？哈哈，我去跟它们商量商量，但不一定奏效哦，它们有时也不听我的话。
- There is a barrier under Konda Village. For the sake of Narukami Island, we must lift it. ｜ 绀田村的地下有一个「结界」。为了鸣神岛的大地，我们必须破除它。
- Uh... If she's on leave then... an autograph won't be a problem. Right? ｜ 呃…如果是休假时间的话，那签个名应该…没问题吧。
- An adventure story has gotten Jack all excited. He's desperate for someone to help him track down the monster from the story... ｜ 杰克正因为冒险故事而兴奋，想要找人帮他去实地搜索故事中怪物的踪迹…

- I believe you are a trustworthy Nara. ｜ ——老身觉得，是值得信任的那菈。

- ...Well, that should just about do it for the cleaning... Could Barbara really do this all herself? ｜ 这样应该就打扫干净了…平时这些工作，真的是芭芭拉小姐一个人做的吗？
- It was pretty tough... ｜ 还是有点辛苦…

- Let me think about it... ｜ 让我再考虑一下…

- "For, at last, his wish is now fulfilled." ｜ 「庆贺他的如愿以偿。」

- I don't know how you've been leading your crew, but the results speak for themselves: The Arataki Gang rules! ｜ 虽然不知道你到底是怎么指导部下的，但结果已经没有悬念了，是本大爷的荒泷派更胜一筹！

- When Faruzan is in the Manifest Gale state created by <color=#FFD780FF>Wind Realm of Nasamjnin</color>, the amount of time taken to charge a shot is decreased by 60%, and she can apply <color=#FFD780FF>The Wind's Secret Ways</color>' Perfidious Wind's Bale to opponents who are hit by the vortex created by Pressurized Collapse. ｜ 珐露珊处于<color=#FFD780FF>非想风天</color>的「疾风示现」状态下时，瞄准射击所需的蓄力时间减少60%；并能对「风压坍陷」效果产生的风涡命中的敌人施加<color=#FFD780FF>抟风秘道</color>的「诡风之祸」效果。

- The Saurian Relics Association is an organization that was specifically established to collect and sort through all these items. ｜ 「龙遗物协会」就是专门收集和整理这些物品的组织。
- I seemed to hear a faint voice just now. ｜ 我好像隐约听到有人说话的声音…
- Hello there! I presume that you've heard about these meteorites sending people to sleep? ｜ 您好啊。那些会令人昏睡的陨石的事，你们也听说了吧？

- Tighnari ｜ 提纳里
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- The kid is very grown-up for his age... ｜ 现在的孩子也太早熟了吧…
- It's fine, don't worry about it. Plays on words are also a trick that mysterious organizations enjoy pulling. What matters is what we must do next. ｜ 不必在意。玩弄文字也是神秘结社常用的手段罢了。重要的是接下来要做的事。
- Hear me now, having a bad memory isn't always a bad thing. The less you remember, the less obsessive you become. ｜ 听我说，人记忆力不好未必是坏事，记住的东西越少，就越不容易有执念。
- Guiding the path of the wind currents, you summon a forward-moving tornado that pulls objects and opponents towards itself, dealing continuous <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Elemental Absorption</color>\nIf the tornado comes into contact with <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>Electro</color>, it will deal additional elemental DMG of that type.\nElemental Absorption may only occur once per use.\n\n<i>You and Paimon studied the flapping of a butterfly's wings.</i> ｜ 导引风行进的路途，唤出持续前进的龙卷风，将沿途的物体与敌人卷入，持续造成<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>元素转化</color>\n若龙卷风在技能持续期间接触了<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>火元素</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素</color>，则会获得对应元素属性，额外造成该元素附加伤害。\n这种转化在技能持续期间仅会发生一次。\n\n<i>和派蒙一起研究过蝴蝶的振翅。</i>
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Don't you worry, I've hidden a Kamera inside the Domain that will capture all of your heroics! ｜ 我布置在秘境暗处的留影机，会将你们的英姿全都记录下来！
- ... ｜ ……
- The reasons behind Layla's poor physical health and insomnia can be traced back to a single factor: academic pressure.\nAll students of the Darshans are required to commit to their studies, complete their essays, and pass their examinations or dissertations. Though this task sounds simple, simple does not mean easy, and the investment demanded of students comes in the form of time and effort.\nUnfortunately for Layla, she is always slower at finishing her papers than her peers.\nShe often spends a great deal of time contemplating, and worrying about the validity of her theses. Is the content overly simplistic compared to that written by her classmates? Are her calculations truly accurate? And if so, are they as concise as they can be?\nShe feels that, as a student of a most prestigious Darshan, she cannot slack in her studies. But at the same time, she dares not commit to her writings in haste.\nSeized by hesitation, time often slips from between her fingers, and leaves her staring at the blank pages of her work without having written a word.\nBecause of this, she often finds herself working through the night, and leaving sleep for the day. Yet, with the breaking of dawn, she often finds herself assailed by new assignments, causing her to descend into a vicious spiral.\nAs such, her habits have afflicted her body with abnormal side effects.\nNow, she often rises at night, wandering. Upon waking, she often finds herself unable to remember what she had done or where she had gone — the rumored symptoms of the phenomenon known as "sleepwalking," described by her peers.\nFrom how her classmates have described her sleepwalking, it is as if she suddenly manifests with neither hint nor reason in a certain place. Mysteriously, none of them have been able to fully explain where she goes after or what she does either.\nBesides sleepwalking, she has also discovered another strange recurrence in her life.\nEach time she awakes from sleepwalking, she finds her unwritten papers from the day before fully completed, meticulous and accurate calculations included! Even the handwriting appears to be hers.\nStranger still, the author of her papers also has a habit of viciously critiquing the arguments and experimental methods of others.\nLayla simply could not fathom herself committing these acts, and found herself suspecting that someone was messing with her.\nHowever, upon recalling her experiences leading from her home to the halls of the Darshan, she could think of no one with proper motive.\nThe term "Heaven-Sent Thesis" is often used in Sumeru to describe an impossible miracle... and if what Layla had been experiencing did not count as a "Heaven-Sent Thesis," she didn't know what did.\nDid a miracle truly grace her? Did the stars themselves, moved by her dedication to the study, repay her with a blessing?\nRegardless, "The Stars' Blessing" has solved several of her woes. Now, the papers she needs to write for several classes can be handed in without additional worry on her end.\nAs for the other details, well, that is probably best left for when she had the energy to care. Presently, she has classes to prepare for. ｜ 莱依拉的身体素质之所以如此糟糕，是因为她长期受失眠困扰，而失眠又来源于课业压力。\n所有的教令院学生都必须修习课程，完成论文，通过考试或评审会。听起来并不复杂，但其中的每一项都需要学生们投入大量时间精力。\n不幸的是，莱依拉的论文完成得总比别人慢些。\n她总要思考很久：自己的论点是否合理？和同学们的相比会不会太过简单？每次推算时，也总忍不住怀疑自己：这样运算真的准确吗？即便准确，这又是否是最简洁的方式？\n她觉得既然自己是教令院的学生，就绝对不能在课业上有所懈怠，可越是这么想，越不敢仓促下笔。\n如此犹豫中，时间从她的指尖和眉间悄悄溜走。该完成的课业还在那里，一个字也没有动。\n她又不得不熬夜，将补觉的事情留到白天。然而天一破晓，又有新的课业等待着她，一切似乎变成了恶性循环。\n她的身体开始出现异常。\n她经常在熟睡中起身，四处走动，待到醒来却完全不记得自己做了什么，简直和传说中的「梦游」现象一模一样。\n听见过她「梦游」的同学说，「梦游」中的她似乎会无规律地突然出现在各种地点，没有一个人能完整说出她去了哪里、做了什么。\n和「梦游」行为一起出现在她生活中的，还有另一件怪事。\n每次她「梦游」醒来，都会发现自己睡前还没动笔的论文全都被完成了。而且这些论文逻辑严密，数据准确，就连纸上的字迹都是她本人的。\n更诡异的是，作者竟然以她的名义，在论文里毫不客气地批评了他人的论文和研究方法。\n这怎么想都不是自己能做出来的事情，到底是谁在跟她开玩笑？\n但莱依拉仔细回想自己一路走来的经历，从家乡到教令院，似乎没有任何一个人有动机这么做。\n须弥俗语中常用「天降论文」来形容本不可能发生的奇迹，可发生在她眼前的，不是「天降论文」又是什么。\n难道真的发生了奇迹？伟大的星空被她执着钻研星相学的精神感动，终于有所回应，为她赐福了吗？\n不论真相为何，「星空赐福」都解决了她的燃眉之急，这下好几门课的论文都能交上了。\n剩下的，就等到她有精力时再说吧，这会儿她该去上课了。
- Yep! Hehe, I would like to ask you a small favor. ｜ 正是！哈哈哈，我之所以冒昧地请您留步，是想要请您帮一点小忙。
- This floor tile, engraved with special patterns, appears similar to the Tearstone tiles found throughout Fontaine.\nAs the hardness of Tearstone makes it almost impossible to sculpt them in detail, even with the assistance of meka, most tiles are regular square shapes with patterns carved on their surface.\nRumor has it that the painter who designed these tiles was struggling with his studies of perspective theory, and he mistakenly submitted his coursework as a design proposal. As a result, the person in charge at the time fell in love with the creativity displayed in the design, and with a few modifications, the aesthetic of the tiles we know today was born. ｜ 镌刻着特殊花纹的地砖，外形与枫丹各地的泪斑岩地砖相同。\n由于泪斑岩十分坚硬，难以进行细致的造型加工，即便有着机关辅助，大多地砖也都呈现规整的正方形，加以表面雕刻的花纹。\n相传，设计这种地砖的画家当时正苦于「透视理论」的学习，他错误地将课程作业当成方案上交。结果当时的总负责人非常喜欢这一创意，稍作修改后，便有了如今这款富有设计感的地砖。
- During the battle's second phase, charge the Neo Akasha Terminal fully to allow it to hit Shouki no Kami with a more powerful aimed attack which will deplete his Ward. Additionally, when Shouki no Kami is charging his Setsuna Shoumetsu attack, this sort of attack can be used to hit his weak spot, toppling him over and immobilizing him. ｜ 战斗二阶段时，将新式虚空终端的能量充满，能够对正机之神进行更强的瞄准攻击，削减其护罩；此外，正机之神积蓄力量施展刹那生灭期间，利用这种攻击命中其要害，能将其击落瘫痪。

- Yun Jin's specialty. This sweet and sticky snack will somehow not affect your throat in any negative way, which is why it's Yun Jin's favorite. The aftertaste is most elegant, not something one would get sick of quickly. Come to think of it... This is quite a decent bit more than she would usually make for herself — but who are you to question her kindness? ｜ 云堇的特色料理。香甜糯口的点心，不会对嗓子产生什么影响，是云堇最中意的甜品。回味清雅，即使多吃一些也不会腻。这样想来…分量的确比她平时做给自己吃的更足些。这也是她的善意吧。

- I... I know it's my fault... ｜ 是…我明白自己的过错了…

- Small beans it was, really. ｜ 小事一桩。

- One more time, guess whooo~? ｜ 「再来一次，猜猜我是谁呀？」
- Small Lamp Grass? ｜ 小灯草？

- Paimon didn't follow that at all... but at the same time, it kinda sounded smart, so... ｜ 完全不知道是什么歪理…但又很有道理的样子…
- As for Mona? She seems to be an excellent mage, but I'm not a part of their Hexenzirkel. The idea of Irminsul exploration and formal tea parties just leaves me cold. ｜ 莫娜？似乎是一位很优秀的魔导师小姐呢。但我并不是她们「魔女会」的成员哦。古树考察，组织茶会，一听就是麻烦的事情吧。
- So many questions. To answer... hard... ｜ 问题很多，回答，好难…
- I want to do something I normally never would. ｜ 想做一些平时不会做的事情。
- I used to work at Tatarasuna. Yuuzou rescued me from the ruins after the disaster — straight up saved my life. ｜ 我是以前在踏鞴砂工作的工人，在事故之后被雄三从废墟里救下，保住一命。

- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Everyone says that Mondstadt is the land of the wind.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> But I wonder which direction the seasonal winds come from.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Why don't we ask Venti?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> He'll probably just dodge the question with a "hehe" or something...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> True. The Anemo Archon is just a Tone-Deaf Bard. What does he know about the wind? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>人们都说，蒙德是风的国度。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>可是，我还不知道这个季节盛行的风向，是哪个方位呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不如我们去问问温迪吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>他对这种问题，只会「欸嘿」一声敷衍过去吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>说得也是。风神只是一个卖唱的而已，懂什么风…

- Here it is! ｜ 写好啦！

- Come to think of it, I do recall that an envoy from Fontaine was once imprisoned here by Boethius... ｜ 突然想起来，那时好像有位来自枫丹的使者，曾被波爱修斯关在这里的某处…
- I should still keep an eye on the surrounding soil environment, though. Looks like I'll have to place a few more instruments... ｜ 周围的土质环境也得再观察一下才行。看来，不得不多放一些仪器了。
- Just the right amount of spiciness — enough to whet the appetite! ｜ 适当的辣味，一点点就开胃！
- This is gonna be where they keep all the people they took. ｜ 估计他们到处抓来的人也被关在里面。
- A flower that grew from a rock, breaking through the stone as it strove to reach the light. ｜ 岩石之中生长出来的花。能够裂穿坚硬的岩壁，是因为花追寻着光。
- Whatever other plans you may have had, I must now escort you back to the Fortress of Meropide. ｜ 不管你们有什么企图，现在必须在我的监督下返回梅洛彼得堡。

- My guess would be that there are at least some similarities between humans and myself. By observing their behavior, perhaps I could one day understand the meaning of my existence. ｜ 所以我猜测，我与人类之间必然存在一些共性。通过观察他们，也许有一天我可以理解自身存在的意义。

- An ancient, strangely-shaped canteen. The interior is fitted with harp strings, which play a wondrous tune as the water flows out. ｜ 外形奇妙的古代水壶，内侧安装着琴弦，随流水而奏出无旋律的奇妙乐声。
- There's no need to apologize. ｜ 无需道歉。

- Let's try again tomorrow. ｜ 明天再试一次吧。
- Meow meow. ｜ 喵喵。

- ...Could I stay here for a little longer? I won't cause a fuss! You won't even know I'm here! ｜ 可以让我多在这里待一会儿吗？我会安安静静的。

- It's just... after the Tavern closed, I somehow forgot how to sing... I'm always a few beats behind everyone else, and I keep singing out of key... ｜ 酒馆关门的这段时间里，我好像突然忘了怎么唱歌似的，老是跟不上大家的节奏，还经常跑调…

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Amidst Whispering Winds."\nA bedroom that embodies the idea of a "caring heart." For busy folk, a bedroom may just be a place that contains a bed, a place where one gets a little shut-eye, and which does not require too much care. But for those with an eye for detail, every part of one's living space is worth time and care.\nWhether they be the winds of freedom or resistance, they all began as the tiniest of gentle breezes. One who travels far must take good care of themselves, and surely fatigue will slip away unnoticed if one lives surrounded by warmth and comfort.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Barbara, Eula, Noelle ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「柔风低语间」的放置方法。\n随处可见「关怀之心」的卧室。对于匆忙度日的人而言，卧室或许只是容纳床铺，闭眼过夜的房间，凑合凑合就好。可在细心之人眼中，住所的每个角落，都值得倾注心意。\n无论向往自由的风，还是执着抗争的风，在吹拂之初，皆为轻柔的微风。给予自己必要的呵护，才能深行至远方。倘若一室之内的生活被温柔环抱，那么疲惫也会在不经意间悄然溜走吧。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：芭芭拉、优菈、诺艾尔

- Yeah, that would be the best for them both. I'll check with Master later and see if there's anything I can help him with. ｜ 嗯…这样对珐露珊前辈和师父都好…我之后再看看，师父那边还有没有我能帮上的忙吧。
- Such is the loyal crew of the Black Nacre, me lads! Even when those lily-livered biscuit eaters ambushed us, not one of you panicked... ｜ 不愧是我的好弟兄，被那些家伙伏击，也临危不乱…

- Thank you all for waiting! All votes have been received and counted, and the results have been returned to Ningguang. ｜ 各位久等啦！现在投票计票工作已经完成，结果已返还到凝光小姐处。

The <color=#00E1FFFF>Sword of Brilliant Valor</color> and the <color=#00E1FFFF>Shield of Magnificent Honor</color>! ｜ 他当年冒险时用的武器，是大英雄温妮莎的遗物，<color=#00E1FFFF>「辉煌勇气之剑」</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>「光耀意志之盾」</color>！
- You introduce yourselves to Ferdinand and explain what's happened... ｜ 向费迪南德进行了说明，并作了自我介绍…
- #We've got no choice, {NICKNAME}! Let's get rid of these Rifthounds first! ｜ #没办法了，{NICKNAME}，先解决这些兽境猎犬吧！
- Wields a searing flame that can incinerate the very earth. Has different effects when Tapped or Held.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Tap</color>\nCall forth flames in a raging blaze. When used, the Traveler gains 42 Nightsoul points and enters the Nightsoul's Blessing state, summoning a Blazing Threshold that follows the current active character.\nWhen the Blazing Threshold gets close to opponents, it will deal Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color> to nearby opponents at intervals.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nUnleash fire in a composed manner, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> to nearby opponents. When used, the Traveler gains 42 Nightsoul points and enters the Nightsoul's Blessing state, summoning a Scorching Threshold that follows the current active character.\nWhen the current active character within a Scorching Threshold deals DMG to opponents, the Threshold will launch a Coordinated Attack that deals Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color> based on the Traveler's ATK. This effect can occur once every 3s.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Nightsoul's Blessing: Traveler</color>\nContinuously consumes Nightsoul points. The Traveler's Nightsoul's Blessing state lasts 12s at maximum, and when their Nightsoul points are exhausted, this state will end. If this Elemental Skill is used again while active, the Traveler's Nightsoul points will be reset to 42 points.\nBlazing and Scorching Thresholds will disappear once the Traveler's Nightsoul's Blessing state ends, and only 1 Blazing or Scorching Threshold summoned by the Traveler themselves can exist at any one time.\n\n<i>Together, you and Paimon watched the shifting colors of the flowing flames.</i> ｜ 驱使能够焚尽大地的烈火，依据点按、长按，以不同的方式产生效果。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>点按</color>\n以炽烈的方式驱使火之力。施放后，旅行者将获得42点夜魂值，进入夜魂加持状态，并唤出跟随当前场上角色的「焰烈之槛」。\n焰烈之槛接近敌人时，会间歇性对身边的敌人造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n以沉稳的方式驱使火之力，对附近的敌人造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。施放后，旅行者将获得42点夜魂值，进入夜魂加持状态，并唤出跟随当前场上角色的「灼火之槛」。\n当前场上处于灼火之槛中的角色对敌人造成伤害时，灼火之槛将进行协同攻击，基于旅行者的攻击力，对其造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>，该效果每3秒至多触发一次。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>夜魂加持·旅行者</color>\n持续消耗夜魂值。旅行者的夜魂加持至多持续12秒，夜魂值耗尽时，旅行者的夜魂加持将会结束。期间再次施放元素战技时，旅行者的夜魂值会刷新为42点。\n焰烈之槛与灼火之槛将在旅行者的夜魂加持结束时消失，同时只能存在一个由旅行者自己召唤的焰烈之槛或灼火之槛。\n\n<i>和派蒙一起观察过灼火流变的焰色。</i>

They will always greet cats they meet on the road, and will sometimes even respond to a cat's calls~"\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Frost Operative" starts with the Talent Card "Rimeflow Rapier" equipped.</color> ｜ 「喵~」「据枫丹来访的猫猫客人所说，手持迅捷剑的霜役人们都彬彬有礼，温文尔雅，每次见到路过的猫猫，都会和它们打招呼，甚至回应一些猫猫的呼唤~」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「愚人众·霜役人」初始装备有天赋牌「冰雅刺剑」。</color>

- "Rule Number Two: If you hear a dog, you must run away quickly. If you hear a cat, you must move slowly and try not to make any noise." ｜ 「守则二、听到狗的叫声时一定要迅速的远离，而听到猫的声音时则要缓慢地移动，尽量不要发出任何的响声。」
- Yes, my lover Faissolle told me all about you. Please help us, Your Grace, he's in great danger right now... ｜ 嗯，我听他说了。费索勒，他是我的恋人，现在他的处境很危险。

- You came here to be sure, so you must have your ways of assuring yourself. ｜ 你是来确定的，你就有办法确定。
- I wish there were more lively festivals like this one! ｜ 真希望这种热闹的节日能多一点啊！
- An ore that gives off a strange glow. It has a compact and tough texture. ｜ 散发着奇异光泽的矿石，质地也颇为致密坚韧。

- I often see her wandering in the woods singing strange songs. Actually, I must have heard all of her songs several times each by now. I'm used to her singing, but I still find it strange. That being said, I don't hate it either. ｜ 她在附近山林游荡时，经常会唱奇怪的歌。久而久之，我把她的歌断断续续听了个遍。听习惯了也还是觉得奇怪，但，我并不讨厌。

- I heard people have been lining up since the early morning for Emura Ichigensai's clinic today — he's seeing patients just west of Inazuma City. And how many patients have you seen today? ｜ 我听说那位「江村一玄斋」今天会在稻妻城西边的空地上提供服务，大清早就有人在排队，而你这边来了多少客人？
- The snake changed into a human form and used her knowledge to create medicines and save the sick. I could understand how the agile human fingers could help her do what she wished, but I do not know why it was done. ｜ 蛇化成人的造型，利用对自然的知识制药救死。我能够明白人的形体拥有灵活的手指，对她要做的事而言更方便。但我也不明白为什么她要这么做。
- Many things have changed now that Inazuma is at peace. However... it seems that some people continue to fear the "divine light" just as before. ｜ 如今稻妻和平安治，与之前相比多了不少变化。不过…有些人对「天光」的畏惧仍未改变。
- Whew...I guess we don't have to finish them. It's getting late, and I doubt there's enough time to go looking for Sweet Flowers... ｜ 噗…要是喝不惯的话就别喝啦，今天太晚了，也没时间再去找甜甜花了。

- Despite her incredibly weak disposition, she still chose to make a stand. Perhaps she wanted to prove a point, or perhaps she didn't want to leave regrets... ｜ 哪怕无比虚弱，她还是选择了挺身而出。或许是想要证明，或许是不愿后悔…

- When It's Windy ｜ 起风的时候…

- Not to mention... ｜ 而且…

- My father always had a lot of unrealistic expectations for me, but the more that he tried to get me to become like him, the less I wanted to listen to what he had to say. ｜ 我老爹从小就对我有很多不切实际的期待，他越是想要我和他一样，我就越不想听他的话。
- "Bantan Sango Detective Agency's president is currently asking someone to create a net using Kamuna Onmyoudou that can make people tell the truth." ｜ 「万端珊瑚侦探社的社长，正在拜托人以惟神阴阳术为核心，研制一种能让人说真话的网。」
- Woah, they really pulled out all the stops for this new script! ｜ 哦，真不愧是俱乐部的新剧本，花大功夫了呢。
- Right at the very end, Hurlock faces off against the real mastermind, revealed to be the assistant, Miss Jacoba, in a duel at the old site of Liliacruces Ordo... I couldn't stop my feelers from shaking... ｜ 在一切的最后，赫尔洛克与真正的黑幕，也就是助手雅各芭小姐在铃兰十字结社旧址决战的那一段，让我的触角颤抖不已…
- Still, she's older now, and quite eccentric. It's hard to even book a meeting with her, given that she's constantly holed up in her room and doesn't like to be disturbed. ｜ 但她年事已高，性格古怪，平时总是闭门不出，也不喜欢被人打扰，想见她一面都很难。
- Collect the treasure ｜ 获得宝藏$UNRELEASED
- (Kids these days... Her friends sure seem worried.) ｜ （现在的孩子真让人不省心啊…）
- Use attacks to break the crystals within to score points. ｜ 利用攻击破坏其中的晶体，可以获得积分。
- Shadow of the Sand King ｜ 沙王的投影
- Tell me about diving... ｜ 关于潜水…
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- The missing star from the Talents of a Cryo-aligned Traveler. ｜ 冰元素旅行者的命之座当中，缺失的星辰。
- We probably still have a while until the stars come out... ｜ 星星…应该还有一阵子才出来吧。
- People From Sumeru Do Not Dream ｜ 须弥人不会做梦
- You're not... dressed like a hunter. ｜ 你的装束，看起来不像是猎人。
- Scenes from Life in Meropide: Safe Operation ｜ 梅洛彼得生活场景·安全操作
- Daughter's Grey Spirit Form (Played by Grey Silhouette 1) ｜ 灰色灵体女儿（表演用灰色人1）
- Hmm, let me think... ｜ 唔…我想想…
- ... ｜ ……
- When she was younger? Oh, actually... Now that you mention it, this does remind me of the fashionista phase she wrote about in her diary... ｜ 年轻的时候…呃…这么说来，倒的确挺像她那本少女日记里写的爱赶时髦的样子…
- Adventure Rank increased to {0} ｜ 冒险等阶提升至{0}
- Hehe. Yes, partly. ｜ 呵呵…二八成吧。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Talk to Sayid ｜ 与萨义德对话
- Well, let's hit 'em hard, Traveler. Watch and learn, kids! ｜ 旅行者，咱们一起上吧！卡里玛，还有艾登，你们可要看好了。
- Sea of Bygone Eras ｜ 旧日之海
- Ah... The Fatui's custody. I see, so even Granny has told you that I was coerced by the Fatui. I'm afraid you've been brought here by a lie, like a false omen in the lingering smoke. ｜ 啊…逃走。嗯，你果然这么想，奶奶也这么对你说，我被愚人众胁迫…就像烟雾里错误的预兆，你被一个谎言带到这里。
- Cat Grass Cardamom Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 猫草豆蔻存在时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Go deep within the fell dragon's lair ｜ 深入邪龙的巢穴
- They represent good fortune in Inazuma. Many business owners buy one to place in their stores, hoping for financial success. ｜ 这种玩偶在我们稻妻象征着好运哦，不少商家都会买上一只摆在店里，以求财运亨通。
- Aranakula knows how to hide. The bad mushrooms definitely won't find him. Why is Arapandu worried? ｜ 兰那库拉，很懂得躲藏，蘑菇一定找不到他。兰般度为什么担心？
- That's right. ｜ 没错。
- Biram ｜ 庇兰
- 300s ｜ 300秒
- During the headcount last night, other miners said that they had just met him and that he might return very soon. So I let it go. ｜ 昨晚清点的时候，旁边的矿工说不久前刚看见过他，说不定一会儿就回来，所以我也没再在意。
- New Stage in Contending Tides ｜ 争斗潮流新关卡
- Sunken Object ｜ 水下沉落物
- Venti: Friendly ｜ 温迪·友好
- Noelle: Protector ｜ 诺艾尔·守护
- Ahh, warm lighting, fun stories to read... It's perfect. Oh, not that there's anything wrong with the House of Daena, of course. ｜ 温暖的灯光、有趣的故事…真好啊。啊，我不是说智慧宫有什么不好。
- No, I don't reckon so... I suppose it's about time I stepped in as well. ｜ 抱歉，这次就不需要劳烦你帮忙了…我也总得派上点用场嘛。
- Like the Kairagi. ｜ 就像是「海乱鬼」一样。
- But this is beyond the scope of our consideration. ｜ 但是，这些就不在我们的考虑范围之内啦。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Follow the mechanical crab and continue your search ｜ 跟随机械螃蟹继续调查
- Something very precious... My archaeology notes. ｜ 是非常珍贵的事物——我的考古笔记。
- About Mika ｜ 关于米卡…
- What happened after caused me still more confusion. You fought alongside humans and their so-called gods, and you perished. Humans fighting each other over territory and survival... Now that, I can understand. ｜ 后来的事情对我来说就更费解了。你们与人和他们所谓的神战斗，然后去死。人与人像野兽一样为了领地和生存互相杀死，这是我能理解的。
- Use the Force, Sorush ｜ 要用原力，斯露莎
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- This product will be a fast-paced, easy-to-digest release that capitalizes on the enduring popularity of a traditional genre while addressing its common pain points... ｜ 本产品采用了短平快的打法，以常规的典型做法为基础再度进行了微创新，针对固有痛点进行了快速迭代…
- To find somewhere she could sing, no doubt. *sigh* She can't be persuaded, and we can't stop her from walking out the door. Did you really have to lie to her like that? ｜ 找地方唱歌去了吧。唉，说也说不听，拦也拦不住。你说你当初骗她干嘛！
- My craftsmanship... ｜ 我的手艺…
- Hehe, guess we're all clear now, eh? Make sure you rest up, Pahsiv. Just leave this to us! ｜ 嘿嘿，这下我们就都清楚了。珀西芙，那你就先好好休息，这件事包在我们身上！
